name: Keep Florida Red
subject: Get FL off the “Battleground State” List
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEEP FLORIDA RED**
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "Video") Peter: You've heard that the definition of insanity is doing the exact same thing over and over but expecting different results? Well, the Dems are taking that to a whole new level in Florida. The Left's tired attempts to win over Hispanic voters have produced for the first time, a majority of these voters that plan to vote for GOP candidates instead of Democrats. So Biden, Pelosi, and The Squad had a choice -- Moderate their message to appeal to the more conservative Latinos, or go super-Woke and run further to the left. You know what the choice they made was. My word, the delusion of these liberals is mindboggling! **But in their delusion, the liberals are spending $15 million to turn Florida blue.** **$15 million!** **[That's why we need your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today to counter the Left's efforts to win in Florida.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "That’s why we need your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today
to counter the Left’s efforts to win in Florida.")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "Headline")We at Keep Florida Red worked hard to deliver the Sunshine State for President Trump. But now we need your help to ensure Gov. DeSantis, Lt. Gov. Nunez, and all of the Republicans down the ticket win their election this year. **The Democrats know they 've lost their chokehold on Florida. But this $15 million could make a significant dent in their efforts to win races like it did in 2018 and 2020.** Wouldn't it be wonderful if the state that defined the phrase "battleground state" that only went for President Bush by 537 votes just 20 years ago is finally cemented as a hard-core Red State? **[That's only going to happen if we stop leftist billionaires like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg from their push to promote radical progressive politicians who carry their water. Will you help us counter their efforts with your $50, $100, or $500 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "That’s only going to happen if we stop leftist
billionaires like George Soros and Michael Bloomberg from their push to promote radical progressive politicians who carry their water. Will you help
us counter their efforts with your $50, $100, or $500 donation today.")** Do you hear that? That's the last gasp of the Democrats on life-support hoping to wrestle Florida away from us. That's how close we are to winning. The question is will you let the Dems recover and gain a beachhead into Florida, or are you ready to nail the final coffin of the Biden-Pelosi agenda, and turn this state into the reddest one in the nation? **[If you chose the latter, then I need you to dig deep. We can't afford to fight with one hand tied behind our backs. Can we count on you to chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "If you chose the latter, then I need you to dig deep. We
can’t afford to fight with one hand tied behind our backs. Can we count on you to chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?")** We're so close to finally taking Florida off the "battleground state" list. But it's only going to happen if you step up and help us stop the Democrat's last hurrah into this state. **[Donate today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "Donate today.")** For our nation,
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462558:JM5NgMoNl:m:1:3317145305:783AF6B7DB4C26DA9719F13932D717C5:r "Peter M. Feaman")
Peter M. Feaman
Chairman, Keep Florida Red

Hi Friend,
Our campaign has been endorsed by Shelby County Mayor, Lee Harris, who earlier this month received 70 percent of the vote in the democratic primary during his bid for reelection. Mayor Harris stated “I’m pleased to endorse Councilman JB Smiley Jr.’s candidacy to be the next Governor of Tennessee. Councilman Smiley understands the issues that matter to working women and men and the challenges that face our neighborhoods.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/committee-to-elect-jb-smiley-jr-1]
"Tennessee needs a Governor who will focus on the needs of our families, work hard, and work with all leaders across our great state. I’m endorsing Councilman Smiley because I know he will be a tireless champion for working folks, neighborhoods, and families and our entire state would be made better by his leadership,” said Mayor Harris

name: Josh Harder
subject: Mourning with Uvalde, TX
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-qJZvbCThWSMVDTu4bVzPBHDyTiyR69ZcqwuPoFJ6aA=/VOVg5TNACs8MUlcUuNR6eJIknGGmCVwyqc-3ctoaDuk=) | Hi All - Yesterday we learned of the horrific murder of 19 children and 2 teachers at the Robb Elementary School in Texas. My heart is absolutely broken for the families and the Uvalde community. And my heart aches for all parents today. How can we look our children in the eye and explain why this keeps happening? How can we just go on with our lives today with the reminder our kids aren't safe? I was 14 when Columbine happened. 25 for Sandy Hook. I'm now 35 with a child of my own. And _nothing_ has changed. In fact it's only gotten worse. I write this knowing I work across the street from 50 Republican Senators who refuse to vote for our commonsense gun reforms. I write this knowing it may fall on deaf ears, but I have to keep trying. Today I am working for the teachers who gave their lives shielding their students. For the 19 families who won't be able to tuck their babies into bed. For a future where my Lily won't have to practice where to hide in her classroom. Humanity is counting on Congress to put politics aside and protect our kids. I pray this time will be different. Josh
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-qJZvbCThWSMVDTu4bVzPBHDyTiyR69ZcqwuPoFJ6aA=/dNY1id-8__oZRlNnWOtv_ZWZf6Wb_aCW5SwA-voFISw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-qJZvbCThWSMVDTu4bVzPBHDyTiyR69ZcqwuPoFJ6aA=/43m7HwvLMdggXpdhua4UShL87lg9IHDmtZjfPdQ1ZxY=)

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA SPARKS RECORD VOTER TURNOUT IN STATE’S PRIMARIES
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| WEDNESDAY, MAY 25 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
GREATER GEORGIA SPARKS RECORD VOTER TURNOUT IN STATE'S PRIMARIES ATLANTA--Yesterday, Georgia voters shattered turnout records in the 2022 primary elections. 857,401 voters voted early in-person and absentee compared to 299,347 who voted early and absentee in the 2018 primary. In total, including Election Day turnout, over 1.9 million voters cast their ballots - compared to about 1.2 million in the 2018 primary. Conservatives overwhelmingly dominated the election, with about 63% of voters casting ballots in the Republican primary - up from the 52% who voted Republican in the 2018 primary. "Yesterday's turnout - and the record surge of conservative voters - represents over a year of hard work by Greater Georgia staff and volunteers, who have helped build a a year-round registration and mobilization machine for the conservative movement. With almost 2 million voter contacts, and tens of thousands of newly registered voters, it's clear that this effort is anchoring a conservative comeback - and putting a stop to the far-Left's advance on our state," said former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "We remain squarely focused on November's general election, and are adding to the ground-game as we look to outperform on the ground again - and to help deliver decisive wins for Georgia conservatives."
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, MAY 25 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE GREATER GEORGIA SPARKS RECORD VOTER TURNOUT IN STATE'S PRIMARIES ATLANTA--Yesterday, Georgia voters shattered turnout records in the 2022 primary elections. 857,401 voters voted early in-person and absentee compared to 299,347 who voted early and absentee in the 2018 primary. In total, including Election Day turnout, over 1.9 million voters cast their ballots - compared to about 1.2 million in the 2018 primary. Conservatives overwhelmingly dominated the election, with about 63% of voters casting ballots in the Republican primary - up from the 52% who voted Republican in the 2018 primary. "Yesterday's turnout - and the record surge of conservative voters - represents over a year of hard work by Greater Georgia staff and volunteers, who have helped build a a year-round registration and mobilization machine for the conservative movement. With almost 2 million voter contacts, and tens of thousands of newly registered voters, it's clear that this effort is anchoring a conservative comeback - and putting a stop to the far-Left's advance on our state," said former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler. "We remain squarely focused on November's general election, and are adding to the ground-game as we look to outperform on the ground again - and to help deliver decisive wins for Georgia conservatives." | | | | | | | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. name: Kevin Kocina
subject: Thank you
body:
I will continue to fight for the hard-working people of Southern Minnesota.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MTNL31V3fHomfMvPBo8jFULUKUp-EljeS4QDAfVU5VytD6zawTNmvlNr_bjSiqwsCv2gpe9oQFWDzE_NDR4etYBUhxzDwZTtAc9SVfAW4zEfLeL9nBJfeTdQVPe2D4gJXmTF8WE82A4XDrPWe0m_1IHR4wOhiyz2&c=zlVivgBvHt1xFdhbpA4YFp0DM3jY3ciViwepWb60_lMUUMmBxaZk3g==&ch=zwJPcybLhwEiDmIB96sK1N8SmxM5MyxeD--Cqo3apAMv5H9zQv5rww==)
---
---
Peter -
When I was 17 years old, I walked into a United States Marine Corps recruiter's office and accepted one of the toughest challenges I've ever faced.
I did it because I had a duty to serve the American people and uphold the values I'd been taught since I was a child.
When I decided to run for Congress, I made my decision out of that same sense of duty. I decided to enter this race to serve the American people once again and despite the results of yesterday's election, my duty to our country is still not over.
These past few months on the campaign trail have been some of the most humbling of my life.
It's been the utmost honor to meet and speak to thousands of my fellow Southern Minnesotans, hear their stories, and learn how their lives have been affected by the political turmoil of the last two years.
I want to thank you all from the bottom of my heart for the tremendous support you've shown me.
I will continue to fight for the hard-working people of Southern Minnesota and work to ensure that our community stays safe, prosperous, and free.

---
Thank you,
---

Kevin Kocina

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: 21 empty bedrooms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Yesterday, 19 children and 2 teachers were murdered. 21 families sent their loved ones to school and now have empty rooms in their homes. Is it too much to ask in the United States of America that when a parent drops their kids off at school they get to pick them up alive?

My 4 year old was put in a closet during the Parkland shooting by a teacher whose daughter was killed that day. Now, my son is 8, the age of the victims.

My heart is with the victims and their families. But we must do more than offer condolences – we must take action. Don’t tell me we can’t do this.

I took action. As a Democratic State Representative I helped pass the strongest gun violence prevention, school safety, and mental health legislation in Florida history after the Parkland shooting.

Republicans were completely in charge in Tallahassee when the Marjory Stoneman Douglas School Safety Act became law, but I led the charge to pass the legislation anyways. So don’t tell me that with
Democrats in charge of the Senate, House, and White House, we can’t get this done now.

To those who tell me not to talk about politics or policy today, my answer is simple: This event was predictable and preventable, policy can prevent tragedies like what we saw in Uvalde yesterday or in
Buffalo last week.

The Marjory Stoneman Douglas School Safety Act banned bump stocks, raised the minimum age to buy a gun in Florida from 18 to 21, implemented a red flag law to take guns out of the hands of violent
individuals, and expanded funding for mental health care and school resource officers in Florida.

After the Parkland shooting, I was on the ground with families and attending the funerals of those who were murdered that day. I made it my mission to ensure another tragedy like this could never again happen in Florida.

Now, we need to make it our mission nationwide. Democrats have the power to move us forward on this issue, and Americans of all parties are tired of inaction and violence.

Bypass the filibuster if necessary. Get it done.

Never Again,
Jared

Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress
Jared Moskowitz for Congress
PO Box 8784
Coral Springs, FL 33065
United States

clean_body: putting our interests over special interest ? | | | Hi Friend, Our campaign centers the interests of everyday workers, families, and communities struggling to make ends meet and paying off debts by fighting for financial freedom. Corporations and politicians continue to exploit marginalized, working people around the country and that's no less true in Los Angeles. I need your help to show them that they cannot continue to put their own interests ahead of the interests of this community. When we ran for Congress in 2020, we won 47.1% of the vote by solely receiving contributions from grassroots donors like you. Without those small donations, we would not come as far as we did. My opponent is powered by corporate money that only furthers the interests of the richest Americans while hurting working people like you and me. When we fuel our campaign, our people-powered movement centers love and justice in our public policy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: With love, David Yung Ho Kim, Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-34 | | David Yung Ho Kim is an immigration attorney, author, and community activist in Los Angeles. David is fighting for financial freedom, love, and justice for all and won't take a single penny from Corporations and PACs. Will you join David Kim on his mission to take big money out of politics? name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z17amlaournj0klj3c0h1apihmpqjvhped55epu8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2utj7acbimti79orhm8r6ap3j69p71ob1ekq64p74sgrjctblc9pmaob2m9r37dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm4o3ncpj39oljcorr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpgm9or2cpj649fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbsjp0oe97n3vhe3ofnngjlc2o8krsrt1eafenlo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5ie6oj6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf8f64uv05okpnvtfseo10fsi946dasb8ea7sbt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5ie6oj6cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5ed8tnjr67ulg8kcl334l1vunlobndhsbkaf1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c5ie6oj6cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z43e7dq3ecpvtrmtepv9lq1298ohgbrq8li8pad0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zonkkai20b4c53nvbbad6cjftrf7ep44136hf28o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or5cpgm9or2cpj649fg)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6053%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=uYuM%2fKy%2baHOkxLII6bsGIw&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62580%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PbioDRQZ0s%2fSsC1oDjGZ%2fQ&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62581%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MSsCLvyR0TQ4zoS6kZOIqQ&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62582%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jphdRuW9AfVQh34LkNTg2A&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

---

Hello,
A few weeks ago, we made the very hard decision to go up on TV a few weeks early against Chuck Grassley – even though we don’t technically have all the money in our budget to do so just yet.
We needed to introduce Admiral Mike Franken to Iowa voters before Grassley and McConnell’s Super PACs began burying us in lie-filled attack ads.
And our strategy is working: Chuck Grassley has been falling in the polls, and Mike has been surging – the latest poll shows us just three points behind Grassley!
But yesterday, we got the news that we knew was coming: **Chuck Grassley just launched his first massive TV ad buy attacking us!**
In order to expand our own ad buy and fight back, we’ve set an emergency rapid response fundraising goal of raising $50,000. But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. **The only way we’ll hit our goal and turn Iowa blue is if grassroot donors like you give now:**
[**Please, can Admiral Mike Franken count on you to give $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford – to help him defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45733417/347232660/-42398318?refcode=em20220525mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjFmMzhhYy00YWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KGk6HcOpdiqZetfMFouHAW3OwMY-9C82ecww2drPzbo=)

In order to expand our own ad buy and fight back, we’ve set an emergency rapid response fundraising goal of raising $50,000. But Mike’s not taking corporate PAC money. The only way we’ll hit our goal and turn Iowa blue is if grassroot donors like you give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re trending in the right direction, and we cannot let this stop our momentum. Thank you for whatever you’re able to chip in today, Julie Julie Stauch Campaign Manager Mike Franken for Iowa Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

This is exactly the kind of thing voters need as we near election day – an opportunity to get close and personal with the men and women vying to be your elected leaders.

A debate on the issues would be ideal, but we’ll see where the night goes.

**Will you be there?**

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:

**TIM BAXTER SLAMS CONGRESSMAN CHRIS PAPPAS' CALLS FOR MORE GUN CONTROL** **New Hampshire (May 25, 2022) -** In response to the tragic events at Robb Elementary in Uvalde, Texas where a mentally disturbed individual mindlessly murdered 19 children and two teachers, Congressman Chris Pappas used the tragedy to advocate for stricter gun laws. Congressional candidate Tim Baxter (NH-01) released the following statement, responding to Chris Pappas. _"Politicizing a senseless tragedy just to score cheap political points in an attempt to take away the rights of law-abiding Americans to defend themselves and their families is absolutely abhorrent._ _What happened at Robb Elementary yesterday was a tragedy. I agree with my opponent that more must be done to protect our children, but the Democrats' calls for more gun control have time and time again failed to make a difference. _ _I am proud to be endorsed by the National Association for Gun Rights because of my 100% Pro-Second Amendment voting record, and I will continue to fight for our right to defend ourselves and our children from future attacks."_ _###_ All media inquiries should be submitted to [press@BaxterForCongress.com](mailto:press@baxterforcongress.com)
---

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: We continue to fail our children.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martinlaunch]
Dear Peter,
Another elementary school. Another mass shooting. Another massacre. My heart breaks for the 21 families in Uvalde waking up this morning and continuing to live their worst nightmare. As I grieve for them, and for our country, I cannot help but feel outrage -- when is it enough? When will we prioritize the safety of our children over powerful, extremist interest groups?
We were overdue for action after the Sandy Hook massacre, and in the following decade, we’ve shirked our responsibility to enact meaningful change. We must not be held captive by political extremists and the gun lobby. We need Congress to pass federal background check requirements, close the Charleston loophole, and implement red flag laws.
Here in Tennessee, we have to stop Governor Lee’s radical, out-of-touch policies on firearms. Just last year, despite the pleas from business leaders, faith leaders, the TBI, police chiefs, sheriffs, and parents across this state, Governor Lee signed a bill to allow for permitless carry, eliminating decades-long practices of background checks and training requirements to carry a concealed weapon. Weeks later, he suggested carrying guns on airplanes should be permitted at the discretion of airline companies. Fellow Tennesseans, these actions are not those of a leader, but rather a politician who is more concerned about money and special interests than our children’s lives.
If Governor Bill Lee showed half the enthusiasm for smart gun policy that he does for regulating reproductive rights and school libraries, we would live in a safer world.
As the next Governor of Tennessee, I will work to repeal permitless carry and to further invest in violence intervention programs and mental health resources.
Our children cannot wait. Our families cannot wait. We cannot wait. It is time to put the safety of our families first and take action.
All the best,
Dr. Jason Martin

name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Humbled and honored
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m so grateful for all of your support in this race. Read more >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/dee25f798772f2f8/24479f35025ec52dc3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, I can’t begin to express my gratitude for every single person who has supported my campaign Congress, and especially to every single voter who cast their ballot for me. But the fight is not over. We are headed to the runoff on June 21st. The choice between me and Dale Strong could not be more stark. I'm depending on you to help spread the word to your family and friends.
---
---
We have a lot of work to do to get our great nation back on track, but we’re moving in the right direction. I’ve talked to voters from every walk of life during this campaign, and no matter where they stand, they all have one thing in common: They are sick of the leftist rule from Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. Now we have a critical call-to-action, and I need your help, Peter. There is a run-off election on June 21st, and we have to keep fighting to make sure my name is on the November ballot. **Please let your friends and family know that they need to go vote one more time in order to send a true conservative warrior to Congress to represent Alabama’s 5th District.**** ** Thank you again for your support. It’s because of patriots like you that I know our best days are still ahead of us. With gratitude,
Casey Wardynski
---

clean_body: I’m so grateful for all of your support in this race. Read more >>> | | | Peter, I can’t begin to express my gratitude for every single person who has supported my campaign Congress, and especially to every single voter who cast their ballot for me. But the fight is not over. We are headed to the runoff on June 21st. The choice between me and Dale Strong could not be more stark. I'm depending on you to help spread the word to your family and friends. We have a lot of work to do to get our great nation back on track, but we’re moving in the right direction. I’ve talked to voters from every walk of life during this campaign, and no matter where they stand, they all have one thing in common: They are sick of the leftist rule from Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. Now we have a critical call-to-action, and I need your help, Peter. There is a run-off election on June 21st, and we have to keep fighting to make sure my name is on the November ballot. Please let your friends and family know that they need to go vote one more time in order to send a true conservative warrior to Congress to represent Alabama’s 5th District. Thank you again for your support. It’s because of patriots like you that I know our best days are still ahead of us. With gratitude, Casey Wardynski id:2022-05-17-16:42:48:907t | | ---|--- | | PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS | |

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6054%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=XReJgUExiPIu5epYs0gjyA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62500%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ScJ%2fD3NZwBDNQ9VR0rQKhg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62501%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WYY8bnnMX1wRBCCJd5KxCw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62502%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eOsy%2bMKXVPNTxz7eptzhHg&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: I need your help to fire Liz Cheney
body:
Will you help me fire Liz Cheney?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6i9f3qp6e3vbefnjdkp4s1o7udco5f4ft0qu81o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t1k69r6atb0csqe0ojhcljr8pbgs2p7cpdn6mqeatdke5oj4t1me8qb7d316hg6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljcgrrco366jjjad77m2qmash5u)
this will be the most important race in the entire country... |
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to "bring it."

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign to FIRE Liz Cheney.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9nepdbrpgo2b93qu9tl1om4ojkk8a413t629r70_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdm0r2jjgan2offqigg4gkrd84du2ucejvi1oeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise millions for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a 60 Minutes interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney.

[**Will you help me stand up with an urgently needed donation today?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlcvki8ccr2k04ov4qs732biooovqu1s7mpesm2g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, l**et me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his socialists hate – they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party. . . and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know – like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was dupped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today? I'll be honest, her LIBERAL big money backers are putting millions of dollars into her campaign right. Without your help, I don't stand a chance.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjbmcfooobnb4v6f6tvuaeqjb7n8agf9cp6gt3so_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6044dm4crvcv6bacg16ibf75haf9s4ofeje2l8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming – and the _American_ people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need: yours.**

[**Will you make an donation today to show President Trump that you're still a part of his MAGA-America First Movement?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbfjf0ancf7s8oi68s9bqvqamvn3150e5u8e5rpg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze39b1ejbqhtc54bfknuimc110rjiugoop72bas8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something – this will be the most important race in the entire country – but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing for good.**

[**So please, won't you ensure that Liz Cheney bury me, a true conservative, with money from her swampy elite friends?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdpcpabr1gq9eu653s78lrcgjpjrgtehdl4nii0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znj5qh4vsi9ghb96ecd08l773917igtp0liak6r8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztcdn2d7ekfsn11upc6gv6s63vf6d6iqhg1v1ddg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

P.S.: It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more – will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhtvb5ucv70k6g0r74c2e7955a6qb5qogleulgo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)

[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg5tr32d78q8cpaeihll243o8t8k4fn6lc2euntg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg60oj0sjh2bs)

name: Victoria Virasingh
subject: No longer an “unimaginable” tragedy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Victoria for Congress
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_LOGO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_LOGO] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
The entire country was horrified by the news of the elementary school shooting in Uvalde, Texas. Yesterday, 19 innocent children and 2 educators who dedicated years of their lives to Robb Elementary School were senselessly killed.
Less than two weeks ago, I reached out to you about a shooting that happened in a Dallas hair salon. It is unfathomable that Texas has experienced yet another act of hate since then. We must end gun violence in the United States.
I cannot even begin to imagine the grief that the Uvalde community is experiencing right now. It will be forever changed by what has happened. My heart goes out to everybody touched by yesterday’s tragedy.
I know that we can do more than offer thoughts and prayers to Uvalde, and to every single American community that has been affected by the horrors of gun violence. We must call on our elected officials to make change: enact sensible gun laws, provide mental health services to every American, and invest in our communities so that this never happens again. No child or educator should ever fear for their safety at school and no parent should fear sending their child to school. This is no longer an “unimaginable” tragedy. This is becoming our reality and it needs to be stopped.
Victoria
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_headshot [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=responsibility_headshot]
EXPRESS DONATE to Victoria Virasingh for Congress
If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
$10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc&refcode2=EL10&express_lane=true&amount=10] $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc&refcode2=EL25&express_lane=true&amount=25] $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc&refcode2=EL50&express_lane=true&amount=50] $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc&refcode2=EL100&express_lane=true&amount=100]
Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=misc]

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last night, I hugged my son harder than usual before bed time, knowing there are 19 sets of parents in Uvalde, Texas who will never be able to hug their kids again.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45734941/347241189/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJmMTA4Ny01NGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEKzDmTtKdmlR2qf7OBm855gkcD6TGjIunEPONaKHbc=&emci=411fa8ab-43dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=0c2f1087-54dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Last night, I hugged my son harder than usual before bed time, knowing there are 19 sets of parents in Uvalde, Texas who will never be able to hug their kids again.

Everyone deserves the right to send their children to school, go to the grocery store, visit their place of worship, attend a concert without the fear of gun violence. We can't wait any longer to take action on the gun violence epidemic.

**As a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate, I will fight to end gun violence until my last breath.**

As State Treasurer, I divested the state’s pension from companies that make assault weapons for civilian purchase and I've been working to restrict sales and purchases of firearm kits, components, and accessories used to assemble undetectable "ghost guns." In Congress, I'll continue fighting to end gun violence by supporting common-sense legislation like universal background checks, a ban on assault weapons, and red flag laws.

I'm ready to do everything I can to ensure tragedies like Uvalde, Sandy Hook, and Parkland never happen again. Please join me in keeping the Uvalde community in your thoughts.

Thank you,

Seth

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45734942/347241190/-915500772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJmMTA4Ny01NGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEKzDmTtKdmlR2qf7OBm855gkcD6TGjIunEPONaKHbc=&emci=411fa8ab-43dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=0c2f1087-54dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45734943/347241192/-883321303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJmMTA4Ny01NGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEKzDmTtKdmlR2qf7OBm855gkcD6TGjIunEPONaKHbc=&emci=411fa8ab-43dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=0c2f1087-54dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45734944/347241194/-108087027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJmMTA4Ny01NGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEKzDmTtKdmlR2qf7OBm855gkcD6TGjIunEPONaKHbc=&emci=411fa8ab-43dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=0c2f1087-54dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15384964)

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Robb Elementary School Shooting
body:
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Twenty one irreplaceable people – 19 students and two school teachers – are dead in Texas this morning. Simply for choosing to wake up yesterday morning and go to school.
I am not inclined to apply the word “tragedy” to this situation, because that implies that Tuesday’s events were somehow unavoidable. Instead, let’s call this what it was – an act of mass murder, one in which our nation’s government was complicit through its refusal to act.
A country that proudly regards itself as a leader among free nations has, for nearly 20 years, lacked the common sense and sound judgment to restore a ban on assault weapons that expired nearly 20 years ago.
Or enact an outright ban on so-called “ghost guns.” Or ban high-capacity magazines which, coupled with assault weapons, serve no purpose other than to enable an assailant to murder as many people as possible, as quickly as possible.
For God’s sake, enough is enough. Our thoughts, prayers, tears and memorials will never bring back the precious souls who died at Robb Elementary School, just as they didn’t bring back the dead of Buffalo, Sandy Hook, Parkland, Columbine, Las Vegas, Orlando, Virginia Tech, Sutherland Springs and the many other places where a gunman took innocent lives for no reason.
We must make it abundantly clear that if Congress is unwilling to stand up to the National Rifle Association – and the most noxious elements of the far-right Republican base which values machine guns more than children – then we will elect new members of Congress. Until our leaders are willing to act as Americans and not as servile political hacks, or until we elect new leaders, then we will never live up to our country’s noblest aspirations.
As your next Governor, I promise to do my part and then some. I pledge to put at least one School Resource Officer per 250 people into every elementary, middle and high school in this state. A state that can afford to invest over $1 billion of taxpayer money to upgrade our baseball and football stadiums, and can allow one-third of our largest corporations to get away without paying taxes, can absolutely afford this modest investment in the lives of our children, teachers, staff and volunteers.
I will also commit to making a generational investment to improve the quality, affordability and accessibility of mental health services that are available to vulnerable Marylanders, at every single step of their journey. We will be better at diagnosing mental illness, providing in-person and remote therapy, hospital beds, outpatient care and prescription medicine to every single Marylander who needs help, at the moment they need help.
This is my solemn promise. We will do it because we have no other choice. As Marylanders and as Americans, we can no longer live and die like this.
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

Despite every attempt by the RINOs primarying me and Deep State Leftists trying to kick me off the ballot, the voters listened to my American First message and made me victorious in last night's primary election. But while we won that battle, now comes the war. Because I had to spend money to defend myself in the legal battle to keep me on the ballot while also fending off my RINO opponents, I'm in desperate need to fund my campaign for the general election. **[That's why I'm asking you to help me have the resources I need to defend my seat against my Leftist opponent with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463548:61n3QzoNC:m:1:3317145305:99AB5979AC14D4AFF309D3047F235634:r "That’s why I’m asking you to help me have the
resources I need to defend my seat against my Leftist opponent with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** My Leftist Democrat opponent, Marcus Flowers has raised over $8 million to defeat me. In fact, he outraised me 2-1 in the latest quarter! To say the knives are out for me is the understatement of the year. Funny how that happens when you stand up for freedom, call out Pelosi and the Squad for their Marxist policies, and stand with President Trump on his claims of a stolen election in 2020. I could have played it safe and kept my mouth shut. Been a good back-bencher and not rocked the boat. But that's not what I promised to do. I told the people I would stand for the truth. I would call out the lies. **And I kept my promise!** Because of that, Pelosi tried everything she could to keep me quiet. Whether it was kicking me off my committees or fining me thousands of dollars over my refusal to comply with her unjust Mask Mandate, I would not bow down to her, the media, or the Deep State cabal, and their march to socialism. **[But that has put a huge target on my back. And if I have any chance of fending off my Democrat challenger, I'm going to need you right by my side with your donation of $50, $100, or $250 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463548:61n3QzoNC:m:1:3317145305:99AB5979AC14D4AFF309D3047F235634:r "But
that has put a huge target on my back. And if I have any chance of fending off my Democrat challenger, I’m going to need you right by my side
with your donation of $50, $100, or $250 donation today.")** There's a red wave coming. But more importantly, there's an America First tsunami that's going to flood Congress with leaders like myself, Matt Gaetz, J.D. Vance, and other Trump allies. But that's only going to happen if you go all-in with your support today. **[I can't defeat my Dem opponent and remove Pelosi from the Speaker's Chair with just a $5 donation from you. I need you to dig deep. Can you chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463548:61n3QzoNC:m:1:3317145305:99AB5979AC14D4AFF309D3047F235634:r "I can’t defeat my Dem opponent and remove Pelosi from the
Speaker’s Chair with just a $5 donation from you. I need you to dig deep. Can you chip in $100, $500, or $1,000 today?")** Help me win this battle of the ages and show the RINOs, the Deep State, and the radical leftists that the people stand with me and our America First principles! **[Please act today and help me set a path towards a November victory!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463548:61n3QzoNC:m:1:3317145305:99AB5979AC14D4AFF309D3047F235634:r "Please act today and help me set a path towards a November
victory!")** Thank you. God Bless America.
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

body:
I’m humbled and honored to be your Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia! |
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38ace25eded547e6bacb2b27ed89814c&_e=be1-Q30C8MpZcQTsFMTA1j1Rv18vACUO-tpBdwI_8tMWE8Oz7nYGvkNAikhQXFo41fRHi_jv45O6dZf5z96krVZOylaxcYqmncBxVjqODEDamrPiKlbh12fMpoRYpbyndu0q--P-kgl5E6AtQ0z_nba-b60pv7h2_uauub5AH1oeCf6nAb9xc-Sc90AaalbIqcGDFqeFC37bOwK2sqJNxUEnFKsXUUUEj1YnabUfjOj9EFXPqNjh3rI85zOgsqThzz-TgPLa_0uTeR4QaEEVgeRTjVSUd3UsqE0Y8sWnFJwy4ytEDKCL65Msi8o1lFZaX7-iXwzcUAGg7LEwl-BZMS1bISOsn_P1acYdveel2pKgdrakzzWuD97lUOlE8Bh5NpOIOdvzhEQ6uN7fdJsC7vgg4GLTU9VRfwuWydiD2nxPeOiFnttdV6u8GLnRy3YzI7WOMmpNN0nhX0j2qdqNimZ7cNar6zgixtOx_pP25rg%3D)

Fellow American - thank you!

**Because of your support and the support of conservatives like you, Team Herschel won our primary election.**

_**I'm humbled and honored to be the Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia!**_

We're only at halftime, so there's still a lot of work left to do.

Fellow American, you know I'm not a politician. I don't look, sound, or dress like a politician.

But I LIKE _not being_ a politician! After all, politicians are making a mess of this country - _**but I'm here to help fix it!**_

Through my life experiences - winning a national championship with the University of Georgia, playing football in the NFL, and running successful businesses - I've learned that nothing worth doing is ever easy. I know this Senate race will be no different, but I am excited about the hard work that lies ahead.

There's so much at stake this year. As I've traveled around Georgia on the campaign trail, I've had the opportunity to speak with folks from all walks of life. Many are hurting and scared.

They can't afford food.
They can't pay for gas.
They're sick about what's happening in the schools.
They don't feel safe.
The America they know and love is slipping away. I am ready to be their voice and fight for them. **_They_ are the reason I entered this race. **

But we have an uphill climb, Fellow American.

Democrats and their Hollywood donors have poured tens of millions of dollars into Senator Raphael Warnock's campaign so they can continue their destruction.

In return, my opponent rubber stamps Joe Biden's policies and votes in lockstep with New York Senator Chuck Schumer!

Senator Warnock said in his tv ad that he can't fix Washington in one year. Well, he's not even trying. **His votes are destroying our economy and tearing our communities apart.**

**[Fellow American, have you had enough?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38ace25eded547e6bacb2b27ed89814c&_e=be1-Q30C8MpZcQTsFMTA1j1Rv18vACUO-tpBdwI_8tMWE8Oz7nYGvkNAikhQXFo41fRHi_jv45O6dZf5z96krVZOylaxcYqmncBxVjqODEDamrPiKlbh12fMpoRYpbyndu0q--P-kgl5E6AtQ0z_nba-b60pv7h2_uauub5AH1oeCf6nAb9xc-Sc90AaalbIqcGDFqeFC37bOwK2sqJNxUEnFKsXUUUEj1YnabUfjOj9EFXPqNjh3rI85zOgsqThzz-TgPLa_0uTeR4QaEEVge6ncxWo6R-ejCaUT_Q6IeNUpy-PcIn5otAg7QTwnwze91Hi5kQQp5Un7wByBSByVr9pCdiCjRdSaDH04V50UlSnE6V1zA9hfUbynAVtNb8gU3WU8AZPKobQdg2J64hZ0BjLrit9jKb6BjOo0eR3A51PvTqFL8-gLxvHHF21r6uw-BjUq_6q-2rOOWx0SnPZWMpeS1bjAEVb2TnhkQ_a9uQ%3D)** The cost of doing "more of the same" is too high, so we must win back the Senate majority if we want to put America back on the right track.

If are you ready to take back this Senate seat, I need to know you're with me. **[Can we count on you to send $5, $10, or even $34 right now?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38ace25eded547e6bacb2b27ed89814c&_e=be1-Q30C8MpZcQTsFMTA1j1Rv18vACUO-tpBdwI_8tMWE8Oz7nYGvkNAikhQXFo41fRHi_jv45O6dZf5z96krVZOylaxcYqmncBxVjqODEDamrPiKlbh12fMpoRYpbyndu0q--P-kgl5E6AtQ0z_nba-b60pv7h2_uauub5AH1oeCf6nAb9xc-Sc90AaalbIqcGDFqeFC37bOwK2sqJNxUEnFKsXUUUEj1YnabUfjOj9EFXPqNjh3rI85zOgsqThzz-TgPLa_0uTeR4QaEEVgTyMay_zF54-qBexMQKpzBjrGOb4PcD-HsloS3h1OyFNedruQVi_AnITAwNjsdg7p0W2iC81nrP-C4SEZ_LBXm88bUyepMgeBNXLsVbHoT9RNOpeMqnGY8K9Rtek2e-A1ubxIW1q3ykAy1cxJgJ8f7A5Mq95_bl1BeBSAT3R3P5-fu-fBMqkKkKnbNeKL-hs6pj1yJpRrkC07n6PoqR21zE%3D)**

We've got a tremendous amount of work to do. The future of this great country rests on our shoulders because the road to defeating the Biden agenda and winning back the Senate majority runs right through Georgia. **[In order to stop Biden, we have to defeat Warnock. Plain and simple.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38ace25eded547e6bacb2b27ed89814c&_e=be1-Q30C8MpZcQTsFMTA1j1Rv18vACUO-tpBdwI_8tMWE8Oz7nYGvkNAikhQXFo41fRHi_jv45O6dZf5z96krVZOylaxcYqmncBxVjqODEDamrPiKlbh12fMpoRYpbyndu0q--P-kgl5E6AtQ0z_nba-b60pv7h2_uauub5AH1oeCf6nAb9xc-Sc90AaalbIqcGDFqeFC37bOwK2sqJNxUEnFKsXUUUEj1YnabUfjOj9EFXPqNjh3rI85zOgsqThzz-TgPLa_0uTeR4QaEEVgRR3PYj2SVm476AGSZT9avGaIJ0O8PsCscNjLtDD6u33EyskmHeaM7qfaBMYayyKkAKfQ-AOD20-2Xnb1mcobnRyqBtn7bVuMwI9sna0GXWds-zShjvUvCk3nUTgtmlKxwcl73MLn2WtqSJTd70r3GFyWrub3YjDldjRzJBqPCmQXYPdgJc6b4hq2WxtaOqIZ5eYOTbFpi9FjbdtDU7O4rE%3D)**

Fellow American, let's do this!

On to Victory,

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=38ace25eded547e6bacb2b27ed89814c&_e=be1-Q30C8MpZcQTsFMTA1j1Rv18vACUO-tpBdwI_8tMWE8Oz7nYGvkNAikhQXFo41fRHi_jv45O6dZf5z96krVZOylaxcYqmncBxVjqODEDamrPiKlbh12fMpoRYpbyndu0q--P-kgl5E6AtQ0z_nba-b60pv7h2_uauub5AH1oeCf6nAb9xc-Sc90AaalbIqcGDFqeFC37bOwK2sqJNxUEnFKsXUUUEj1YnabUfjOj9EFXPqNjh3rI85zOgsqThzz-TgPLa_0uTeR4QaEEVgXooveb2Fi5p78Tz3t_8MSG9v6_Dw9ThXbiFafyhwR55OkN9nhCDA56TzZr85t2Ok1_l_an_TufY9KFY9m7qLZRabQJkwdq4wFu_WhVUCAucNt1n1tiAI2NeN-11KP3IxcI-zOzNl_mPZdjGr3mo-LMLlB4aSXqw52xM3_o3eRqFQzjTc4mTDBe_qfLJ3JdxEC_XhwB5C50vmnr1rK_YKV8%3D)

Dear Peter,
We've added new names to our sponsorship committee and want you on this list as well! The House and Senate Democrats are beyond grateful for the support we're receiving ahead of the 2022 election cycle.
We are confident in our plan on how to increase our numbers in the both chambers and we are excited to share this with you. Join us on Tuesday, June 7th and learn more. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejune7]
Contributions can be made payable to the House Democratic Caucus, Senate Democratic Caucus, or Tennessee Legislative Democrats PAC.
RSVP here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nashvillejune7]
-Chairman Vincent Dixie

This offer will not be available for long, and I want to make sure YOU don't miss out. I'm counting on you, Friend. I will check my updated member roster at midnight, and I can't wait to see your name at the TOP. Thank you, Donald J. name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: When will enough finally be enough?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Last week it was 10 innocent Americans in Buffalo, New York.

Yesterday it was 19 children and 2 adults in Uvalde, Texas.

There have been more mass shootings than days of the year. How many innocent lives must we lose before we see real policy change? How many children must die before we take action?

Gun violence is a public health crisis we cannot accept as a normal part of life. In Tennessee, 1,193 people are shot and killed with a gun every year on average. Firearms remain the second-leading cause of death for children and teens in the state. Black people in Tennessee are more than eight times as likely to die from gun homicide as white people.

Despite all this, our Republican supermajority in the legislature just passed a bill last year that makes it even easier to carry a gun. This NRA-written law enables legally eligible residents to carry handguns without going through any training or a background check. 93% of Tennessee voters – including 92% of Republicans and 91% of gun-owning households – support requiring a permit to carry a loaded handgun in public. Even law enforcement was opposed as it would put their officers at risk. Yet they passed permitless carry anyway.

It is far past time we had a government that represents the will of the people. We shouldn’t have to justify our need for safety while our legislature bends to the will of the gun lobby.

Thoughts and prayers have never been enough. We need action. We need policy. We need change.

In solidarity,

Tennessee Democratic Party

---

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A note from Gabby and me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Like me, like Gabby, you’re probably infuriated today.
For good reason.
It is infuriating that we’ve come to expect the federal government will do nothing to stop the murder of schoolchildren, or of mothers, fathers, sisters, and brothers at a grocery store — or any of the countless other horrific tragedies that have become so commonplace in our country.
Many of you know that my own family has been impacted by gun violence. I know how helpless it can feel, but I have no idea how it must feel to lose a child. That’s a pain no one should have to live through, but one that is felt by so many.
There are a million reasons why we should come together to pass common sense reforms to reduce gun violence that align with our rights and traditions. Reforms that are supported by Americans across the political spectrum. But we only need one:
Because it’s the right thing to do. For our children, and for our grandchildren, it is the right thing to do.
This is a problem unique to our country, and you’re right to demand action from Washington.
I promise you I will.
With you in this fight,
Mark + Gabby

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2897%2E6688874%2EB2b0cg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.
clean_body: Friends — Like me, like Gabby, you’re probably infuriated today. For good reason. It is infuriating that we’ve come to expect the federal government will do nothing to stop the murder of schoolchildren, or of mothers, fathers, sisters, and brothers at a grocery store — or any of the countless other horrific tragedies that have become so commonplace in our country. Many of you know that my own family has been impacted by gun violence. I know how helpless it can feel, but I have no idea how it must feel to lose a child. That’s a pain no one should have to live through, but one that is felt by so many. There are a million reasons why we should come together to pass common sense reforms to reduce gun violence that align with our rights and traditions. Reforms that are supported by Americans across the political spectrum. But we only need one: Because it’s the right thing to do. For our children, and for our grandchildren, it is the right thing to do. This is a problem unique to our country, and you’re right to demand action from Washington. I promise you I will. With you in this fight, Mark + Gabby Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Uvalde, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello – Nineteen children and two teachers are dead today as a result of another mass shooting. Another community will never be the same. I’m heartbroken for the children and their families. I’m praying for their loved ones and their community. Above all, I’m devastated that we as a country have allowed this to happen again. Our children should be safe in their communities. Schools, churches, grocery stores, movie theaters, spas, shopping malls — places that should feel safe — have become places of fear and tragedy. This cannot continue. We owe it to Uvalde, to Buffalo, and to so many more, to protect Americans from senseless acts of gun violence. Words are not enough to honor the victims and survivors. We can, and we must, take action. I promise you I am with you in this fight. With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Jane HOPE Hamilton
subject: Thank you for the journey of a lifetime!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Hope Hamilton for Congress
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends,
This is not the outcome we hoped for.
However, I feel immense pride in the campaign we ran. We were the underdogs -- over $3 million in super PAC money was spent suppressing our voices and movement.
It’s okay to feel disappointed; it’s okay to be frustrated – a countless number of you invested your time and money into this race. I want to thank all of you – our volunteers, the elected officials and community leaders who endorsed my candidacy, my staff, and my family who stood by me through this fight.
Our movement was rooted in community – it was rooted in the love and care we share as neighbors. It was a hard fight, but we must respect the results. Last night, I called to congratulate Jasmine Crockett on her being Congressional District 30's Democratic nominee.
To all of you who believed in our movement, I ask you not to lose HOPE . Take some time to rest, but remember we are all in this fight together, and we must stay in this fight. I’ve been in this fight for 23 years, and I am not leaving any time soon – because YOU deserve better .
May God bless you all , and may God bless Congressional District 30.
See you soon,
Jane HOPE Hamilton

But I’m not just sad – I’m FURIOUS. The GOP has consistently blocked life-saving gun safety legislation in exchange for NRA checks.

name: Vice President Pence
subject: RE: The Supreme Court decision
body:
We have a REAL possibility of overturning Roe.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo84mft85u4im9hibfohlm183rfdn8n0hi6rus5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb2elp7cpjksjj72dtgelp76odkehoefdtlc5hj4cdme9i6dcdimkp32olhe5g6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljcgrrcpb66jhb6o37m2qmash5u)

We have a REAL possibility of overturning _Roe_.
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zegc6g5s6b0j5bl1puhhhifg2q841pt6snfufhug_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Over 60 million innocent lives have been claimed by _Roe v. Wade_.
---
**Those are 60 million babies who never got to have their _first_ step, their _first_ word, or their _first_ hug.**
---
_But the leaked Supreme Court draft opinion reveals that we may soon be ending that dark chapter of American history._
---
Susan B. Anthony List has been paving the way for this historic moment, which is why I’m asking you to support them now that a reversal of _Roe_ appears imminent.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help SBA List keep fighting to OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1se9g89n3oq6b502q34c5tdrptndafgfs8drj0o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb18so9i8inkh2urng64eq4du1g5u7v4nsvaovd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs1l26lb965si703rh9repkg8psunte09m05r5ag_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z26uct1924mnlkpm267femolmrpv3a3hgsnrsgmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z87ve0cg1nd94nog6f3bsko63acfqvr95df896to_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm06odslva74lhd1u1qmmudntdgp08eufmg7rsj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8553m83qi0n6dqukjef8il57ss04utuib60svt0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1eq7e9kcuct734434h78jbff57vegdfmsrgcfeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)**
---
I’ve been a friend and ally of SBA List for many years.
---
SBA List has stood on the frontlines of our pro-life movement for decades with an unbelievable amount of resilience.
---
_Even when it seemed as though the Big Abortion Lobby’s control over our culture and laws was insurmountable, Marjorie and her team of dedicated pro-life activists like you never gave up._
---
But the truth is: how could we have given up?
---
Countless unborn children up until even 9 months in the womb needed us to keep fighting.
---
And after 49 years of death and despair and an absolute refusal to give up on the most vulnerable among us, _Roe v. Wade_ may finally be coming to an end.
---
But we cannot rest on our laurels yet. We must keep fighting until _Roe_ has been officially overturned in America.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help SBA List keep fighting to OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgiae12lg9rthkeach55fu1cjc1lm4lggv5ve2u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj6c1h2bs)
---
Thank you and God bless,
---

---
Vice President Mike Pence
On behalf of Susan B. Anthony List

name: Harriet Hageman
subject: Nancy Pelosi's favorite "Republican"
body:
Do you want to send Liz Cheney packing?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbspn2915kp19tl3qfdedk06f90c1ihmbot9p7bo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uerbadj46gpj3d1he4ob7cpj6qr77cli63h3cd5imko6bdtim1pjaotkmdindc37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shjcoorecr46upb4phks2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cpim0pb2c9h649fg)
Liz Cheney signed a multi-year deal with Team Pelosi |
Fellow Patriot,

In my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

So why is _Republican_ Liz Cheney playing on Nancy Pelosi's team?

Not only did she vote to impeach President Trump, praise Dr. Fauci, and slander Americans like you as a "danger" to our Democracy . . .

She's taken a leading role on Pelosi's Soviet-Style January 6th Commission!

[**This kind of betrayal cannot continue, which is why I hope you'll support my America First Primary Challenge against Liz Cheney with a $35 or more campaign contribution?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4lc5bb30ga759aimjho97ue9sn29dni8f7ogqvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

My name is Harriet Hageman and, unlike Liz Cheney – who lives in Northern Virginia – Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his radical Democrats hate – they run absolutely counter to the elitist values of Cheney and her establishment backers.

Unfortunately, it's those establishment backers – including Never-Trumpers at the Lincoln Project and NeoCons like John Bolton and John Boehner – who are now going all-in to keep Cheney in power.

Case in point, just a few weeks ago, Cheney held a ritzy fundraiser with Mitt Romney where she charged $10,000 a head for VIPs . . .

_On top of the nearly $5 million in campaign cash she's amassed from a steady stream of Never-Trumpers and Democrats!_

That's right – even the billionaire cousin of Far-Left Illinois Governor JB Pritzker shelled out $20,000 for Cheney!

**My friend, with the Never-Trump arm of the establishment working night and day to keep Cheney in power, I'm going to need patriots like you to keep my campaign to defeat her going.**

[**So please, won't you give an emergency $35, $50, $75, or $100 donation to my campaign so I can go dollar for dollar with her elitist backers?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmu9ohf16iqpm0e0gt6ememgb3qiqln2en69fseo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

It's unfortunately not hard to see why Democrats are teaming up with the establishment in taking Cheney's side.

Even before she voted to impeach President Trump on bogus charges in a sham hearing, she'd made it clear she sided with Big Government over _you_ .

Sure, she loves to go around appearing on CNN and _60 Minutes_ lecturing us about how "principled" she is, but there's nothing principled about betraying the 70% of Wyoming voters who voted for President Trump.

Nor is it "principled" to sit side-by-side with Nancy Pelosi in a Soviet-Style hearing that uses Big Government to punish conservatives as political prisoners!

My friend, there are dozens of issues Liz Cheney could be tackling instead of this sham January 6th commission.

She could be investigating Afghanistan and Joe Biden's incompetence.

She could be looking into Nancy Pelosi's spying on conservative representatives.

She could be questioning Dr. Fauci's dangerous Gain-of-Function research.

**But instead, she's scoring compliments from far-left anchors at CNN in her never-ending vendetta against President Trump and his supporters!**

[**There's no room in Wyoming, or the republican party for rabid anti-Trumpers who will sell out the constituents they represent for some positive press time from fake news stations like CNN, and I hope you'll help me.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvq9r8ivgmkipai4026kcb3rsqr9se27qkfitq0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

As I said, loyalty and freedom still mean something here in Wyoming. While DC might be full of back-door deals and shifting political winds, the men and women of my state value the Cowboy ethos and ethic of riding for the brand.

You see, back in the old West, Cowboys gave their promise to stay loyal to the people who hired them. To the people who paid them.

They made a choice to fight for the brand as it was one of their own, to keep their word to the brand, and to never betray it.

As a DC insider, Liz Cheney knows nothing about that, but I do.

My family put down roots on a ranch outside of Laramie 1879, where we've raised cattle ever since.

Out here, we have a strong work ethic and fierce independence, and we don't take kindly to Big Government Socialists like Nancy Pelosi trying to control us.

It's why I've spent my professional life as a lawyer battling Big Government and federal agencies trying to usurp our rights, and why I'll do it in Washington, too.

I'm also:
* 100% Pro-Life
* A strong supporter of our Second Amendment
* Totally and Completely Against Vaccine Mandates
* Believe in the need to fight for our Election Integrity
* A believer in our fight for election integrity
* Committed to government transparency and ending wasteful spending!

My friend, these are the issues conservatives need to put front and center: _Not_ joining Nancy Pelosi in some anti-American tribunal designed to persecute fellow Americans!

[**So please, would you consider giving a $35, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or $2,900 donation to my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney in the next 3 days?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc5ikrf21p2792jppuau7q8tsvfhte8sountgtj8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

As I told you earlier in this letter, Cheney has $5 million in campaign cash ready to bail her out in this race.

With each passing day more and more Democrats flock to her side, desperate to keep their war on President Trump and you going.

Because of that, I need your urgent financial support in the next 3 days.

Of course, if you can't quite afford to give $35 at this time, I understand

[**But know a gift of any amount lets me know you support my Trump-endorsed campaign against Cheney**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfh3v0ng3lsei68tc1g5st6m2tel1ghgfr44s0u0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs) **\--- and helps me crisscross the 97,914 square miles of Wyoming to talk to each and every voter in this state.**

My friend, I started by telling you how, out here in my home state of Wyoming, loyalty and freedom still mean something.

And even though you may not live here, I hope these values mean something to you, too. I look forward you your response. And I want to thank you for your support.

Respectfully,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5covpks4krdebrvrprkeldl0ij6pcrmhatk78sg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

PS: Remember – Democrat megadonors are shelling out tens of thousands for Liz Cheney. But while she has the support of Democrats and establishment career politicians like Mitt Romney, she doesn't speak for you and me.

[**Will you help me prove that by sending her packing with a $35 or more campaign donation to my primary challenge?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9hvigmseq2vkpr8ntgh9oluqdm9ak3ndq36qg78_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

[DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlbcv3gi5ilmq04jr7958p1klbojqi7nl2ikobd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)

---
| [ ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdh2mhl3rgphoi9gf58a060tkqjorfctu2f1uu50_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h2bs)
---

| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5j0m0uvvbekjqsrcumsgbacv6iqim190fuv17o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6aoj2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Will YOU join me?

body:
I want to have dinner with YOU | I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK...
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462881:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)
Patriot,

I just got out of a meeting with my team to discuss an upcoming dinner in NEW YORK, and I told them I wanted to invite YOU to join me.

This isn't any ordinary trip, Patriot. This will be an _EXCLUSIVE VIP dinner_ , and I can't think of anyone else I'd rather share this special evening with as my **GUEST OF HONOR** than _**YOU.**_

_My team will cover the cost of your flight, hotel, AND meal._

_All you have to do is contribute $25 or more, and you'll automatically be entered to win this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. _

**[Please contribute $25 by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to enter to win a trip to meet me and have dinner in NEW YORK.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462881:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462883:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462884:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $25>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462881:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60462885:6kUXkzomN:m:1:3299561967:A0ACB61736E9FCD92803A4CF5746E1BE:r)**

subject: The one thing we don’t get back

body:
I don’t know whether or not you’ve been keeping close tabs on my race, but I have to tell you that it all feels very real now that I have an opponent. We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ad5a8c80dc848d9ac005066121fa2ef&_e=f92FOIIR-ekJAAQWTzhxWEQ_gQZTL9g5caYYunaa_BxjHlMWjiq-MT-A7Ur9VipXHiKRE8DoQQqO_NbhN1dyEBjYwXeix0o3yaMf0jwnTDgXp5-0I1VSNjdk_G6DLKgLuymKHDaWvvVcc7LAAovBuEjsg5ju8mvREdSR9B15mZpLkE_uU0850dNFFmnyh4-3NsLcHeSIKp81v5tC9DKtOIKGBgbqAr_WOwejd8-LPbfYm9lE2wRNsO1EoCImAlhz3bzQyYS4rfxkRruTX_Tb1NVVlndFy8JRzUhnrkth0mZ4vPKBRx0TOha-vzKPyP9UcnbOEo9acpZWf5h71cop3ra-R8MHwFQ5THlhpz0p1EkNqpBm-jzvNArZjCGni5_XqTpKCLuP-o9wn7JuCYe12x8iK0Pznn-5I5b70gOfF2bLtmq57lAHNF0pQzFEgkzY)
