_
_ Peter,

The one thing that we don’t get back is time. And I know that for those of us on the campaign trail, that moniker rings true every single day. Month after month we set fundraising goals and some we hit, others we miss. The one thing I know is that **we’ve only just six left in the 2022 campaign.
**
**Wow.**

I don’t know whether or not you’ve been keeping close tabs on my race, but I have to tell you that it all feels very real now that I have an opponent. And well, _she’s about as far left as they come_.

Frankly, we’re in a time of political turmoil and upheaval and what America does not need is another **partisan hack** from the Left coast in Congress. We need a patriot who believes that while our country is certainly flawed, the best days of our republic are yet to come. I’m an eternal optimist and that’s definitely something I think we need more of in Congress: **Optimism.**

We’re not pacing how we need to be in order to hit our goal of raising $97,000 online this month. **[I am writing to ask if you might be able to chip in $5 right now so we have a shot at hitting our goal](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ad5a8c80dc848d9ac005066121fa2ef&_e=f92FOIIR-ekJAAQWTzhxWEQ_gQZTL9g5caYYunaa_BxjHlMWjiq-MT-A7Ur9VipXHiKRE8DoQQqO_NbhN1dyEBjYwXeix0o3yaMf0jwnTDgXp5-0I1VSNjdk_G6DLKgLuymKHDaWvvVcc7LAAovBuEjsg5ju8mvREdSR9B15mZpLkE_uU0850dNFFmnyh4-3NsLcHeSIKp81v5tC9DKtOBlccLUiCEvizAVClhJlsmX5gVe2PSPQgVFCIXQfX46at3_6q8NoaQNDBo_2w78J-dXRN5KKphJm1ITadW0KDB9T-DGZYwdAUQcuqBPGQOzZdNGsuAeMrwK0ineYuB8dFAf1IbB4gabUdTWxA7bEAWtq0ypUyj51XGE8RU_DX689kMjjDBh5ioemwWbtqsc1631R2t6ZfqRniU5Pgk5r-vBgObnI6aAIYow4QHMowyfxuZazKgAP1rxRDHDlw4NdDQ%3D%3D)** - 6 DAYS FROM TODAY! If you email box is anything like mine, then I know you’re getting 18 other emails like this on a daily basis – but how many of the people asking you for help can _**actually flip a Dem district Republican?**_

[** HELP ME REACH MY MAY GOAL ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=5ad5a8c80dc848d9ac005066121fa2ef&_e=f92FOIIR-ekJAAQWTzhxWEQ_gQZTL9g5caYYunaa_BxjHlMWjiq-MT-A7Ur9VipXHiKRE8DoQQqO_NbhN1dyEBjYwXeix0o3yaMf0jwnTDgXp5-0I1VSNjdk_G6DLKgLuymKHDaWvvVcc7LAAovBuEjsg5ju8mvREdSR9B15mZpLkE_uU0850dNFFmnyh4-3NsLcHeSIKp81v5tC9DKtOBlccLUiCEvizAVClhJlsmX5gVe2PSPQgVFCIXQfX46a38CyCMMCnILZcIZennVTYwf9BPRBtqCBkgVKHM-onvjmDUmgmupmZhsrHc7XsPuyuHzdK7vKIc-vMU69dw2-x5MLmCEgT3z3gHgk8nkNzTVZFqvoKQeIQO0O9aLHmvHvHTJ25I3lRdqoSCx2mK3pVBhg81NbX5HzfXwl0IbpaVAzCmB38jt5ztwfV4bz1rm91KlTr16oU4X9QRfRRaAI9Q%3D%3D)

name: Team WISGOP
subject: Are you ready?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
We need your help now more then ever

Friend -- This past weekend was the largest convention for the Wisconsin Republican Party in a decade and we could not have pulled this off without YOU, our grassroots supporters! The one thing we confirmed this weekend is the amount of people that **stand together in support of re-electing Senator Ron Johnson and DEFEATING Tony Evers is insurmountable for the radical left’s efforts.** We set a great precedent this weekend for what we need heading into the next several months, but we are not done. name: Giffords
subject: Uvalde, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
At this point, we know the feeling of heartbreak and horror all too well.
#

Friends --
At this point, we know the feeling of heartbreak and horror all too well. The massacre in Uvalde, Texas is a grave tragedy for our nation, the third deadliest school shooting in modern American history.
This must stop. We must stop this.
No gun law will prevent every shooting, but Congress knows full well the actions they can take to reduce gun violence while protecting people’s constitutional rights.
Some will say that now is not the right time to have this conversation, that now is not the right time for elected officials and the people they serve to call for action.
We have come to reject this notion. Every day since her shooting, Gabby has honored those hurt and killed alongside her by working to enact policies that will prevent others from experiencing that terrible pain.
So don’t let anyone tell you not to talk about action today.
Today is exactly the time to talk. To act.
Fighting for commonsense laws is not about politics, it’s about saving lives. For the corrupt politicians blocking reform, however, it is entirely about politics.
We cannot wait another day.
Because every day we fail to take action, we choose this fate. We tolerate politicians who fail to acknowledge this crisis and vote against our safety. We let the gun violence epidemic continue day after day.
This cycle has to end, but it will only happen when politicians in this country realize they have more to fear from you than they do the gun lobby.
Politicians have a choice: they can condemn us to many more days when we wake up to more carnage and lives lost — or if we make them, they will take us forward, toward a safer country.
At Giffords, we fight — every day — even when this issue is not leading the news, to make our communities safer from gun violence.
But Gabby cannot do this alone. She needs your help. She needs you to act. So please:
[**Can you please use this link to make a $3 contribution to Giffords PAC today to help us continue fighting for state and federal laws that make our communities safer from gun violence?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220525-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2050_3935704_dFeN3f&akid=2050%2E3935704%2EdFeN3f)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220525-1-15&t=22&refcode2=2050_3935704_dFeN3f&akid=2050%2E3935704%2EdFeN3f)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220525-1-15&t=23&refcode2=2050_3935704_dFeN3f&akid=2050%2E3935704%2EdFeN3f)**

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220525-1-15&t=25&refcode2=2050_3935704_dFeN3f&akid=2050%2E3935704%2EdFeN3f)**
---
****
Our hearts are with the victims and survivors. Our gratitude is with the first responders who brought yesterday’s shooting to an end. The question now is if we will find the courage to pass the laws we need to protect our children.
If Congress won’t act, then American voters must.
-- The team at Giffords
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22?refcode=em220525-1-15&t=26&refcode2=2050_3935704_dFeN3f&akid=2050%2E3935704%2EdFeN3f)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
* * *

[](https://www.runbetsyrun.com/?e=40b20d4397498f3af7dfb5987b4a98d3&utm_source=rbr&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20220524_e&n=1) | Hi Friend, Did you see the big news? Last week, former Democrat Governor Ted Kulongoski and former Republican U.S. Senator Gordon Smith endorsed Betsy. By endorsing Betsy, both Governor Kulongoski and Senator Smith are putting what’s best for Oregon ahead of extreme partisan politics. As Betsy says, you don’t have to leave the Democrat or Republican Party to join our campaign, you only have to want a better Oregon. | _One of us is a proud Democrat and one a proud Republican. First and foremost, we are Oregonians. But like so many others, we are worried about the state we love._ _From the homeless crisis to public safety, to our schools, and to the urban-rural divide, our next governor will have some big problems to solve. We are in complete agreement that Betsy Johnson is the best person to solve those problems. We have both worked with Betsy, and we know she has the courage, the common sense, and the ability to find common ground needed to get Oregon moving in the right direction.”_ **_\- Governor Ted Kulongoski (D) & U.S. Senator Gordon Smith (R)_**

name: Andy Barr
subject: Lessons I’ve learned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress Christopher E
body:
This email is a bit longer than normal, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing. |
_No longer want to receive emails from Andy Barr for Congress? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_s=2d034d100b04481b94d04fa1f1994914&_t=2nNITypu2jcKza8QmXaBxBemLbV85WulhCJlqIO9bkTquWkMGE1wVPXsGsdv7ZH88V67TimrpROEvQD6CArl70_5udSA_vn7hpVMQIC2kxW8lbdYkwASVUSy-I0LjgbVjF7WcS30dWGwKSkRImbIakRbZ6dLRYmAMCpZCKdK5H0%3D)._

[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2d034d100b04481b94d04fa1f1994914&_e=irKFtf3SIImDeErMkEWqdR3YWCCXL3b5ZVvmrEODZGQ3Wm9-fLbWqQZ3pxQHU7i0rh8jI3XMRqfBUrCw1i_E2NwUb1d7AYzZpp8w5TvjGSKVfcu3wFxzzA1UJyIhu17sghy7V4ZSPdEZNUxa_48lXuSjiCIr3tMGhA7lnwmqdVy3URHvb37uUoMkJyCcFwWugpgdyEV8pao9oGvwKn5ZON53FxiLz4lYVjV4rArtOMAtBZxf0KqTJCLGfjVNhJA4NLrVwSQbhN4xeCukWSXS1Bzzz2NnmWEc-_BKh-vZty9lfiOpMEzAKziXJDbWyuCAhC8MoIbhqmtJXpBjHlZ99c9OtKGgdMX8sok6iCkDwDD2Pdb1eUPTRmPD7076hY3vwuyeGpvhkHJygjbVHJa_VkRYsro9OVPDemhWFKBVsEoNF9jBiBLk4BnFTXFfEnKMJNDZM8ACLLHB9cdMwCiiow%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

When my colleagues see me coming, they joke and say, [**"there’s Barr, so it must be something about horses, bourbon, Toyota, coal, or the University of Kentucky!"**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2d034d100b04481b94d04fa1f1994914&_e=irKFtf3SIImDeErMkEWqdR3YWCCXL3b5ZVvmrEODZGQ3Wm9-fLbWqQZ3pxQHU7i0rh8jI3XMRqfBUrCw1i_E2NwUb1d7AYzZpp8w5TvjGSKVfcu3wFxzzA1UJyIhu17sghy7V4ZSPdEZNUxa_48lXuSjiCIr3tMGhA7lnwmqdVy3URHvb37uUoMkJyCcFwWugpgdyEV8pao9oGvwKn5ZON53FxiLz4lYVjV4rArtOMAtBZxf0KqTJCLGfjVNhJA4reKG62J6R-3OEEDcJDHcCDaeEHR_nhFVYQ9W4ZIl7vk2NE2FQRYKvu1r75BoRV8qJXbuRcjXpHm_KVBWeMCEBk8F_q4-d5Yu_AArWxZ_GasYLAEuWKG8sRJF2d8--nvyRew3NpejZ-VO1qSbDJKkOgCbQIfPbx7eRtFGqddI-V1BQ2fSDr_j4FZOgvMNKeWchwkTUHoy3ciPh7GcjR6rIA%3D%3D)

_And they’re not wrong..._ I bleed Kentucky through and through. It’s where my family has always been, it’s the place that shaped me into the man I am, and it’s the Commonwealth that I’ve been so blessed to represent in Congress.

Now, towards the end of this email, I’m going to request something from you, but first, I want you to understand who I am, how I became the man I am, and what I’m hoping for my future and the future of my daughters.

Growing up, my sister was diagnosed with juvenile arthritis. Our family had to come together to support her treatment. _This taught me that family is the most important thing, compassion is essential, struggle is inevitable, and perseverance is necessary._

It also showed me the need for high-quality, affordable and accessible healthcare for families - [**which continues to be a top issue for me in Congress.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2d034d100b04481b94d04fa1f1994914&_e=irKFtf3SIImDeErMkEWqdR3YWCCXL3b5ZVvmrEODZGQ3Wm9-fLbWqQZ3pxQHU7i0rh8jI3XMRqfBUrCw1i_E2NwUb1d7AYzZpp8w5TvjGSKVfcu3wFxzzA1UJyIhu17sghy7V4ZSPdEZNUxa_48lXuSjiCIr3tMGhA7lnwmqdVy3URHvb37uUoMkJyCcFwWugpgdyEV8pao9oGvwKn5ZON53FxiLz4lYVjV4rArtOMAtBZxf0KqTJCLGfjVNhJA4wEXvkMGlBoxKJlJTJpPuPUSbOXWDO8nrriU0IBp-sGPDf6sEOmoJ-9sGSwM7XfNNzMnC0ou29pSEQ9_R0WyEgC2Nna80F5nW6tHJ2yjGshMjMP1Dz988NM0UNOQ9v4ngyDzbdg6E37dFHjFa0dfhpWb2LsOM_i5Mc-i80axIDtgFinmNejlgC1szSDD5L_W6FR6smbrfGMG5N1BCIKbJ0A%3D%3D)

My love for Kentucky met my interest in politics when I first interned in Washington in college. The ability to work on and fight for legislative policies that helped conservative causes was so rewarding.

Ultimately, I took a chance and ran for Congress in my hometown of Lexington against an incumbent Democrat and lost by 647 votes in one of the closest races in the country. But I recalled the lessons I learned as a child, and I persevered. Two years later I ran again and I was elected. [**Since being in Congress, I’ve fought hard for issues that actually matter to families like tax cuts, American energy, and affordable, high-quality healthcare options.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=2d034d100b04481b94d04fa1f1994914&_e=irKFtf3SIImDeErMkEWqdR3YWCCXL3b5ZVvmrEODZGQ3Wm9-fLbWqQZ3pxQHU7i0rh8jI3XMRqfBUrCw1i_E2NwUb1d7AYzZpp8w5TvjGSKVfcu3wFxzzA1UJyIhu17sghy7V4ZSPdEZNUxa_48lXuSjiCIr3tMGhA7lnwmqdVy3URHvb37uUoMkJyCcFwWugpgdyEV8pao9oGvwKn5ZON53FxiLz4lYVjV4rArtOMAtBZxf0KqTJCLGfjVNhJA4bpZeCaYH5sl5comOrnPFCQZhz8e3hY98bFJkTWVW4ZvO2fkx6bvTRZbt2MpI7c3QSaBLiFNUZK2a2bKZ6h5QPPwZFwlcJyozH5LkBVa9iNiBh6smIOwhUXd4Jee3n4df8eghTHvRYdW-eytxIwQJMLRJc-FByGdpHe4BCc9nBeupdXzX5ON3cnmF0bDJmJgXi4olj6ORVCKRgAk4Yhyv9g%3D%3D)

As the father of two young girls, I’ve tried to instill in my daughters the same lessons that my parents taught me as a child: compassion, perseverance, and determination.

clean_body: This email is a bit longer than normal, so I hope you’ll read the whole thing. | No longer want to receive emails from Andy Barr for Congress? You may . Peter, When my colleagues see me coming, they joke and say, And they’re not wrong... I bleed Kentucky through and through. It’s where my family has always been, it’s the place that shaped me into the man I am, and it’s the Commonwealth that I’ve been so blessed to represent in Congress. Now, towards the end of this email, I’m going to request something from you, but first, I want you to understand who I am, how I became the man I am, and what I’m hoping for my future and the future of my daughters. Growing up, my sister was diagnosed with juvenile arthritis. Our family had to come together to support her treatment. This taught me that family is the most important thing, compassion is essential, struggle is inevitable, and perseverance is necessary. It also showed me the need for high-quality, affordable and accessible healthcare for families - My love for Kentucky met my interest in politics when I first interned in Washington in college. The ability to work on and fight for legislative policies that helped conservative causes was so rewarding. Ultimately, I took a chance and ran for Congress in my hometown of Lexington against an incumbent Democrat and lost by 647 votes in one of the closest races in the country. But I recalled the lessons I learned as a child, and I persevered. Two years later I ran again and I was elected. As the father of two young girls, I’ve tried to instill in my daughters the same lessons that my parents taught me as a child: compassion, perseverance, and determination. I take my role as a father very seriously, as do I take my commitment to Kentucky and to America. Open borders, a failing economy, a massive energy crisis, un-elected bureaucrats ruling our Nation, suppression of free speech... This is not the country I want to pass on to my children. Thank you for reading this far, I wanted to tell you more about me and my WHY. Why day in and day out I’m working towards a better future for all of us. Now, I have an important ask for you. But it is simple: I know better than anyone, that struggle is inevitable - that we are all bound to face it. But the struggles that you are dealing with because of self-serving Democrats in Washington is a choice, one made by those who don’t care about you. I have a commitment to my family, to Kentucky, and to this country to give the next generation a chance at a future, not to hand down a bunch of crises. I’ll leave you with this: we as individuals decide how to react to our circumstances. Despite everything, I continue to have hope. Today, I hope that you will take action, that you will stand up and say enough is enough. God bless, Andy Barr | MEET ANDY Andy Barr ran for Congress for a cause - to save America from bankruptcy, restore the American Dream and keep the American people safe and secure. Andy has never stopped fighting for these principles. Now more than ever, it is critical for central and eastern Kentuckians to have a strong, proven, and accountable leader representing them in Congress. | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Andy Barr for Congress Christopher E. Anderson, C.P.A., Treasurer** Mailing Address: P.O. Box 2059 Lexington, KY 40588

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45737180/347251695/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjYwMzExOC02MWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJKate4CXix9XVwjLU5zol5BfD7kMmYOotX_oAlbmnE=)
Peter, my heart is breaking for every parent, family and community member in Uvalde today.

When Cynthia and I drop our two young children at school, we always wonder if this will be the last time we see them — it’s exhausting, and it must end.

**We must pass gun safety reform NOW. As a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate, I’m committed to making this a priority in Congress.**

But unfortunately, my Manchin clone opponent disagrees. He has a long history of not delivering for California in this critical fight.

Courage Score, an organization dedicated to holding representatives accountable, gave him an F rating! And here’s why:
* Voted _against_ raising the minimum age to purchase a gun to 21,
* Voted _against_ outlawing open‐carry in most places,
* Voted _against_ making school zones truly gun‐free,
* Voted _against_ a measure that rejects concealed carry permits from other states.

**Frankly, this is unacceptable — and far from the leadership we need at this defining moment.**

[**_When I’m in Congress, I won’t falter in the face of opposition from MAGA Republicans and moderate Democrats on this issue. Friend, we won’t have a better opportunity to take back the house and fire Nancy Pelosi. **But that doesn’t mean this will be a walk in the park. ** Pelosi and her dark money PACs will spend whatever it takes to keep me out of Congress and their socialist agenda alive. **_[I’m calling on patriots from across the country to chip in $5 to help flip these 5 must-win seats this November - Friend, can I count on you to help make history? ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfjfm2t165fd37mvdp3rvskc7lbldso4jh684ogg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)_** _[**CHIP IN $5 >>> FLIP 5**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zme657tkevter5kk9fanupcunjdgl7cpfuo9jhe8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)_ _Friend, here’s why I know I can lead when we take back the House this November:_
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z76nu7l1aen948v5j9e582db29dgk748avrph880_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)
---
| After 8 years of service as a U.S. Army Apache pilot, I returned home to my community to run the company that my dad started - an automotive supply-chain company. I worked hard, created good-paying American jobs, met the love of my life — my wife Liz — and started a family. But I couldn’t remain on the sidelines. Even though my military career was over, I felt like I had more to give. I wanted to continue to serve the country and my community in any way that I could.
---
| | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrvc87vi7nr8a238v2jlotppoen38ubcch281k5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7f68l269nq8gn5k8l16m2kb7mqbeeg2rob5cm60_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)
---
| | _I never envisioned myself as a politician. _ But after watching Washington fail to deliver on promises for decades, I decided that I had to take action. I couldn’t let hardworking Michigan families be held back while career politicians fought for their own careers instead of their communities. I want to grow our economies back home, not continue growing Washington's. It’s time to get our tax dollars out of the hands of Washington politicians and back in our communities where they can make the biggest impact. I hope you choose to become an OFFICIAL supporter of my campaign by making an immediate donation now: **_[https://secure.winred.com/john-james-for-michigan/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi6e76pit9s9k3u3l9tbnklb1ulh95sbh00fhaag_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)_**
---
[**FUEL THE FIGHT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0g47ml25t1ecgec2ilq8fl0lbltfa4csp9jc8po_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg6eo34cdh2bs)

Thank you for your time, John James

name: Vice President Pence
subject: The Supreme Court decision
body:
We have a REAL possibility of overturning Roe. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6066%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=JvecHhAftJ26NOl%2fxMeQ9Q&sysid=1)

We have a REAL possibility of overturning _Roe_.
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CvqRiwsSQxDVNzSTURNeRQ&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
Over 60 million innocent lives have been claimed by _Roe v. Wade_.
---
**Those are 60 million babies who never got to have their _first_ step, their _first_ word, or their _first_ hug.**
---
_But the leaked Supreme Court draft opinion reveals that we may soon be ending that dark chapter of American history._
---
Susan B. Anthony List has been paving the way for this historic moment, which is why I’m asking you to support them now that a reversal of _Roe_ appears imminent.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help SBA List keep fighting to OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AiHajVgHqOEWj3H2pgk97A&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CvqRiwsSQxDVNzSTURNeRQ&sysid=1)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62523%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NM9dw9IddlCVdBTdX3X1UQ&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62524%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hmEnEpg2Uf9rA%2bGGphac%2bQ&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62535%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XDB7rj2Tz1AKUuDbfyUn2A&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62536%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LIfcCPgNvaGfdRnDaxcJ3w&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62537%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cxJYXYw%2bw%2b45vFY2f3Av8A&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62538%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W%2ba%2be6Lm5z6Ova%2f3BsQgOA&sysid=1)**
---
I’ve been a friend and ally of SBA List for many years.
---
SBA List has stood on the frontlines of our pro-life movement for decades with an unbelievable amount of resilience.
---
_Even when it seemed as though the Big Abortion Lobby’s control over our culture and laws was insurmountable, Marjorie and her team of dedicated pro-life activists like you never gave up._
---
But the truth is: how could we have given up?
---
Countless unborn children up until even 9 months in the womb needed us to keep fighting.
---
And after 49 years of death and despair and an absolute refusal to give up on the most vulnerable among us, _Roe v. Wade_ may finally be coming to an end.
---
But we cannot rest on our laurels yet. We must keep fighting until _Roe_ has been officially overturned in America.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help SBA List keep fighting to OVERTURN _Roe v. Wade_.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62539%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iDzuPqSaDX4WM36aInYBiw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you and God bless,
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CvqRiwsSQxDVNzSTURNeRQ&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CvqRiwsSQxDVNzSTURNeRQ&sysid=1)
---
Vice President Mike Pence
On behalf of Susan B. Anthony List
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---
Susan B. Anthony List (SBA List) is a nonprofit 501(c)(4) membership organization. With your gift of $25 or more you will become a Sustaining Member of SBA List, and will receive information regarding the special benefits of your annual membership. Your contribution, which is not required to be publicly disclosed and is not deductible as a charitable contribution for federal income tax purposes, will be used for pro-life advocacy and social welfare activities in accordance with the mission and purposes of SBA List, at the discretion of its board of directors and officers. If you would like to make a directed contribution to support a particular project, please contact us. Although SBA List periodically uses its general treasury funds to engage on important political matters, the organization does not accept funds earmarked for independent expenditure activity or designated for other political purposes in support or opposition to federal candidates.
---

subject: Nice to meet you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
John asked me to write to you. My name is Sable — I run our campaign’s voter mobilization program.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45737458/347253088/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&&&&&&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_campaign=20220525&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&utm_term=SF_S1_C1&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&&amount=25&&&&refcode2=2b4348e1-63dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode2=2b4348e1-63dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQzNDhlMS02M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIJ9nM5G6PpXTSQ9u5rHdJsUm072wJXKrEjNAR1lKTs=)
---
Hi, Peter! John asked me to write to you. My name is Sable — I run our campaign’s voter mobilization program. I’m a proud Marylander from Prince George’s County, and I’m an organizer committed to moving my state toward a more equitable and diverse future by electing John King as Maryland’s first Black Governor. But here’s the deal. **In just 13 days, John faces a critical test: our biggest public fundraising deadline to-date.** On June 7th, our campaign is required to publicly file our fundraising numbers with the Maryland Board of Elections. That means, everyone – from our opponents to reporters to undecided voters – will see how much we’ve raised. So if we want to make history and elect Maryland’s first Black governor, I need your help to show all those folks we have what it takes to win. Please do what you can to help our efforts by making a contribution here>> _**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_siri_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45737459/347253089/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220525&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=SF_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=2b4348e1-63dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQzNDhlMS02M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIJ9nM5G6PpXTSQ9u5rHdJsUm072wJXKrEjNAR1lKTs=)**_ If you aren’t ready to commit at this moment, let me explain why this deadline is SO critical:
1. It’s the biggest public fundraising deadline of this primary.
2. We’re 43 days out from the start of early voting.
3. Our team doesn’t like to talk about it, but our biggest weakness right now is pure name recognition.
4. This race is going to come down to turnout so we need the resources to up our TV and digital ads immediately in order to get John and our message in front of as many Marylanders as we can over the next 8 weeks.

As one of the people on this team overseeing our voter outreach, I can assure you every dollar you give to John’s campaign will be put to immediate use in the most effective way possible. So with that in mind, I’m not going to ask you to contribute but instead ask: **how much can you invest to make John the first Black Governor in my home state?** _**[Donate $7.19 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45737460/347253090/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220525-b2_fr_full-SF_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220525&&&&utm_content=b2_fr_full&&&&utm_term=SF_S1_C1&&&&amount=7.19&refcode2=2b4348e1-63dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjQzNDhlMS02M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sIJ9nM5G6PpXTSQ9u5rHdJsUm072wJXKrEjNAR1lKTs=)**_ clean_body: John asked me to write to you. My name is Sable — I run our campaign’s voter mobilization program. | = Hi, Peter! John asked me to write to you. My name is Sable — I run our campaign’s voter mobilization program. I’m a proud Marylander from Prince George’s County, and I’m an organizer committed to moving my state toward a more equitable and diverse future by electing John King as Maryland’s first Black Governor. But here’s the deal. In just 13 days, John faces a critical test: our biggest public fundraising deadline to-date. On June 7th, our campaign is required to publicly file our fundraising numbers with the Maryland Board of Elections. That means, everyone – from our opponents to reporters to undecided voters – will see how much we’ve raised. So if we want to make history and elect Maryland’s first Black governor, I need your help to show all those folks we have what it takes to win. Please do what you can to help our efforts by making a contribution here>> = If you aren’t ready to commit at this moment, let me explain why this deadline is SO critical: 1. It’s the biggest public fundraising deadline of this primary. 2. We’re 43 days out from the start of early voting. 3. Our team doesn’t like to talk about it, but our biggest weakness right now is pure name recognition. 4. This race is going to come down to turnout so we need the resources to up our TV and digital ads immediately in order to get John and our message in front of as many Marylanders as we can over the next 8 weeks. As one of the people on this team overseeing our voter outreach, I can assure you every dollar you give to John’s campaign will be put to immediate use in the most effective way possible. So with that in mind, I’m not going to ask you to contribute but instead ask: how much can you invest to make John the first Black Governor in my home state? = = = = = = = Thanks, Sable Frazier Mobilization Manager - John King for Governor = * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178, or visit our _. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: America needs more Green Berets
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=e79a144e3e104f5ca76d564212e79d89&_e=mmJJonFNziB1SnIo6sq1k0bz-LlfkxbQmYi0Am9kK5un-_QcO4cDc2RZLbxvBGxNjVoIKvjGusyDVFYa6Dha21D6EsUrS7-ZI0b8kuVHluOnaoWCA-rPVJ3LIAEVsBt28ui0SUtTrQpcOi18y78J23OQK8VkmSNvXujtZn_OJ_M_Tg1-3bMj5vONJyrnmAAZeB1BmCIEOweCYTmMEd82Lp5Gs0YzXsDvh8cxR72U7ef1lqVeZsb2lr3MnXguZ2u8MYr2SHpns86AXIeX5npLFYFuvPa8_uNYA8jKTOSh3R34o7UcrI6WKx_RNAqgj09mm54-5AqGcp0ymhiWuJ45zeUOxSj5tVEHq903Ke1zw5F6VA3xthWkam3R7fdvOxpilXCKQ3GTZ5_8D_cZvkM7GA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, Afghanistan. Ukraine. Communist China. Global terrorism.

Right now, we need leaders who will hold Joe Biden accountable and stop global catastrophes before they happen.

**America’s Green Berets were willing to die for the flag, and in Congress, we’ll roll up our sleeves and get to work to keep the country we love safe.**

Right now, I’m the _only_ Green Beret in Congress. **But I know that Pat Harrigan will change that.**

Pat put his life on the line for our country as a Green Beret in Afghanistan, and he’s ready to bring the same ethos of valor, patriotism, and service to Congress.

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Afghanistan. Ukraine. Communist China. Global terrorism. Right now, we need leaders who will hold Joe Biden accountable and stop global catastrophes before they happen. America’s Green Berets were willing to die for the flag, and in Congress, we’ll roll up our sleeves and get to work to keep the country we love safe. Right now, I’m the only Green Beret in Congress. But I know that Pat Harrigan will change that. Pat put his life on the line for our country as a Green Beret in Afghanistan, and he’s ready to bring the same ethos of valor, patriotism, and service to Congress. Pat Harrigan knows what it means to put service before self, Fellow American. We have too many self-interested career politicians in Washington who put fame and fortune above their duty to hardworking Americans like you. But Pat and I say enough is enough. It’s time for leaders who treat their roles as an honor and a privilege, not a star-studded career. America needs Green Berets, and Pat Harrigan is up for the challenge. In Service, Col. body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=36f2811915&e=f9133ea432)
---
| Hi,

I want to take a moment and thank you for all you've done for the campaign. We have lots of momentum, but we need to make it past June 7th!

As you know ballots are arriving in the mail and we need your vote.

Right now this is crucial: Every vote matters.

I've heard from many people who said their vote doesn't matter. Nothing could be farther than the truth.

In fact, they are winning if they can get voters to think like that.

But here's the good news: only 2 candidates advance to the General Election in November!

That's right. Gavin Newsom and I will face off in November when I make it through the June Primary.

So please help spread the word; we have a shot at winning and turning California around.

Thank you!

\- Senator Brian Dahle

P.S. Can you help us out by forwarding this email to anyone you may know who is looking for the answer to get California to get back on track? Together, we can win.

---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: My heart is breaking for the students, teachers, and families in Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
My heart is breaking for the students, teachers, and families in Uvalde reeling from another tragic school shooting, this time at an elementary school. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45731511/347224831/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjkxNTNjNy00M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lOweD-V6jIJuWUH6NLjkyov7D0tO_4vxD-pSxycUQQo=&emci=0313736b-2edc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=df9153c7-43dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

My heart is breaking for the students, teachers, and families in Uvalde reeling from another tragic school shooting, this time at an elementary school.

It is tragic that children in this country – and their parents – have to wonder whether they are safe at school.

My husband and I send our son to school every day confident that he'll be safe. But days like today - and there are far too many of them in this country - shake that confidence. As a mom and a pediatrician, this hits way too close to home.

It has been ten years since the horrifying massacre of first graders at Sandy Hook Elementary, in Newtown, Connecticut shattered hearts across this nation. And because of inaction in the Senate, we still don’t have universal background checks for gun ownership, federal red flag laws to keep guns out of the hands of people perceived to be a danger to others, or even policies to ensure that children cannot get access to firearms. The House has acted. Now the Senate must take action.

It is long past time for our country to take common-sense steps that can help prevent tragedies like Sandy Hook, Parkland, and Uvalde from happening again.

I am committed to addressing our gun violence crisis, and I won't stop until every child feels safe at school, and every parent knows their child is safe. Please keep these families and the greater Uvalde community in your prayers.

Thank you,

Dr. Kim Schrier

| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---
Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.

Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
PO Box 2728
Issaquah, WA 98027
United States

name: Jon Kaiman
subject: Gun Violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/UOLla8jnFFaonFfuMw7lI7ktWltPOPmtnJAmA5b1Uww=/ZuQf2PP8qG928pabddoGRlQWYMXTLg2igT1xdT6fKlE=)
Peter,
We are all tired of hearing the same platitudes of sympathy and prayer each time we hear about another shooting.
When will it be enough? There are too many members of Congress who care more about the shooters right to buy an AR-15 military style weapon of destruction than they do about the innocent victims who were murdered in Buffalo and Texas.
We must:
* Ban assault weapons.
* Raise the age to 21 for any and all hand guns.
* Require extensive background checks for everyone.
* Make gun buyers watch a video of a mass shooting, one in which an armed officer or guard doesn't stop the shooter.
* Close all gun show loopholes.

Let's stop gun violence now. Let's speak up. Let's work together.
\- Jon Kaiman

Paid for by Jon Kaiman for Congress
---
Jon Kaiman for Congress
P.O. Box 222061
Great Neck NY 11022 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/UOLla8jnFFaonFfuMw7lI7ktWltPOPmtnJAmA5b1Uww=/55bcBr7AlcmnZd_eOOZepVK_LDV70yc9RLNoybuEnVY=).

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn9hkl9un0fg1bkkn2irjfstq1e0oq9unfqlfk40_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcc5pf48k6jbi4he67gso4srj6k84oiueq44f06g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6l67ritbr9nsihrfvdqbubj4u0lb68iajl0dsi0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqe1tdv9h93jgkvgocv98nt15cbv6lkca31rtci0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zktn259a854noa2r6hai31hhjmfm4srajqjq4a00_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za38s5smm3oojr95hcpvgh9tof6ncsei1t8heaeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zklnp7n445jboq0og5ikapemg6d0e2lvlu4gprfo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrk6l0rjf5epitollrhaq91qu3t01jvm73qva75o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdk9671ok0g4bek9riibluvo4qkpt9utkjno9n50_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0pab0fir01qtb5tna1lfmuii415rr8ih2d95cn0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7cgakd2e15ivr1clhnk788q7518pmnv66i0ol10_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg61o71c9h2bs)
---
|
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Friend,

Did you follow last night's primary elections?

**Republicans _dominated_ Democrats in voter turnout** \- and four states have chosen their GOP nominee for Attorney General to take on the far-left in November.

| Attorneys General Steve Marshall of Alabama, Chris Carr of Georgia and Ken Paxton of Texas have fought courageously against the Biden Administration's lawless liberal agenda - _leading the charge to secure our Southern Border, protect our elections and reign in Big Tech._

Arkansas Republicans nominated Tim Griffin to serve as their next Attorney General, a proven conservative and former U.S. Attorney who will tirelessly defend our constitutional freedoms.

**Friend, Republican Attorneys General are the last line of defense against Joe Biden's federal overreach,_and they need your support ahead of this November's midterm elections._**

As Joe Biden and Democrats across America continue to undermine our nation's most fundamental values, you can count on Republican Attorneys General to stand strong for liberty and the Rule of Law.

_**Can they count on you to have their backs this November?**_

name: Gary Sinise
subject: Most don't know this about Memorial Day
body:
This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zknrtqclbifi3r4mlc5mevl3n7paodi0k73f9vi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfeodn61p76tblecq6ccpkm5h72pb1edo78srje5j7ep3kseor6tr662qm6ttimsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5cr46ur62pjheipmcdtgmlin49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuch6n9jl1a6r98liv1uh28424ird6vdgakibgng_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9l0d5hhqe8vlo2n7i198hjrpjgolv9scl4usmoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zouj2ie4d4cindbga0grcqbehobfgpifcm9ofiv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zimgfqq82ftv5br5hqbd0i18nhql941e2nb3bb20_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9flv0tff6p5g3v74vcht4doh26f8c01dngoh978_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr51sk20ln0j69bbr88kpi5fglrf679cpr525ng0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrd53bfefgk5ofg7fin8dhbd5sp1qp33n5k5de3g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2f9u6qf6j5sotpc2smhthc3egih5bv0or3849n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8oafb584p4ihjf0b4ohgsuk87vn9osmsa25k3a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3fmb6bp2gq69j75ac3bg3s1e3lgausc8c14kpjo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcalatss7436fpll86uifr64demkh9dgojcvjvkg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn0gjkon4u8oeiol69o66ie8bgfdtaf9d9nsufp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6clg69pr4cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Peter –
We’re still waiting for the final results of yesterday’s election. Right now, it looks like we’re going to a runoff election on June 21st.
You and I both know that Wade is the best candidate to take on Buddy Carter in November and we need to shift our complete focus to this runoff election to get Wade on the ballot this fall.
We could not have gotten this far without you, but we have a bit further to go to secure the nomination and put Wade on the path to November.
Stay tuned for more updates soon,
Nick Savas
Wade Herring Campaign Manager

[The American Conservative](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=7031359999834e3589195f04931d2373&_e=rBaWmgPQ-dZ5WnsCwcBKX5x_Re3s7fMx2DKdMVuTbnGym74Bb1QZ2xqT3BBPsgz-D8XLZsiFtI5CqHfmPulMFXkQqv0RuRbEKRe1uehwBprHK0iV_mbQ8RyhOusJl5OYSG3ztZ6q9cru4bdDJDFcD7AceliQtAtcWOzn5HP2CbttSA7gb25xlCpcovwM-LNYs4VDBFkt4f1-huHsf5GEHWbPFenENENkmjEvk0RW3EtXmlD0Ev89asUHXOsil9h-yD4JETTHaN06z3YQ2Az10sK1-sUMxCCUIyMP8ORxbp8I3iAC4-pcNsqBu41B4yWEKbr3dtVBErWvsdOq2UzN6iUs7FMBpNkNOS14ND7cRpymJ58eeOTnCMGzS5IgrOm2)

"A letter that Salvatore Cordileone, the Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco, sent to Nancy Pelosi:

To the Speaker of the House of Representatives of the United States Congress Nancy Pelosi

The Second Vatican Council, in its Decree on the Church in the Modem World, Gaudium et spes, reiterated the Church’s ancient and consistent teaching that “from the first moment of conception life must be guarded with the greatest care while abortion and infanticide are unspeakable crimes” (n. 51). Christians have, indeed, always upheld the dignity of human life in every stage, especially the most vulnerable, beginning with life in the womb. His Holiness, Pope Francis, in keeping with his predecessors, has likewise been quite clear and emphatic in teaching on the dignity of human life in the womb."

name: David and Ian
subject: A reflection on the tragedy in Uvalde
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Time and time again our country has said "Never Again," in the face of the devastating tragedy of a school shooting. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45738146/347259844/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdiZTMzMjIzLTY5ZGMtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dlvfit8zlxRg3opgi6NZ_gky07w2B3axpfZ4avO4wqk=&emci=50cce604-5adc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7be33223-69dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=16335001) Team,

Time and time again, our country has said "Never Again" in the face of the devastating tragedy of a school shooting. We have buried the futures of children in graves that should have never have had to be dug, and we have given up the idea that school should be a place of safety and peace; instead teaching our kids how to escape active shooters, barricade classroom doors and flee to safety.

We are heartbroken at the news coming from Uvalde, Texas. The magnitude of yet another act of senseless gun violence echoes through our country and exposes the tragedy of the American experience.

It has been ten years since Sandy Hook and 23 since Columbine. Over and over again, Republican lawmakers have decided that loyalty to the gun lobby is more important than the lives of our children and our teachers.

Texas Senator **Ted Cruz** is calling for nothing but thoughts and prayers right now after voting against measures that would have prevented this. **Marjorie Taylor Greene** reposted a tweet informing people "How to help, where to donate blood" in response to the shooting, when she has encouraged violence since the moment she was elected. **Scott Perry** is "heartbroken and sickened" and states that this action was "pure evil" while regurgitating harmful and disproven talking points from the gun lobby. This hypocrisy is shameful and a moral stain on our country. Thoughts and prayers do nothing when they are not accompanied by real action by those who are in a position to affect change.

This November, we WILL vote for leaders who will finally take action and prevent the loss of any more lives in the hallways of our schools. Today our nation is in mourning, but we must use this sorrow and anger to make sure "never again" means never again.

Thank you,

David and Ian,
Co-founders of Never Again PAC

| PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

name: Hillsdale College via Backing America
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=f7c753aa628c4564bc4e74ace81e6eb6&_t=ca5VVVNdraomD8egUUa-ujIDXl3bJjdXvhceYOsXH47FoOGPKhjCKz39Tzmf2MsPHQdRk8T6Gs5ENxl_YVkBKZbvzSSA5v-4ZRs43eOXoPZ822NW5i4_XzNJoeFYUzJNDMTCkz9eVIGMga-ah271k3PNUq6ywRnGWdkcwNGtuS-Eywe0k-YShFgCRva0NOBkVWMWwKGYXj-uB4IFtDLzeW1O9curaMYv-PIVKgEOX_Q%3D)
_Please see a message from our sponsor:_
---
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f7c753aa628c4564bc4e74ace81e6eb6&_e=BFgYqqD0aSPeVueR92nzJcoqiNYDkI__NoCbrmr5RW1AKskdAQQcWIzDPNLwImEJohH7fRAlugf2JWaIIziDGWkteUjDD6otHumvyeeMPA23eVn3Yb5XmiQfAYjxytn5PQSSIg5s09q7akHshRMHblNgpRH2ZuqsuNlGs4_aB2lei4kGJh3APtM8bzkorXoMV7YJqqpt5yj-n6kOBg5unQtQ0f6P8Lq2vWlw8gv07ys4BzUhKGVjOFOhbtGYFSFMdGu-IWWPhbxmoGxLf0nhPE18LYr2tIbNJnR2FDkQCvWtme9T9jWtPYT35m4wAMVkXbWJoP3v3HacbU98cWD3-rhfXYOKHn8al0w94yT7AhSA8akDZrMtq0aHQvKEByDyuQN7FzgLtp9VvuA-LtFoUN6OWAG_fABskwJu4LZMnTI7SRr9wo5qvZUD_2RVtxQhZSmeT4Y6cc-6093CGwu4jg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f7c753aa628c4564bc4e74ace81e6eb6&_e=BFgYqqD0aSPeVueR92nzJcoqiNYDkI__NoCbrmr5RW1AKskdAQQcWIzDPNLwImEJohH7fRAlugf2JWaIIziDGWkteUjDD6otHumvyeeMPA23eVn3Yb5XmiQfAYjxytn5PQSSIg5s09q7akHshRMHblNgpRH2ZuqsuNlGs4_aB2lei4kGJh3APtM8bzkorXoMV7YJqqpt5yj-n6kOBg5unQtQ0f6P8Lq2vWlw8gv07ys4BzUhKGVjOFOhbtGYFSFM1nRYMGAPxBgzZnsRNtg5u8tqAi0UsLdLNlydCPV66eyYU5-ysUUihPu6nzjoKUc0c1ipvnvbE4Mz4Pbt0xdmaSJK-yKeTgFAiAc9-8FeLcRSUYU8PCqifbw7KKys3WwwHkkA_wm80E3d4niQ9M-9AMamovnfzTPqLaAhgoVWnZDKtULHs0kNnLSO-lpoy2I3-AzjbbJi5HSCHD0zQcoMVw%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=f7c753aa628c4564bc4e74ace81e6eb6&_e=BFgYqqD0aSPeVueR92nzJcoqiNYDkI__NoCbrmr5RW1AKskdAQQcWIzDPNLwImEJohH7fRAlugf2JWaIIziDGWkteUjDD6otHumvyeeMPA23eVn3Yb5XmiQfAYjxytn5PQSSIg5s09q7akHshRMHblNgpRH2ZuqsuNlGs4_aB2lei4kGJh3APtM8bzkorXoMV7YJqqpt5yj-n6kOBg5unQtQ0f6P8Lq2vWlw8gv07ys4BzUhKGVjOFOhbtGYFSFMtFg_iUf3ei-prk9VQBpSq51DrAXkRV31b_cFjPpWQzv8V8_txshEuGVfn429SXLIhIAom5ILrFmh9xWUG7VBl6uBOSDb9d-1dUdqYrnSjtLi4B_xtPvp2oXCk4eQpEq1tmKMuHNU3Q368lAfl-OSO_L6dfJn1kv3Si6ok_C1Ijbd2esDYHdmI4nCyl42lSUhpOyEABK4-fUUKl6awZMBJQ%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. Please see a message from our sponsor: Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AOC on TX-28
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, the race
between Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros and conservative Democrat Henry
Cuellar in TX-28 is too close to call. But Cuellar leads by 177 votes.

Nancy Pelosi and the Democratic Party did everything it could to stop
Jessica. As the votes came in last night, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez put
things into perspective:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109787?refcode=em20220525-23537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Tweet from @AOC from 11:30pm on May 24, 2022 that reads On the day of a
mass shooting and weeks after news of Roe, Democratic Party leadership
rallied for a pro-NRA, anti-choice incumbent under investigation in a
close primary. Robocalls, fundraisers, all of it. Accountability isn’t
partisan. This was an utter failure of leadership.

Pelosi and the rest of House leadership went all in for the anti-choice,
NRA "A-rated" Cuellar. Cuellar is everything the Democratic Party SHOULD
oppose, yet he got fundraising support from leadership and Pelosi sent
robocalls directly to voters for Cuellar.

As AOC also said, Congress shouldn’t be an incumbent protection racket —
especially when the incumbent is against protecting abortion rights and
against stronger gun laws to reduce the rampant gun violence in this
country.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109787?refcode=em20220525-23537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Peter,
this race isn’t over yet and we need the
grassroots support for whatever happens next. Can you rush a
$3 donation to Justice Democrats right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109787?refcode=em20220525-23537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Contribute

The corporate political establishment spent millions on those 177 votes.

Democratic mega-donor and billionaire Reid Hoffman’s "Mainstream Democrats
PAC" spent $750,000 against Jessica. The American Israel Public Affairs
Committee’s Super PAC spent $2 million to protect Cuellar. And that’s just
the beginning — Wall Street, Big Oil, and the Koch Brothers funded
Cuellar’s multi-million dollar campaign account.

The unlimited corporate money machine funding the political establishment
may have squeaked out this win for Cuellar with the help of the top four
Democrats in the House. All to stop Jessica, a progressive fighter who
wants Medicare for All, action to avert climate catastrophe, abortion
rights, and stronger gun laws. The Democratic establishment wanted to stop
progress for the people in this race.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109787?refcode=em20220525-23537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Jessica may be headed to a recount and we need to be by her side every
step of the way. Can you chip in $3 right now so we can
stay strong for what’s next against the Democratic establishment?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109787?refcode=em20220525-23537&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1025&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1026&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220525-23537-footer&t=1027&refcode2=23537_1203867_IZZzDR&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1028&akid=23537%2E1203867%2EIZZzDR

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Claudia Zapata for Congress
subject: WE DID IT! Say bye to Chip Roy!
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDA7lHXCn2-7gadRB4lRGnWsv_s3TdEgPCFvJS1boihifUFupkNRnUU3q8u6GxXzr5-GmucVELVmxk9QbdBMznPIo5zma-0blSit00JSnHK7rrgVdc7URdnDry7DhFtIPgBal3hf1jes5SvQNUfzdsclCxhe8ite1HPk5NMZqwx_zcGfvW6oSbLinM9lxAcxsW9zAxxjsCsVi-AkoVCiMauoS24loy6Kj2iIbrWem8tLOyu64I5BmYYOB4KcOzaAew0x7TgMg2YlhlfCCc8uoyLb9Wdp9fXm0YxShYrTC_FGj/3mc/96Y_hBpBS-eon2rZDpBHiw/h0/r0bMuYx3oiemCb4Sk99MpH1eia9hPcmXEZXPplDMTbA)
---
Hola Friend, **We won!** **I am humbled and honored to have received the Democratic nomination for the U.S. House of Representatives in Texas ' 21 Congressional District. We are grateful for everyone who has helped in their own way-whether that be by casting your ballot, telling your friends and family, donating, or volunteering with the campaign-we did this together.** And together we will win in November!
---
[ **Donate $21 To Give Chip The Boot!** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wGUuWlI_ltgcTa9nIyLA0cdcwoNH1njgcf8sHpu_Ke0gc75mTY0PTuVJXglVqqVnfZB3WqZ5NrmS6AWyuazA73L9k4Ml6nhIdgKFtouhNtPGC4zuN7LDgOFrCdPDBQiVLVxdfj5g-0RGrTE1RxSDov3K8gIEd4If8K_xh8fDPcojWQ95062xeE49CBvXOvO_HD_uiBGk5WKBJDt8aR8lgodN9NKOtNP_HRFbqFXKFPlaerNFdGzWURFVYF1S9j_8ZzMZoRj3NYGeN5rbL8zSUzXZuwv_hdIpQJGu9FfRRCnP4vEpc_ZhX3FthuqnGlWcQOAWVBVFjbJvFltSB1y69d70qPW2Ry3wGjjMDmEROinw/3mc/96Y_hBpBS-eon2rZDpBHiw/h1/Eh6RukUlhWxJbqHYJwBTjfzmav-_IS10t1yqoYBeV4U)
---
From the beginning, this race has been about serving the needs of working-class families. _This race is not about Democrat vs. Republican -it's about giving the people of TX-21 someone who works for them. Incumbent Chip Roy has stood as a blockade from any positive benefits reaching the families of this district and holding pertinent District issues politically hostage by playing political theater at the Southern Border and in D.C._ **[I have met hundreds of people throughout TX-21 who have shared their concerns regarding water and land rights, gravel pits and rock quarries that contaminate our water and air, access to healthcare and emergency services, their 35-minute commutes to a grocery store, inadequate public school funding, needs for affordable housing that prioritizes rural communities and workers, and so much more.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wGUuWlI_ltgcTa9nIyLA0cZ5bTMBz0m6Ny26TNFXW0G6Lw8cX_Uhn4iap95WGe0SCYva82u8qhi0Vnagf064yhUkdIRcMb4DNxk5QOsIMgxH8LpLCdAtSOKexn4XvEmupDqYntBPE_rn15EWLFw_s891avmVeBDo95OF0sl9bGZMhUDOmzzMzmfSQM7nsR_SC4j_dzbR92UBxc37HgO3i-yROd0UmBQtO1VfF9pWVRF6k63ajo7CrS0KudpA_lq6WwtZZie8VUaQBtZPyMxLvvI8p5CnxTEov5CTIaPHb71JoDZQQuF39bFTyIfxmY5HSD4E7EcKNoTzoMm_0XhH1lis3p3m8RcwDEx5FN0YMwnQ/3mc/96Y_hBpBS-eon2rZDpBHiw/h2/ig-IZzAgR_1QmBaEETynKsCmChHQWkeo7ni7TiO2htU)** These are the issues we are fighting for!
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDA7lHXCn2-7gadRB4lRGnWvmdrZ8TRZMcg1-qFDglwmEogeVPzRZ_B6MEdBz1l9TiJdLNCtb7_Y3UoLfcsv2Pyz-B6RaFMo-7eZ3sVxOyc25j96WiLEHBvq4p8P1FG1E0SoJmPbXAFlxKatiwU0VbvFgYHAsFbXdroXPRw4n-tjf77L8RhKw8PNGqjmWllxyUjNQ3ssKpB-YDlcRMGtABrSjsRi_Ann5ZOjaLD-H4juOw1UU9eOG3-gchgjyGGASNx5Fwni4-ty3tu5_OLVC2esYt1HO77FpL8vjkzSeP5Yi/3mc/96Y_hBpBS-eon2rZDpBHiw/h3/k0ioQUfr7bfqON22ZC033Qo3fenqpaBchrfKEX3psDs)
---
I stand with the EMTs who Chip Roy denied hazard pay, the Veteran with ALS whom Chip denied further financial assistance, the hungry babies Chip refused expanded WIC services for, and the people with diabetes whom Chip denied affordable insulin--I am with you. And to the families whose lives were destroyed in yesterday's senseless massacre in Uvalde, I am with you not only in prayer but in action as well. We can and will end gun violence. **I refuse to give up on rural Texans solely because they live in a "safe red seat", and I hope you join me in this fight. ** This win doesn't have to be easy, it just has to be possible! **_Will you donate $5, $25 or $500 today to help us beat Chip Roy_**** _? Every dollar makes a difference!_** Mil gracias, friend! Claudia
---
[ **> >DONATE NOW<<** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wGUuWlI_ltgcTa9nIyLA0cGHoA3McWNlar3YdvMwMhtU_53ps8x6T7ro8eZJ5Zr0pGdyxsM-yYSLLXOvUKFsoBi--q5FXBRxtdlD1rVmRB2McW1odtcL5gucnIFIo4kObJSJ5hsNo9U3g84FI67eF26NOePa1N-VvDTT6PcDwxpuBvldJrXjpf7LCqCz34LuqBEhX-_xn_tEXohZobxeCTzLF9s5vyDCJspYSnF-TMEdUTja2SKSOgDf5I9PW8nt-44in5cz3__0YfkC1O-G1UahD3otX076IvH0ATzzHmVoryydFtbq1ByKmAMoiP39YDzIZ7YIwrCdX6Sl4pimR1CrbMc9iteyyjYgjRNJZTfA/3mc/96Y_hBpBS-eon2rZDpBHiw/h4/mQpuFSY9HJX4t5vZEtTJWbR4NJb7HefCk0-ZOU3uHzY)
---

clean_body: | | Hola Friend, We won! I am humbled and honored to have received the Democratic nomination for the U.S. House of Representatives in Texas ' 21 Congressional District. We are grateful for everyone who has helped in their own way-whether that be by casting your ballot, telling your friends and family, donating, or volunteering with the campaign-we did this together. And together we will win in November! From the beginning, this race has been about serving the needs of working-class families. This race is not about Democrat vs. Republican -it's about giving the people of TX-21 someone who works for them. Incumbent Chip Roy has stood as a blockade from any positive benefits reaching the families of this district and holding pertinent District issues politically hostage by playing political theater at the Southern Border and in D.C. These are the issues we are fighting for! | I stand with the EMTs who Chip Roy denied hazard pay, the Veteran with ALS whom Chip denied further financial assistance, the hungry babies Chip refused expanded WIC services for, and the people with diabetes whom Chip denied affordable insulin--I am with you. And to the families whose lives were destroyed in yesterday's senseless massacre in Uvalde, I am with you not only in prayer but in action as well. We can and will end gun violence. I refuse to give up on rural Texans solely because they live in a "safe red seat", and I hope you join me in this fight. This win doesn't have to be easy, it just has to be possible! Will you donate $5, $25 or $500 today to help us beat Chip Roy ? Every dollar makes a difference! Mil gracias, friend! Claudia | | Claudia Zapata is a practical, progressive Democrat running for Congress in Texas’ 21st congressional district in Central Texas.
