name: aadlandforcolorado
subject: Aslan/Aadland
body:
More than coincidence
| | | |
---
|
---
|
# Aslan and the Aadland Logo
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
We chose the lion as our logo because the lion is emblematic of virtue, nobility, strength, courage, poise, and independence. The three stars represent my three children; our lion is looking out into the future of the next generation. Will we make a brighter future for them?
While traveling all over Congressional District 7, talking with incredible people, many have said my last name and logo remind them of Aslan from the C.S Lewis Chronicles of Narnia series. I am overjoyed to hear this comparison with one of my favorite childhood heroes! God surely works in mysterious ways, and this connection feels more than coincidental.

Aslan is a beacon of hope throughout Lewis' remarkable books. He is a voice of honesty and truth, a symbol of courage and humble leadership. Aslan stands for righteousness, peace through strength and the willingness to sacrifice for the greater good. He exemplifies the ideal of servant-leadership to which I aspire.

To me, Aslan is more than a fictional character. When C.S. Lewis created Aslan, he created a living image of purity, goodness, and morality, a symbol of virtue I greatly admire and will work to emulate in Congress.
With so much chaos and deception overshadowing our daily lives, now is the time to send people into the fray who are committed to being beacons of light in the midst of darkness. I desire to use wisdom hard-earned through my many experiences all over the world to bring positive solutions to our many challenges.
| |
---|---
|
For example, in Afghanistan I was responsible for securing the border with Pakistan, and we trained the Afghan border police to carry on the mission. I will use this expertise in addressing our disastrous Southern border.
In Iraq, we became the local law enforcement, policing the streets, often fighting criminals as frequently as terrorists. I know what it's like to patrol dangerous streets at night and why qualified immunity is essential for our law enforcement to do their job. With firsthand experience, I will advocate for rule of law and the means to effectively enforce it.

Additionally, I will lean on my success in the energy sector to ensure sound, balanced energy policy that protects our beautiful natural environment while serving people's lives and energizing the Colorado economy.
Using wisdom gleaned from my education in Depth Psychology, I will seek to treat mental health issues such as addiction that contribute to homelessness and broken homes in a way that is healing and restorative, not enabling and self-destructive.

In the end, I desire to be a humble leader, an advocate for truth and a courageous trailblazer in Congress, just as Aslan was in Narnia.
| |
---|---
|
In Prince Caspian, the fourth in the Chronicles of Narnia series, Aslan states, "You doubt your value. Don't run from who you are." I know my value is found in being a leading voice for freedom and conservative values that are proven by history to elevate the human spirit and make life better for all people. Although I am not Aslan, I do hope to emulate his character and desire to do good, especially when faced with the extraordinary corruption of DC.

I will work tirelessly to live up to the ideal of Aslan, serving you as a lion-like leader when I get to Congress. Join me now by being Lions, not sheep.
|

# Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|
Neighborhood canvassing - or "walkabouts" as we call them - are going on across Congressional District 7 (CD7) on a daily basis.
Saturday, Aadland for Congress staff began canvassing Lakewood, but as the "Drive-by Blizzard" got worse, they were not to be deterred and moved inside to spend the rest of the day calling voters.
| | |
---|---
|
Erik and the Aadland for Congress staff were in Lake and Custer counties over the weekend.
In Lake County, Erik met with Republican candidates for local offices, and then walked downtown Leadville, stopping at small businesses to have great discussions about concerns and challenges from owners and employees.
Erik met in person with our neighbors at a meet/greet hosted by Treeline Kitchen. All in attendance, were inspired by Erik's enthusiasm and genuine love for this state and country.
| |
---|---
|
Then on to the Republican social at a local residence, where Erik spoke before a crowd of over 60 people. The loud applause for Erik was representative of the support he has in Lake County. Erik departed for Custer County in the heavy snow, but was energized by the day. Our Leadville volunteers George Benson, and Mike & Val Romero did an awesome job introducing Erik to community members, and touched on the town's history!
| |
---|---
|
In Custer County, the large snowfall on Saturday morning prevented any canvassing in Westcliffe. Our Custer County area coordinator, Dawn Ramsdell, helped to organize a grand meet/greet fit for the area. The event was moved to indoors due to the weather, but spirits were high in the room, with over 70 people in attendance! Erik connected with true patriots, fired up to make a positive change in our state and country.
Great food and tremendous comradery.
If you'd like to join the fun, read about volunteer opportunities with this button:

## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas and becoming energy independent. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
|
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.

clean_body: More than coincidence | | | | | | Aslan and the Aadland Logo | | | | | ---|--- | We chose the lion as our logo because the lion is emblematic of virtue, nobility, strength, courage, poise, and independence. The three stars represent my three children; our lion is looking out into the future of the next generation. Will we make a brighter future for them? While traveling all over Congressional District 7, talking with incredible people, many have said my last name and logo remind them of Aslan from the C.S Lewis Chronicles of Narnia series. I am overjoyed to hear this comparison with one of my favorite childhood heroes! God surely works in mysterious ways, and this connection feels more than coincidental. Aslan is a beacon of hope throughout Lewis' remarkable books. He is a voice of honesty and truth, a symbol of courage and humble leadership. Aslan stands for righteousness, peace through strength and the willingness to sacrifice for the greater good. He exemplifies the ideal of servant-leadership to which I aspire. To me, Aslan is more than a fictional character. When C.S. Lewis created Aslan, he created a living image of purity, goodness, and morality, a symbol of virtue I greatly admire and will work to emulate in Congress. With so much chaos and deception overshadowing our daily lives, now is the time to send people into the fray who are committed to being beacons of light in the midst of darkness. I desire to use wisdom hard-earned through my many experiences all over the world to bring positive solutions to our many challenges. | | ---|--- | For example, in Afghanistan I was responsible for securing the border with Pakistan, and we trained the Afghan border police to carry on the mission. I will use this expertise in addressing our disastrous Southern border. In Iraq, we became the local law enforcement, policing the streets, often fighting criminals as frequently as terrorists. I know what it's like to patrol dangerous streets at night and why qualified immunity is essential for our law enforcement to do their job. With firsthand experience, I will advocate for rule of law and the means to effectively enforce it. Additionally, I will lean on my success in the energy sector to ensure sound, balanced energy policy that protects our beautiful natural environment while serving people's lives and energizing the Colorado economy. Using wisdom gleaned from my education in Depth Psychology, I will seek to treat mental health issues such as addiction that contribute to homelessness and broken homes in a way that is healing and restorative, not enabling and self-destructive. In the end, I desire to be a humble leader, an advocate for truth and a courageous trailblazer in Congress, just as Aslan was in Narnia. | | ---|--- | In Prince Caspian, the fourth in the Chronicles of Narnia series, Aslan states, "You doubt your value. Don't run from who you are." I know my value is found in being a leading voice for freedom and conservative values that are proven by history to elevate the human spirit and make life better for all people. Although I am not Aslan, I do hope to emulate his character and desire to do good, especially when faced with the extraordinary corruption of DC. I will work tirelessly to live up to the ideal of Aslan, serving you as a lion-like leader when I get to Congress. Join me now by being Lions, not sheep. | | | | | | == | | | | Campaign Update | | | | | ---|--- | Neighborhood canvassing - or "walkabouts" as we call them - are going on across Congressional District 7 (CD7) on a daily basis. Saturday, Aadland for Congress staff began canvassing Lakewood, but as the "Drive-by Blizzard" got worse, they were not to be deterred and moved inside to spend the rest of the day calling voters. | | | ---|--- | Erik and the Aadland for Congress staff were in Lake and Custer counties over the weekend. In Lake County, Erik met with Republican candidates for local offices, and then walked downtown Leadville, stopping at small businesses to have great discussions about concerns and challenges from owners and employees. Erik met in person with our neighbors at a meet/greet hosted by Treeline Kitchen. All in attendance, were inspired by Erik's enthusiasm and genuine love for this state and country. | | ---|--- | Then on to the Republican social at a local residence, where Erik spoke before a crowd of over 60 people. The loud applause for Erik was representative of the support he has in Lake County. Erik departed for Custer County in the heavy snow, but was energized by the day. Our Leadville volunteers George Benson, and Mike & Val Romero did an awesome job introducing Erik to community members, and touched on the town's history! | | ---|--- | In Custer County, the large snowfall on Saturday morning prevented any canvassing in Westcliffe. Our Custer County area coordinator, Dawn Ramsdell, helped to organize a grand meet/greet fit for the area. The event was moved to indoors due to the weather, but spirits were high in the room, with over 70 people in attendance! Erik connected with true patriots, fired up to make a positive change in our state and country. Great food and tremendous comradery. If you'd like to join the fun, read about volunteer opportunities with this button: | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being a net exporter of natural gas and becoming energy independent. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professionals, friends and neighbors. You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. | == Please use the button below to provide your financial support and help insure Erik Aadland is our Republican candidate to the U.S. House of Representatives. | | == | | Upcoming Events | | | Thursday, May 26th from 6:00-8:30 PM: -- Candidate Debate in Teller County! If you're in Teller County, You can hear all the candidates for Congressional District 7 (CD7) debate the issues and and how to defeat the Democrats. Come to the Ute Pass Cultural Center in Woodland park Tomorrow at 6:00 for point and counterpoint about representing our district in the U.S. House. The Ute Pass Cultural Center is at 210 E. Midland Ave in Woodland Park | == | | Friday, May 27th at 7:00 AM: George Brauchler Radio Show on KNUS A former Colorado DA, George Brauchler brings insight, strong opinion & humor to his interviews with Erik. Don't miss the fireworks when Erik Aadland and George examine the issues. Tune in to KNUS Friday Morning at 7! Tune your radio to 710AM or click the button below for the live stream online. | == | | Friday, May 27th at 8:00 AM: The Jimmy Lakey Show on KCOL Jimmy Lakey will host Erik for a lengthy interview. Jimmy is an enthusiastic support of Erik's campaign to be our representative to the U.S. House. Tune in Friday morning at 8 to learn why! Tune your AM radio to 600 or click the button below for the live stream | == | | Friday, May 27th at 4:30 PM -- The Dan Caplis Show on KHOW. Erik will join Dan Caplis once again for spirited conversation about the important issues. Dan is an acclaimed trial lawyer and hard-hitting radio host. Erik's conversations with Dan are always captivating. Don't miss this one! Tune your AM radio to 630 or use the button below for the live stream online. | == Saturday, May 28th at 9:15 AM: Wake Up With Randy Corporon Randy is a Denver trial lawyer turned radio host who never fails to entertain and inspire. Hear Randy and Erik Aadland in a rocking examination of the pressing issues. Listen Saturday morning at 9 O'clock to catch the fun! Tune your radio to KNUS at 710AM, or Click the button for the live stream | == | | Saturday May 28 10:00AM--Erik and the Aadland for Congress staff will be canvassing neighborhoods in Salida. Knocking on doors and talking with voters is inspiring by the overwhelming positive response from our neighbors. If you'd like to join a "walkabout" contact: mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com | | Saturday May 28 @ Noon--Meet and talk with Erik in Person If you're in the Salida area, please plan to meet Erik for one-on-one conversation about your issues, questions and concerns. Erik will be available to talk to you from Noon to 1:30 in downtown Salida. Seating is limited, so you must let us know you're coming through the link at the button below. Details and directions will be immediately emailed to you. | | == | | Saturday May 28 1:30-3:-00PM -- Downtown Salida Afternoon Walk Erik and staff will take to the sidewalks again after the Meet & Greet to talk to more neighbors. Watch for Erik and the troops in Salida! | | Monday May 30 All Day -- Memorial Day Let's take this day and remember those who laid down their lives so that we can live free! | == | | Wednesday June 1 3:00PM -- The Chuck and Julie Show Chuck Bonniwell and Julie Hayden produce a weekly podcast which will feature Erik Aadland and talk about Colorado Congressional District 7, it's issues and the campaign for the Republican nomination to the U.S. House. This will be a great opportunity to hear Erik talk candidly and provide you information to help decide who will get your primary vote in June. Use the link below to hear the live broadcast at 3:00PM on June 1 | == | | Wednesday June 1 5:30PM -- Meet Erik in Arvada! Come talk one-on-one with the frontrunner in the match to be the Republican candidate for Colorado Congressional District 7 (CD7). This will be a chance to present your questions and issues to help decide who to give your vote in the primary; ballots go out in less than two weeks! Don't miss this opportunity! Seating is limited, so you must RSVP using the link below to ensure your spot:. | == | | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 | Littleton, CO 80163 tel:720-464-4488 == | | | | | | | | | | Aadland for Colorado | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | (720) 464-4488 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: More Mississippians! – update from our state’s free market think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/jxncrime-8132424?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

I wonder if I started a trend when I moved to Mississippi?

The Magnolia state has been losing people for as long as anyone can remember. More people seemed to leave than arrive.

The US Census Bureau’s 2020 census estimates seemed to confirm this, reporting that Mississippi was one of only three states in America to have lost population between 2010 and 2020.

**Now, it turns out that the feds can’t count! **

The Census Bureau has just issued a revised estimate and discovered that there are in fact 120,000 more Mississippians! **Between 2010 and 2020, our state grew by the equivalent of two new cities the size of Hattiesburg.**

Why does this matter?

Knowing that there are more Mississippians is important not because it’s a way of exploiting more federal funding opportunities. Nor, despite the reaction of some politicians, is it about any implications it might have for redistricting.

**It matters that our population is growing because of what it says about our state. **The apparent decline in Mississippi’s population was often cited as evidence of public policy failure by liberal pundits who seemed to think that we ought to be more like Oregon or Seattle. We don’t need to accept that narrative anymore.

**Mississippi is growing, with more folk arriving than leaving.** This ought to give us confidence to do more than wait on federal handouts.

**There is much more that we can do to make Mississippi grow.** The recent income tax cut will help, although we need to go further and abolish the state income tax entirely. Having some great universities, around which industries and start ups cluster, is important. Getting rid of red tape, much of which exists to protect vested interests, is going to be essential.

Of course, I didn’t really start a trend when I moved across the Atlantic to make the Magnolia state my home. If anything, I was following a trend that was already underway.

But as a new arrival, I appreciate why someone would want to move to Mississippi. **This is the politest place in America, with the most agreeable people, climate and pace of life you could want. **

---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=65e28e3d26&e=5703353baa)
---
Jackson has the highest murder rate per capita in the United States. The Mississippi Center for Public Policy's CEO & President Douglas Carswell sits down with Paul Gallo of SuperTalk Mississippi to discuss MCPP's suggestions for cutting crime in the capital city.

| | Peter,

Please join me and Speaker Nancy Pelosi tonight via Zoom for a discussion on how We Won’t Stop Until We End Gun Violence. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45738752/347263006/211641351?refcode=MT_EM_EN_WL_220525_1_1&refcode2=fccd1dac-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2NkMWRhYy02ZGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hn9shubxlkI3PtDPjHfg56VyHFGRB-XjiOb_Q3a87MU=&emci=88bfbbe9-47dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fccd1dac-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2678920)
We are all heartbroken by the tragic news out of Texas. As Chair of the House Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, I am committed to advancing gun violence prevention policies to save lives and help keep our communities safe.

During tonight’s discussion, I’ll be focusing on what we need to do to protect our children and communities from gun violence as well as what measures have already passed in the House to prevent gun violence.

If you would like to be part of this conversation about what we can do to help end gun violence, please join me tonight at 5pm PT.

**_[https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_DlWGnjKaTmSp_5aNzswsEQ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45738757/347263016/211641351?refcode=MT_EM_EN_WL_220525_1_1&refcode2=fccd1dac-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2NkMWRhYy02ZGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hn9shubxlkI3PtDPjHfg56VyHFGRB-XjiOb_Q3a87MU=&emci=88bfbbe9-47dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fccd1dac-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=2678920)_**

Mike Thompson

[**_Can you chip in quickly to make sure we are able to cover these expenses?_**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b33b48681ff74c549cecc77816128e2c&_e=LlmNBS5rRdmGJVkrQ0zSvYtY-UZKQSopWJaSRKsjqisIs2o7yFQzyfJvBmsh0vYzzOA_MIf2t4ZNF0rxgeyDZspZ9gN1cj3meEw55VNkRIcIl5lwxexND60H3FqOK7tU9e5U-y-B-P_2-mbZDKWQPPewH7SrPwmfirBmRlsutrLfp7FpOTUqpa5CRdvdrUDWgFK5Q0IdMAUXJzLREQOuJdVeAtgqwXxZcJs8fxY_vNA6QbPu_xpWtM-bormwZefsACVyqXYSIuhKypkCCW-Oqk0-6JEVB1x9SgyiVvuQU_TrVHIAn1X7LIW7qmSq_ZAJvK04EBNCZEWPlf4kvv7_3HL1RBPKIBpn17N-HW3hoGwdOdQ8tmm-jHkOonErJjW0J3Qj2N29TIeqlqiaXjNpyt5MBP1bgNRURmAPI4WAE_JnqjoAEMsj8dleXzVfX0fAm-qIJ1GFA_bZFne7pd8VdWigP2azQ44PcdU5VtX9YU9x_f8JWwr7ncGj3NNjgYg-4H-TOfbb3vjoUYsAA_o2xA%3D%3D) Without your help, these fees could truly crush our campaign moving forward.

clean_body: I need your help | I need your help. I just stepped out of a meeting with our lawyer and we are about to be hit with related to the recount efforts. | The good news is: we are winning! Right now we are in the lead and we are on a good path to winning this primary election and hitting another victory in November. But in the meantime, we need to deal with this immediate financial pressure and we need all the support we can get to make it through this process smoothly. Without your help, these fees could truly crush our campaign moving forward. I appreciate your help! Let’s win this! Sincerely, Dr. Mehmet Oz Dr. Mehmet Oz is a Trump-endorsed, America First Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania’s next Senator. Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is : Doctor Oz For Senate 2771 Philmont Ave Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Uvalde, Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
I called Amy as soon as I heard the news. She was in the pickup line at
our daughter’s middle school. “All these kids look so happy,” she said.
“They have no idea.”

What is most damning is that our kids, like many across Texas, seem to
expect it now. Their hearts ache, but they didn’t necessarily seem
surprised when Amy told them. They were 7, 9, and 11 when kids were killed
at Santa Fe high school. 8, 11, and 12 when their fellow El Pasoans were
killed at Walmart. This is their reality and this is their future, unless
we do something about it.

Our broken hearts are with Uvalde. We are with this community, the
families who have had their loved ones taken from them, the parents who
are still waiting to hear whether their child made it out of school alive,
all those who remain in the hospital.

Our thanks is with the first responders, the medical providers, the
community members who continue to do everything they can to save lives and
be there for one another.

But our thoughts and our thanks are not enough. These massacres are not
natural disasters, acts of God, or random. They are totally predictable,
direct consequences of the choices made by Greg Abbott and the majority of
those in the Texas legislature.

The moment to stop Uvalde was right after Sandy Hook. After Santa Fe High.
After El Paso. But instead, Abbott ignored the pleas of law enforcement
and turned his back on our communities by making it easier to carry loaded
guns in public. The moment to stop the next slaughter is right now.

There will be more Uvaldes, El Pasos, Sutherland Springs, and Santa Fes
until we decide to put the lives of our kids ahead of the political
careers of gun lobby politicians like Greg Abbott.

He holds the highest office in the state. He has had seven years to save
lives but has chosen to make matters worse — by rejecting universal
background checks, by opposing red flag laws, by signing permitless carry,
and by doing nothing to protect our communities from gun violence.

The only way to change this is by winning political power so that we can
protect the lives of those in our lives. We win in Texas and it becomes
possible to stop this bloodshed. If we fail in this election, then the
slaughter of children in Uvalde becomes our future.

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1001&akid=190909%2E444211%2EJ-sBba

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

Hello,
I don’t want the NRA’s money. Here's what I say to them: 'Give me an "F" boys, and I will wear it as a badge of honor.' My opponent Chuck Grassley would never do that.
Last year, Grassley took yet another big check from the NRA. Then the NRA got exactly what they paid for: **Days after the last mass murder, Chuck Grassley stood up BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases.**
There is a gun violence epidemic in this country. We must pass meaningful gun safety and responsible gun ownership laws _now_. The only way we'll get it done, though, is by electing more bold Democrats who know the gun debate inside and out, and who are willing to stand up to the NRA's blood money.

name: Christy Smith
subject: For God’s sake, when will this end?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739166/347264756/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmYyMmRhMS02ZmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZQLJW6KHphNdW9Anp3jStGjNexYJrjr5gh1v9mNtUY=&emci=a50464c0-61dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=d2f22da1-6fdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=11385749)

Hi Peter,

Yesterday, in Uvalde in Texas, 19 elementary school kids crawled out of bed, ate their favorite breakfast cereal, bunny-looped their sneakers, packed their school backpacks, and headed off to school – excited to get through the final two days of class before summer vacation.

They did not return home that day. Every parents' worst nightmare came true when a gunman brought an AR rifle to Robb Elementary School, slaughtering 21 people, 19 of them children, and two teachers.

This shooting comes just _10 days_ after Buffalo, where families are still reeling from the racially-motivated, deliberate attack on a Black community that left 10 people dead.

My heart is shattered for the families and the Uvalde community. While these heartbreaking and all-too-common acts of violence are horrific,**they are also entirely _preventable._**

What kind of moral compass can we claim if we continue to let concert-goers, movie-goers, families going grocery shopping, and _children_ — for God's sake — fall victim to gun violence month after month?

While I'm heartbroken by the tragedy in Uvalde, I'm also _furious._ Furious that Republicans, who tweet out thoughts and prayers, continue to cowardly submit to the NRA and gun lobby over protecting the lives of children, families, and communities like Uvalde.

I'm _furious_ that nearly a decade after Sandy Hook, **Congress has failed to take one single legislative action to keep our kids and our communities safe** because of the GOP's lack of political courage.

**We do not have to live in a world like this.** The US gun homicide rate is 26 times that of other high-income countries. There are steps we can _take right now_ to save lives and prevent future tragedies as long as we have the political will and courage to do it.

My thoughts are with Uvalde and Buffalo today.

— Christy

PS: If you're wondering how you can do more, and turn your outrage into action, you can go find more information from **[Moms Demand Action](https://momsdemandaction.org/act/) **and [**Brady PAC.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739167/347264757/-515666409?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmYyMmRhMS02ZmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZQLJW6KHphNdW9Anp3jStGjNexYJrjr5gh1v9mNtUY=&emci=a50464c0-61dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=d2f22da1-6fdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=11385749)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.christyforcongress.org/p/Zv-NqB7CoUe5VHxhOup90Q2?unsubscribedata=F%2BQbt7YY8Ea2oAZw31X9iH6S0Pascx1AsFHWoEl4aboICsSpQRM477%2F5E3OqnSsZMtreU25QCFuIY%2BCTZoI4FaghBy%2BsJHEWqXOudlsWMimpWwNqqeMkfblxlYiURJ0s58pOo%2Bbi%2FtqR2WuA3xTMYHasjh3K3AF5OB6BWuhFqwB956QN6NyZp%2BvKZzr01kSqTFj5SEL5VRHls0b8i37hZ3BE256Zz4JqQ%2BH6lKmV6ST8sw7ZNon4QnOKg05%2FP2WXtxejg9w7l8cqNPJh3AcsAJEh9CHMhUBJYWaCXrrVXryfYM32GpX2EV64Y0rkWHzuaUaZRi4m6ilFS1ODioNudKbxJJdJKPme0bZpLWd1Q9me49%2B5%2Fx7MVQqJZCjN5qTI1urVDzPjIggts0B%2F93pC0nv5dqIn78l%2FemHxvmYRhGuzsAb9jscJFpsfLPOaH1IT). name: Sarah Palin
subject: I’ve just received a HUGE endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Join President Trump and Elise Stefanik | Our movement is growing stronger by the day. In addition to President Trump's endorsement...
Patriot,

Our movement is growing stronger by the day.

In addition to President Trump's endorsement, **I recently received the endorsement of Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Chairwoman of the House Republican Conference.** Elise is a tireless advocate for the America First agenda, and I'm honored to have her support as I work to restore President Trump's America First agenda in Alaska and across the country.

During the course of this campaign, I've earned the endorsements of many great Republican leaders: President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Nikki Haley, and now Elise Stefanik. However, there's one endorsement that I haven't received yet, and that's **YOURS, Patriot.**

Your support is critical to my success in this election. Without the support of every pro-Trump, pro-America patriot, I won't win.

_**[Sign your name before midnight tonight to PUBLICLY ENDORSE my campaign for United States Congress.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463741:65iYrzoNX:m:1:3299561967:90446474D3A937E8ACF85563E943DE61:r)**_

There's a reason why so many prominent conservatives are joining our movement, Patriot. They know that I'm the _**ONLY**_ candidate in this race who will fight tooth and nail for the hardworking people of Alaska.

My team is showing me an updated list of endorsements first thing tomorrow morning. I'm hoping to see _**YOUR NAME**_ at the very top of the list.

**[Add your name before 11:59 PM tonight to PUBLICLY ENDORSE my campaign for United States Congress.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60463741:65iYrzoNX:m:1:3299561967:90446474D3A937E8ACF85563E943DE61:r)**

Thank you,

name: American Action News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedlda3lcffd5c2gq4omcl00jf95b1739t4459co_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2usq7fdjke8qm6ppkscon9ptlmkrmcc336epm9p3hcmoeatlnc5qmep1nm1r3ddpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0shjcoor9cr2cupb2phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or5cpim8ob2chjm49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcgear4fi043afe96qlkkoh7kji9f0e3v8n1ifeg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cli62oj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgqhd63odi4blg3orjn8sfkc0flejn0bqjetlfsg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cli62oj4cth2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm3v50h33jgfgoajib4r5sra2verg8t91v1ilud8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6cli62oj4cth2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Nan Whaley
subject: I shouldn’t have to keep calling mayors about mass shootings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
We need leaders who are willing to do something. It is long, long past time for meaningful action.

Team,
While I was mayor of Dayton, a troubled young man shot and killed nine people and injured over two dozen others.
Since then, I’ve made calls to other mayors whenever mass shootings happen in their communities to offer my help and support. Last week, I called the mayor of Buffalo. Yesterday, Uvalde.
**I should not have to make these calls.** Nineteen children and two adults were killed yesterday in a single senseless act of violence – one that could have been prevented.
We need leaders who are willing to do something. It is long, long past time for meaningful action.
**[I’m calling on both Congress, Ohio Governor Mike DeWine, and the Ohio legislature to take immediate steps to curb gun violence, including background checks to keep guns out of dangerous hands. Add your name>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739462/347266391/823957885?ms=nw_em_220525_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220525_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI1MGE2Yi03MmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QyoTR299xRACxE7Pra-LDb72IUvrZUpyge2iTgkqms=&emci=1595b73d-70dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=85b50a6b-72dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=24357242)**
No one should have to live in fear of becoming victims to deadly shootings like these as we go about our lives. At school. At the grocery store. Anywhere.
It doesn’t have to be like this. By implementing commonsense gun safety measures, we can keep guns out of the hands of those who use them for harm and keep our children – and all in our community – safe. This is a moral imperative.
**[Join me in calling for action to put an end to the epidemic of gun violence plaguing our communities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739462/347266391/823957885?ms=nw_em_220525_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220525_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWI1MGE2Yi03MmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QyoTR299xRACxE7Pra-LDb72IUvrZUpyge2iTgkqms=&emci=1595b73d-70dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=85b50a6b-72dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=24357242)**
I am devastated for these families, and furious at the cowardly politicians who enable this violence. But we will keep fighting to protect our communities.
Onward,
Nan Whaley

Team, While I was mayor of Dayton, a troubled young man shot and killed nine people and injured over two dozen others. Since then, I’ve made calls to other mayors whenever mass shootings happen in their communities to offer my help and support. Last week, I called the mayor of Buffalo. Yesterday, Uvalde. I should not have to make these calls. Nineteen children and two adults were killed yesterday in a single senseless act of violence – one that could have been prevented. We need leaders who are willing to do something. It is long, long past time for meaningful action. No one should have to live in fear of becoming victims to deadly shootings like these as we go about our lives. At school. At the grocery store. Anywhere. It doesn’t have to be like this. I am devastated for these families, and furious at the cowardly politicians who enable this violence. But we will keep fighting to protect our communities. | | Peter,

You know Garrett - he is spending his birthday on the campaign trail, and has a jam-packed day of interviews and events. This campaign has been a full time job, and Garrett is as motivated as ever to win this race and bring meaningful results to Michiganders.

For Garrett's birthday, I asked our campaign team to come up with a virtual card that our movement members could sign.

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: We must put an end to this hatred and violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Yesterday was a tragedy. I’m absolutely devastated for the victims and their families, and I’m beyond angry that we as a nation have let this go on for so long.

It’s time for action. Parents should not have to worry about the safety of their children when they send them off to school each morning. Americans should not be worried about their safety when they’re grocery shopping.

**We must come together to bring an end to the gun violence epidemic in our communities.**

I’m calling for immediate bipartisan action to close the loopholes in background checks and make sure our schools are safe for all children and teachers.

We must put an end to this hatred and violence.

— Josh
---
|
---

* * *

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739569/347267213/925734826?refcode2=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=JG_EM_ST_3MO_20220525_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWJlOTA4Ni03M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gh4HdKlvqguOyYaWS9TPMdny6fEqIq2h28NNOD8P4cs=&emci=413dc13b-6bdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=37438246) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739573/347267217/2705300?refcode2=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=JG_EM_ST_3MO_20220525_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWJlOTA4Ni03M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gh4HdKlvqguOyYaWS9TPMdny6fEqIq2h28NNOD8P4cs=&emci=413dc13b-6bdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=37438246) [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739574/347267221/1906497561?refcode2=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=JG_EM_ST_3MO_20220525_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWJlOTA4Ni03M2RjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gh4HdKlvqguOyYaWS9TPMdny6fEqIq2h28NNOD8P4cs=&emci=413dc13b-6bdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=cabe9086-73dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=37438246)

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Uvalde
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Enough.
#
We’re writing this to you as parents of elementary school children.
We are devastated for the victims at Robb Elementary, and for the parents + families experiencing horrific pain.
This tragedy in Texas is another heartbreak and stain on our country.
It’s not just “one more” to add to our tragically long list of 27 school shootings this year. To those Uvalde families, it’s THEIR ENTIRE WORLD.
**We must act now to prevent even one more.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47554?t=1&akid=5986%2E434096%2E4-qKH6)
Democrats in the House and Senate should vote like Democrats and scrap the filibuster — allowing the swift and essential passage of gun violence prevention legislation.
Enough is enough.
Sending you love in this moment,
John + Gisele ❤️
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220525-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220525-5986&refcode2=5986_434096_4-qKH6&akid=5986%2E434096%2E4-qKH6)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220525-5986-footer&t=2&refcode2=5986_434096_4-qKH6&akid=5986%2E434096%2E4-qKH6)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Cindy Banyai
subject: GUNS VS OUR CHILDREN
body:
The choice should be obvious | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC3-DK4Z78BRJqQKESaXaqjR8g2RJbFZQPvOLZMonjmwwLaTvtIsRc9b3mz_v5zeVjvJyUBtDswpd9ghucsaeerHuh0Ad6BikFa9BD_ePI-TeXeps2r2-xmw9s3ViwLjlghAXTnwmdEBHM719c_bt_RdWZUVmjNPeHOg58yAoSpp0ZJbrwhA9oHcCGTCC7gh3ppoVeM4nhiRjOudQ6IGY0lOk5mFvLM18pI63KucIoEI/3mc/ODm8P3ffQuqB_XVHv3KfAw/h0/dJpJH8imy9VAK0dmIfNnaWR9RwMZSOQKjqmby3apZw0)
---
Friend, **The NRA endorsed my opponent, Byron Donalds, and is financially supporting his campaign. ** Donalds earned the only A+ rating in the NRA's yearly 'report cards'. The NRA Political Victory Fund said that score reflects "a legislator with not only an excellent voting record on all critical NRA issues, but who has also made a vigorous effort to promote and defend the Second Amendment."
---
|
---
**Who your campaign is funded by is who you will work for in office!**
---
Donalds has continuously voted against common-sense gun-reform and in 2018, directly following the Marjorie Stoneman Douglas High School shooting, he voted against **[a school safety and gun control package.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/A7GQnnr_XzUYyessq5BiRJQpXIfMm2fo6O89zXUkSBcpxmxIC9p3CuvPFs5Lr-4O6oqxn-MLZlyQn4zYmNGNkJ9JMGOKl2AGuyLo3Xe-e-sg_6sJiljHLGLUPV6JApoL8xOhaI2fIRpLEmiG1xUq8rqp2dcf6d1PortxNKtiJPCh5In4QX8mG0hR0L4KCjIJA6oernZ7PzBTpKcZ_bFK8hZ6VRwlMfTeG_V9_6Aqc4B_ZyxA-qslYNUpjdV63iI_P24rRflyctYGhNPa0F5-Uhf-NmXQP7S7yH-OVBo04LpyKNq04fJ6c9AWxnDGN8N7/3mc/ODm8P3ffQuqB_XVHv3KfAw/h1/hXAn5lNqnt90QNMduvKP1kfycdNxK787hN0NeJw-CXQ)** **I am Mom's Demand Action, Gun Sense Candidate. **As a mother of three, the safety of our children will ALWAYS come before party politics. Our children deserve to be educated without the fear that today could be their last. **[Will you support this campaign and help us stand up to the NRA? A donation of $25, $50, $100, or anything you can spare will help us show elected officials like Byron Donalds that the majority of Americans want common sense gun reforms.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xC2MFf2TalENSRprJiTF7JzEvb7ny_A46ES-ROAHbPJVpVfaG-2Yn_72THTsoiw0jwy5FBQNYJMEnL9fSStMkrPGIJ4t3AVkJlNRW1AaVoPePjbySh4AfLvp6qs23ELmMC2xClUlxfm8h8Y-lCSw2Yu10SNehr_bSYsWM8cNjYgxCVTY85MaJYsVxw0yU0rZvJg3eqgbQyF0lPo8wheB-tKtBQBf9e3_oRXij_QELPQGJ0guYbQpfHuPa1jo-hmqamMF1QL3ZJaqZgdYI7QQGpk092WqY1l9QqyBlDt8QYww/3mc/ODm8P3ffQuqB_XVHv3KfAw/h2/3hIQyt2UIITJn5W0SXpVLsdpb7iyFu_cePXALH_3RjE)**

clean_body: The choice should be obvious | | Friend, The NRA endorsed my opponent, Byron Donalds, and is financially supporting his campaign. Donalds earned the only A+ rating in the NRA's yearly 'report cards'. The NRA Political Victory Fund said that score reflects "a legislator with not only an excellent voting record on all critical NRA issues, but who has also made a vigorous effort to promote and defend the Second Amendment." | Who your campaign is funded by is who you will work for in office! Donalds has continuously voted against common-sense gun-reform and in 2018, directly following the Marjorie Stoneman Douglas High School shooting, he voted against I am Mom's Demand Action, Gun Sense Candidate. As a mother of three, the safety of our children will ALWAYS come before party politics. Our children deserve to be educated without the fear that today could be their last. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Dr. Cindy Banyai Democrat for Congress, FL-19 | Friends of Cindy Banyai PO Box 2923 Fort Myers, FL 33902 | | | Sent via . name: Emilia Sykes
subject: About the events in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
We need comprehensive gun control now
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739713/347268217/-1357723916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzc0MzMzOC03NWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gTT6-Ynume3RAmu5HzsS4a2Rd5Mt1cfHy8cKxjTTgII=&emci=2ce4f515-68dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=73743338-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=11703046)

I am struggling to find the words, Peter.

There is nothing I can type that can convey the sympathy I have for those impacted by the school shooting in Uvalde, Texas yesterday – for the parents who sent their children to school, unaware it would be the last time they saw them alive.

My heart is broken for their families, and for the families of the teachers. But let me be clear: Now is not the time for empty thoughts and prayers – we need action. This is the deadliest school shooting since Sandy Hook, ten years ago._And we’ve yet to see meaningful change in the time since._

This type of violence has become the norm, but we cannot allow ourselves to be numb to it. It is past time we have comprehensive gun reform legislation, and we cannot wait another moment to address this issue.

I sincerely hope our elected leaders will act with the urgency this moment requires and pass legislation to protect our communities from the plague of gun violence in America. And when I get to Congress, I will always be a vote for gun violence prevention. I will stand firmly against the gun lobby and the politicians they fund in the fight to keep us safe.

Peter, today is hard and heavy – I hope you take some time to rest and enjoy moments with your loved ones. But tomorrow, I will still be in this fight and I hope you’ll join me.

Warmly,

_Emilia_

---

name: John Lira
subject: Today we mourn. Tomorrow we fight for gun safety reform.
body:
| Peter, I served two combat tours in Iraq. I never thought I would see weapons in my community reminiscent of the type that my Marines and I used on the battlefield. Yet here we are — again. Nineteen children and three adults died in their classrooms after another senseless act of gun violence in our home state of Texas and our home district of TX-23. **[That’s why I’m asking you to consider donating to support this relief fund for the victims, their families, and those impacted by the Uvalde school shooting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739736/347268464/-439585176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzJhYWJmMC03NWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IQ8sNVwoUZlYJ9fVPO3p8HwEyvj4dd1JbgBg70Schk=&emci=cfe674ea-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7c2aabf0-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25686212)** Peter, I am heartbroken. I am frustrated. I am seething. As a gun owner and a veteran, I understand the many reasons to possess a firearm. **What I cannot understand is the inability of our leaders to enact bi-partisan gun safety reform. When will Congress act?** The shooting in Uvalde is only the most recent reminder that Republican leaders value gun ownership and the NRA’s mega donations more than education. More than mental health services. More than innocent human lives. Without common sense, proven measures — favored by a majority of Americans already — to prevent gun violence, it is only a matter of time before another community and heartbroken families are thrusted into the national spotlight for a senseless tragedy that never should have occurred. We need to reconfigure our priorities. We need to address the root causes of violence, like the lack of mental health care for our communities AND hold our leaders in office accountable for their failure to ensure that our communities are safe places to live, work, shop, pray, and study. **This is why I am running to represent TX-23. Because the horrific violence we are seeing could have been prevented.** Let us not forget that Tony Gonzales voted against the Bipartisan Background Checks Act and the Violence Against Women Act — both of which would prevent guns falling into the hands of those who aim to commit violence, like yesterday’s shooter. Texans deserve better. I do not accept the rhetoric from GOP politicians that tells us that thousands of lives lost each year to gun violence is the price we must pay to protect our Second Amendment Rights. Together, we can enact legislation that protects our families and communities, addresses the mental health crisis, AND allows for responsible gun ownership. **Peter, today we mourn. Tomorrow we fight for gun safety reform so that no more families suffer the same fate.** In solidarity, John Lira **[P.S. Please consider supporting the victims and the families impacted by this tragedy by making a donation to the relief funds.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739737/347268465/-439585176?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzJhYWJmMC03NWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IQ8sNVwoUZlYJ9fVPO3p8HwEyvj4dd1JbgBg70Schk=&emci=cfe674ea-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7c2aabf0-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25686212)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739738/347268466/-593876365?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzJhYWJmMC03NWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IQ8sNVwoUZlYJ9fVPO3p8HwEyvj4dd1JbgBg70Schk=&emci=cfe674ea-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7c2aabf0-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25686212) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739739/347268467/-1869672870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzJhYWJmMC03NWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3IQ8sNVwoUZlYJ9fVPO3p8HwEyvj4dd1JbgBg70Schk=&emci=cfe674ea-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7c2aabf0-75dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=25686212)

name: Will Rollins
subject: We cannot accept this reality.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45739855/347269155/-707005773?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmU4NjIyMS03NmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HxEr0afaqhZVkVExaAL9TIKuEob0i679G4QwU57LLgc=)
Peter,

Yesterday’s mass shooting at Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas was the 30th school shooting in 2022 alone. It was also the third deadliest in modern American history.

At this point, the American people have grown accustomed to the feeling of heartbreak and horror. As I reflect on the unimaginable grief the victims’ families are feeling, I’m also thinking of the millions of parents who dropped their kids off at school this morning with a renewed sense of hesitation and worry.

**We cannot accept a reality that demands that American parents teach their kids that our classrooms could become the next site of a massacre at a moment’s notice. We need action.**

Almost all gun owners in the country support violent history checks, but my opponent Ken Calvert does not. He received more NRA campaign contributions than any other California Congressmember between 1998 and 2016.

I was awarded the Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate distinction because they know that I'll fight for common sense solutions, like requiring basic violent history checks, safe storage, and red flag laws. And I'll never take a cent from the NRA.

When I am in Congress, I will accept nothing less than long-lasting gun safety reforms that American families demand and deserve.

With you,

Will Rollins

---

name: Jeff Ettinger
subject: I’m heartbroken at the news from Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Our children deserve to be safe. ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| Friends,

I am horrified and appalled by the news from Texas. As a father, I cannot imagine the anguish of hearing that your child won’t ever come home from school.

The threat of gun violence is far too present in our schools, in houses of worship, in grocery stores, and on our streets. Our communities suffer unimaginable losses far too often.

My prayers are with the families and the entire community of Uvalde, Texas. But right now, it’s important to go further than that. I commit to working in Congress to ensure that every single child in our country is safe, especially when they’re at school. Our kids deserve to learn and play without fear. I will work hard for common-sense solutions to keep all our people safe from the threat of violence.

\- Jeff |
| PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
---

subject: Re: Your MAGA King shirt

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Doing nothing is not an option.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Derek, I wanted to send you a note about the horrible and heartbreaking news out of Uvalde, Texas.

My heart breaks for the kids, their teachers, and their families. They deserve more than our outrage, our thoughts, our prayers – they deserve action.

Let me be clear: If you want absolutely nothing to change with our gun laws, I'm probably not your candidate.

I've carried guns in uniform in dangerous places and know as well as anybody we need some common-sense reforms. Guns like the weapons of war and the large-capacity magazines that my buddies and I carried in Iraq do not belong on our streets. The vast majority of Americans support something as straightforward as requiring a background check for every gun sale, yet cowardly politicians beholden to the NRA refuse to act. Our representatives should be working every single day to pass these basic reforms through Congress.

If elected, I will do the work to protect our communities with common-sense gun laws to keep us and our kids safe, and to prevent tragedies like Sandy Hook, Parkland, and Uvalde from ever happening again. My opponent will not. He’ll do nothing.

Well, doing nothing is not an option. It’s long past time to put action behind thoughts and prayers.

Be well and stay safe,

Chris Deluzio

----------

[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

subject: Under 200 votes!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
Yesterday's tragic events remind us all why we need change so desperately. | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78ORT8Pt3SALA3pMGVDypeKbyy2kgsjsCmnmy8k7FgsqB6wuCJ9K2SYervuUQSBWz0O3ikBinUo3OVFrxAKnzctvDXhVgCSehT_b8hq4h3hrI1mnC2lxJyJhSpf6dCULpsFgVBeUZLVyjDTKkMYKy9456DThb5wfCy4p5Hkpdt_3WZyO0xtHA7_X1s2x_2EDogEkLtfmCvWLTq9m05UIy1KEi_vfxC1cTfGri2vc1GpQJiX4I9ln1Sx5TVprpfNoD-P7NFk1fxfF0PtY9atzMRt06wHWvh7L6LDU7K1T39bTmv/3mc/vANub3A7Tp63rEQtPwrF9A/h0/-iScXnwReV-UfoiBdeGmMl6X1LtUS75s45OesHfg7Yg)
| | Dear Peter, Yesterday, the future took several steps backwards in Texas. We write to observe some patterns that you won't hear about from most news sources. The latest mass shooting left 21 young people dead at an elementary school in a mostly Latino neighborhood outside San Antonio, just a week after a white supremacist murdered 10 Black shoppers in a grocery store in Buffalo, NY. On the very same day that schoolchildren were executed en masse in Texas, local voters went to the polls for a runoff election in the 28th congressional district. Rather than embrace progressive challenger Jessica Cisneros, voters chose incumbent Henry Cuellar—a corporate Democrat backed by the National Rife Association who has also openly opposed abortion rights. [**Can you join us today to continue the battle to hold corporate Democrats accountable? The movement may have lost a battle in Texas last night, but the class war pitting Wall Street against the rest of us continues, whether we like it or not.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJcDLshT0v6Q38L2X821AIV2eoPvTdA6tbUUdzmkhAxFGdlZjizctvu9VjPReAfNSvkFzgD7VpkoU_00Bzqq65HjBLFjKQQvV2k1uH_qYgFUv1zUUtpvGvnRoidgAtMgzTvmsHhagNeA9c6gy-03RzvbL5wKJ7DfbioH1OBCXozRs5Cbq3nbrpUm8El3PETN4gCLcISV18IXtB2Y1NvTYEwgSrHTdVa80fe3WZOSLwGK_ysczuV_JoeOx03Nbr6xec/3mc/vANub3A7Tp63rEQtPwrF9A/h1/rVi5OXzC_1WlOWKCnVirZLnl02aSxXNK3fLlNg7XAEU)
Several patterns demand observation. First, Cuellar's margin of victory was absurdly fragile. Based on last night's preliminary results, he exceeded Cisneros by less than 200 votes, in an election in which over 50,000 people voted. In that context, Nancy Pelosi's outrageous support for Cuellar played a crucial role in keeping Cisneros out of the House, undermining widespread calls for both gun control and reproductive freedom. While the press is reporting on last night's election as a Cuellar victory, or as a Cisneros loss, it's ultimately a victory for Pelosi, Wall Street, and the corruption of the past as it continues to undermine any hope for the future. That's why it's important to hold leadership—who many other voices appear unwilling to name—accountable. And there's only one way to do that. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjCB1Z8H0TLUFI912OKefiY7vmEnH8Gp3W_JLeXNPf_gHtLs94z4tx72xE7QIORfojZCOvZ_8bgETWFebKIQnmf4RO19xLpMD0fGUTLaex_s3yWQf2AQjfHLZS65ri2chWraizSs805pLD4AY2j_v_FXMbu8mKYsviNNAdihclYnCuDkg8LucgRyPs-xU4zP5bHaBHAdOqSXKnwjsciZBq5Jz_CyW_JJ0tBaCDnO5hvHpC7em10QcXH_1K_0PT_6rvsbNWst1zyYwg0pbR3kQU3JhFlxE1PFvcC29soMoL9Y/3mc/vANub3A7Tp63rEQtPwrF9A/h2/8mBYUTlsZXGhkYuzX4nK0LWBnBvBcPOFPuQQkCGvy0E)
[**Are you outraged by the hypocrisy of leading Democrats who support Republican policies? You should be—but outrage is not enough. Can you join us today to reach more voters and inform them about ongoing patterns that the press refuses to observe?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTCxhAMhTRXK4t_BbI_sQ5MJcDLshT0v6Q38L2X821AIV2eoPvTdA6tbUUdzmkhAxFPGfGSFqaSmdgERg9VM0OqGCWIiu_x53zRvjrPHOeHDTNse12sMjlyiywArT4kyrhtrahqThoag9v9SMvCq0ZQ3i8pzBK4H8yL0kGRpC7VsQJhey1TYZjrzcXBjNKByoaSEJVNuMWxW7jcUJVXVvK5WSELHb74R4cwHV98FFB07NVJFw2UqBYL72EpCW0bA4-LJrcFkLuk0ITMp8MWPQ1mM/3mc/vANub3A7Tp63rEQtPwrF9A/h3/5femB3JbC2IXdENCqgJMeNC-vd01-IEE4Rn2Etkh4Ls) Many voices across the country, from Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution to Justice Democrats and the Sunrise Movement, rallied around Cisneros. clean_body: Yesterday's tragic events remind us all why we need change so desperately. | | | | | Dear Peter, Yesterday, the future took several steps backwards in Texas. We write to observe some patterns that you won't hear about from most news sources. The latest mass shooting left 21 young people dead at an elementary school in a mostly Latino neighborhood outside San Antonio, just a week after a white supremacist murdered 10 Black shoppers in a grocery store in Buffalo, NY. On the very same day that schoolchildren were executed en masse in Texas, local voters went to the polls for a runoff election in the 28th congressional district. Rather than embrace progressive challenger Jessica Cisneros, voters chose incumbent Henry Cuellar—a corporate Democrat backed by the National Rife Association who has also openly opposed abortion rights. Several patterns demand observation. First, Cuellar's margin of victory was absurdly fragile. Based on last night's preliminary results, he exceeded Cisneros by less than 200 votes, in an election in which over 50,000 people voted. In that context, Nancy Pelosi's outrageous support for Cuellar played a crucial role in keeping Cisneros out of the House, undermining widespread calls for both gun control and reproductive freedom. While the press is reporting on last night's election as a Cuellar victory, or as a Cisneros loss, it's ultimately a victory for Pelosi, Wall Street, and the corruption of the past as it continues to undermine any hope for the future. That's why it's important to hold leadership—who many other voices appear unwilling to name—accountable. And there's only one way to do that. clean_body: | | | Peter, This summer was supposed to be the summer of celebration. The pandemic is over, our kids are back in their summer activities, and everyone is loving the sunshine. But thanks to the radical left, it’s a Biden bummer summer. Families are struggling to feed their babies. Crime is soaring on streets that should be filled with children. And every American is filled with worry about what’s going to happen next. Republicans want to give you your carefree summer back, and with your support, they can stop the Democrat madness once and for all. As much as we love America, it’s a scary time to be an American, Peter. Our shelves look more like Soviet Russia than free America. The socialist left are eradicating our rights by the day, and our most vulnerable citizens are paying the price for their far-Left agenda. body:
We are so done with obstructionist Kyrsten Sinema’s refusal to do her job and protect our children. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q90NlbPYWTH0-MARZUEybBZaifUH1Td1kYzl3E8oULB8-8qIWaaVBco5YsAIkmvC5rmJR3PpFmC73FgNQ56oR0iOj0Y7cyuzmEDOQQOrTOfMhBbukv7vnuCTQI6Vi9CiPBVf7csigE8mJIqwJGEDwBU8QyojZY_ZDUFZd5t5_pNZw0DBmftclg_sVyjh75lT930MT48gcbJ89CzZejAqYR8yrJ5gNxUiM73Em6yZaZvTjCUoPG2Hd2jVddgOQt4z9FMabN-tt9rUsr2GP_W-97AUSQW3TZfCxCYi195xqxzaw/3mc/Cyt5jK6cTrmzHQwnMEjBfg/h0/I-Vj08qkdg-wb4CaUD8UpdwqgyauqVXdeydhrfl6KzA)
Peter, Kyrsten Sinema just stopped reporters outside of the Senate Chamber to tell them: no, she still won’t consider abolishing the filibuster and that she, **“[doesn’t] think that D.C. solutions are realistic here.”** To translate her Senate-speak: She plans to do jack sh*t about our children being gunned down in their classrooms. This is what Kyrsten Sinema has the audacity to say less than one day after the Uvalde school shooting — which killed 19 children and 2 teachers — and mere days after a racist mass shooting killed 10 Black residents of Buffalo, New York. How many more mass shootings will it take before Kyrsten Sinema will actually do her job and stop protecting the Jim Crow filibuster? **_[Sign our petition now to tell Sinema that we’re not going to accept her inaction. Demand she protect our children by helping end the filibuster to pass gun violence legislation.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38EryNTYwJV0jOktwvUvd77u3FRUb3OjmGZJmuV-rd8itjT3IGg6kjGZu6pvH20VhEKnCbJxxJS1l6fVlzGTZ96O6AVIvY84ln6jrr2b8_OWgDW2lJbUbetSHSHyfc2lPaAhaEVMK5rpwudFC2KVMB3SmEyV_2hUiuB36P5iIK58AOILgnNrrSFlDmw_xz9dqc3zgyaF9m07qZu4aWih6T_Ygfy7If8Rgdg2c1PsmzwBAEKQFJRQZ5L9ZsGkOdnUAbE8L2OgDr0qkLpMGMw7yHzi3jf8v1RKO6i7ggVu6R9mVktPanjT4zolgiW2gW-6Jz4qc8EcjWd9ClBe5vZnkxlr8A/3mc/Cyt5jK6cTrmzHQwnMEjBfg/h1/mqrNAtHN19k2iIK7feGgaTp1fk1c1RjQF2H90wqrdyI)_** **[Sign Now](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38EryNTYwJV0jOktwvUvd77u3HfUo8EBBTCbx2GUC60cdCRIlUC0fm6nkQsyy8LOIdoqke3i9uy6Y25uZHB3yy3f0lFxIjsxT_UkYKdE9wS3s_P-FF1hsgWUVI8Uc0WXPhQDfYg1GbMsfm2krh28Cr9Rol8p9U2pMcOKCE-Lz3CUs4BSfNCGUlVOIdHREhkwrjgCBWi2MqUMG2Q7e2m7F-B7-EHSdSaLDOD2uNj01aFm0mQK06Ytvrqv8vunImSi6FpFbpBJkfgDh9fXSUaJA9BwFvH1ycHveGi4CJCRda6q2DJa5HdwRDiX4qB5BRE1HnujH6AFwwJqYmDi35JHyQdkXA/3mc/Cyt5jK6cTrmzHQwnMEjBfg/h2/-CTRslL4eo0q_v0IP1kTDepxpf1mgh8PZHNY1cTgoNM)** Now is the time to talk about gun violence and now is the time to demand more from our politicians. Let’s be clear: **Kyrsten Sinema is a United States Senator with the power to write and pass laws that could prevent gun violence against our children. She simply refuses to.** This is a make-or-break moment to turn up the heat on Senator Sinema. We cannot let her continue to value the filibuster over human lives. **_[Sign our petition to demand that Sinema drops her support for the filibuster. We’re not going to allow another mass shooting to be followed up by inaction.](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmw35G2snBkLVgBX_kTVLNjI2ALgak5T5niqZ6H4MkRXBW_5UR-iEd2seJlsLICdazFqG4xKyDxcLQc-_5H148tKTp_2RRDu5kNuJYRC0yhLvrzKUKn301oJy6Eodcz2yQYv0aJx3SyCVm68sEb38EryNTYwJV0jOktwvUvd77u3PPAL-X4Wa9pPKprmenREpDoMLNMNA2laMA5oy-SFgCxq5EiPzPo-smTYSPgURN_eiMEVhtHjBkr-2aXleX9EKg-PP6QW3w9fi0u1WRjiLVVJFyawt4F2Vp1S-6_4zK7LYNKOJTmha1ZvEVSg-teyBdtn91CJnvmSyWJwntk8mnLbKd8wbVXo96C_vSOKqH8dD2anEnjfOtLc_bJMXybC9TN_jOh1FphXoyrMcvcsL6jThZjdChVNZa3DA93oR1GKrC50bV1i1zLocVFuNqeU9HFJ12mbzs0_htOL4mdUoi7lZqugr25bCk_Q_a3smI5qw/3mc/Cyt5jK6cTrmzHQwnMEjBfg/h3/fk6ztcRf7rNQufJz2tbQDfhJSk7sx5H5-4ObKggD4iQ)_** Together, The Primary Sinema Project P.S. Don’t forget to keep calling Kyrsten Sinema’s Senate office at **(202) 224-4521.** We won’t stop telling her she has a responsibility to act to end gun violence. And that means ending the filibuster so we can pass real gun reforms.

clean_body: We are so done with obstructionist Kyrsten Sinema’s refusal to do her job and protect our children. | | | Peter, Kyrsten Sinema just stopped reporters outside of the Senate Chamber to tell them: no, she still won’t consider abolishing the filibuster and that she, “[doesn’t] think that D.C. solutions are realistic here.” To translate her Senate-speak: She plans to do jack sht about our children being gunned down in their classrooms. This is what Kyrsten Sinema has the audacity to say less than one day after the Uvalde school shooting — which killed 19 children and 2 teachers — and mere days after a racist mass shooting killed 10 Black residents of Buffalo, New York. How many more mass shootings will it take before Kyrsten Sinema will actually do her job and stop protecting the Jim Crow filibuster? Now is the time to talk about gun violence and now is the time to demand more from our politicians. Let’s be clear: Kyrsten Sinema is a United States Senator with the power to write and pass laws that could prevent gun violence against our children. She simply refuses to. This is a make-or-break moment to turn up the heat on Senator Sinema. We cannot let her continue to value the filibuster over human lives. Together, The Primary Sinema Project P.S. Don’t forget to keep calling Kyrsten Sinema’s Senate office at (202) 224-4521. We won’t stop telling her she has a responsibility to act to end gun violence. And that means ending the filibuster so we can pass real gun reforms. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC | | Sent via . subject: We must enact common sense gun laws immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| The death toll in Uvalde, TX is now 19 children and 2 adults, with many more wounded. My heart hurts for the families and the victims in Uvalde whose innocent lives have been taken or permanently altered by senseless gun violence.

As sad as I am, I am also angry that politicians, like Elise Stefanik, continue to fail families across the country by putting special interests ahead of our kids’ safety and letting this be just one more crisis they refuse to solve.

**I am running for Congress to keep our communities safe.**

**[Add your name to this petition today to stand with me in the fight to enact common sense gun laws immediately before more innocent lives are taken.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45740233/347271274/2147091772?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_20220525_1_1&refcode2=9bc8288d-79dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM4Mjg4ZC03OWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qVFLr1ru3F3xZDdpZA5Zp0hOkxpj2ttU5N-uItNAco=&emci=350c0196-78dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=9bc8288d-79dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15140246)**

The vast majority of gun owners and our law enforcement agree that common sense measures can and should be taken without harming law-abiding gun owners. We must come together around universal background checks and keeping guns out of the hands of unlawful gun owners and those who are a danger to themselves and others.

It’s time to put politics aside and take action to keep families whole, healthy, and safe. **[If you agree, sign this petition to make your voice heard.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45740235/347271276/2147091772?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_20220525_1_1&refcode2=9bc8288d-79dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmM4Mjg4ZC03OWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3qVFLr1ru3F3xZDdpZA5Zp0hOkxpj2ttU5N-uItNAco=&emci=350c0196-78dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=9bc8288d-79dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15140246)**

Matt Castelli

name: Latham Saddler
subject: Thank you
body:
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Greetings!

Melissa and I wanted to give you our most sincere thanks for supporting us on this mission over the past year. It's because of great Americans like you who believed in our mission that we accomplished so much during that time. You encouraged us, worked on the ground for us, put your name on the line to spread the word to your networks, contributed financially, hosted us and prayed for us. For each part you played in our campaign, THANK YOU. We will look back on our efforts with great pride in the race we ran and the incredible patriots like you who joined us.
We owe a special thanks to our incredible Campaign staff who took on this tremendous challenge with the utmost positive attitude and dedication. You are great Americans and we are so proud of the work you did.
The future is still looking bright for our state and country. Let's work together to make the red wave happen in November!
---
|
---
| Gratefully, Latham
---
|
---
|

name: Burt Jones for Georgia
subject: BURT JONES DECLARES VICTORY IN REPUBLICAN PRIMARY RACE FOR GEORGIA LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA, INC
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE WEDNESDAY, MAY 25, 2022
BURT JONES DECLARES VICTORY IN REPUBLICAN PRIMARY RACE FOR GEORGIA LIEUTENANT GOVERNOR
JACKSON, Ga. - Today, State Senator and Conservative businessman Burt Jones is declaring victory without a runoff in his Republican Primary election for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia with over 99.37 percent of results reported. Burt won 153 of 159 counties and received over 210,000 more votes than his next closest competitor. Burt appreciates the spirited primary debate from his opponents-and will now work to unify the party ahead of the general election in November against a Democrat opponent yet to be determined. Following his win, Burt issued the following statement:
Burt Jones said, "What a great and hard-fought win! Jan and I are so grateful to the people of Georgia for their vote of confidence, and I am truly honored to be the Republican nominee for Lieutenant Governor. This was a spirited campaign-but we worked hard every day to share our positive vision, and it clearly resonated with voters across the state. While we narrowly avoided a runoff, we won 153 of 159 counties and received over 210,000 more votes than our next closest competitor. Now is the time to unite as a party and stand together against whichever Democrat candidate emerges-and I look forward to working together with my primary opponents to do just that.
As we shift toward the general election, our message will remain the same: Working together, we're going to eliminate our state income tax and put money back into the pockets of hardworking Georgians, improve our K-12 education system by empowering parents and teachers, stand with our law enforcement to reduce crime and protect Georgia families, and strengthen the integrity and transparency of our elections.
And let me be clear: No matter which Democrat candidate emerges from their intraparty fight, he will have to answer for the skyrocketing inflation, record-high gas prices, surging crime and supply chain issues that Georgians are facing every day due to the failed policies of their party. In the meantime, our campaign will be focused on offering real solutions to these issues and more as we work to improve the lives of every family in our state.
Again, thank you for helping us achieve this big win-and rest assured, the best is yet to come as we work toward a big win in November! God Bless!"
---
| |
---

subject: Thank you
body:
For all your support |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b697958c84&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| | Friend,

>From the bottom of my heart, **I want to thank you for your support over the course of our campaign.**

Our campaign was about everyday, hard working Georgians who want and expect a better and brighter future for themselves and their families.

We came up short, but I still believe that our brightest days are still ahead for the United States of America because of people like you. The spirit of America can never be broken, and that alone is worth fighting for.

Thank you for believing in me and our campaign to take our country back. I will never forget meeting so many of you on this journey together.

Nicole and I will forever be grateful for all of your hard work and dedication.

God Bless,

David Curry
---
|
---
| | **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=a15cf45564&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=892e065174&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b3a520f0be&e=598f6aa24c)**

Friend,

I am humbled beyond words.

**Thanks to the tremendous support of voters in the Peach State,_I just secured the REPUBLICAN nomination for the United States Senate from Georgia._**

My opponent, **Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock,** is completely out of touch with the people and values of Georgia, so it’s time for a change. With my friend, the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, and EVERY America First patriot behind us, we will WIN this November.

[**STAND WITH ME >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4a042aa646e34c87875d55f7568734ba&_e=eOCDhX9ZhlBtdP9t0QCZFwe_k2qZt-HmJ8UXq5-RJI8RlUnZIkCnZw4mQ8KceaRvLtTjJ6tU3PT34JUGPSjUh1g3Yy5Tn4eT-XyDsC56JESp3EeS0Na1dtpMvVDIEyZoVktREga_NwBoM4eKV7Rcey0f2lEoyKT0sq5h3Ddijmx-Q-CdoVzyWNeBz-T6CKU9M4H6fhWvtNIw2JMinMl96s5Vm8hjKlF3JEYZRD1w3TZPl6sbgR8PO3eDU0gXt23AL0-1nqDZZmBm3_QeJGZkkbb_7_wVCwyTAgAs9e-KuRTN0W1oHGPi4hAg85cHY7_26BVwboXDWQitTCHTW8nd9q1Af4zl_I3HNURxK7v5cf1t04Kk2ugj9WJISuco7KiVhoIEkdE_pplzTVAtGq57FR_AW8hmyGtpagHfcmNpqG2BiA0V7yVtY2hZtlbqgvsL_SkU21SWIgO8v_Q1OlipTtO8AfIdo4aWtv26N51xYZAtOEbBkegWhpOobmAlkDUn)
