clean_body: We have to win this November to save our country from the Left Friend, I am humbled beyond words. Thanks to the tremendous support of voters in the Peach State,I just secured the REPUBLICAN nomination for the United States Senate from Georgia. My opponent, Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock, is completely out of touch with the people and values of Georgia, so it’s time for a change. With my friend, the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump, and EVERY America First patriot behind us, we will WIN this November. Senator Warnock is the #1 fundraiser in the country, and he has already amassed a MASSIVE war chest to fight back. My opponent and the national Democrats are planning a massive advertising blitz of 60 MILLION DOLLARS – and they will use every dollar to attack us and our conservative values. That’s why I’m calling on you, Friend, to stand with us and help bolster our efforts to restore our conservative majority in the United States Senate. President Trump, Georgia, and OUR country are counting on you. Will you answer the call? I want to thank every American who supported our movement and every dedicated Georgian who put their trust in me. Now it’s time to focus on DEFEATING Raphael Warnock, who is considered the most vulnerable Democrat senator in the country. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Senate Nominee for Georgia If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Josh Riley
subject: A parent's worst nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Yesterday’s news is any dad's worst nightmare, and I'm heartbroken for the families experiencing this nightmare in Uvalde.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741314/347275929/-1126184350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjE0YjFkNS03ZmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=obmTK9K_q87xFWhTeqC2jDbrp_4ArwSXZR7jaWxkUQU=&emci=fd4d60cf-6adc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3b14b1d5-7fdc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4588596)
---
| Yesterday’s news is any dad's worst nightmare, and I'm heartbroken for the families experiencing it in Uvalde. The mass murder of little kids in school is not normal, and it cannot be normalized.

Thoughts and prayers are not enough. I’m tired of hearing excuse after excuse from career politicians while parents and children live in fear.

**We need urgent action.**

As counsel on the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee following the mass shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School, I worked on a package of common-sense proposals, supported by the vast majority of Americans, to keep dangerous weapons out of the hands of those who would use them to do harm.

**We can’t wait any longer for Congress to pass legislation to curb this senseless violence and prevent the next tragedy.**

This tragic and unacceptable situation shouldn’t still be happening in America.

Monica and I are praying for the Uvalde community.

_Josh Riley_
---

* * *

name: Team Hassan
subject: join us in taking action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Like you, we're heartbroken over the news out of Uvalde, Texas. Nineteen children and two teachers are dead as a result of another mass shooting.
| | |
---
Hi there –

Like you, we're heartbroken over the news out of Uvalde, Texas. 21 people – including 19 young children and two of their teachers – were killed yesterday in a horrifying mass shooting.

We're devastated for the victims, their loved ones, for their community, and for our country that has once again suffered a terrible tragedy as a result of gun violence.

Let us be clear: We owe it to Uvalde – and to all of the communities impacted by senseless acts of gun violence – to take action. **Words are not enough: Congress must act now to pass commonsense gun safety reform measures.**

Maggie Hassan has proudly supported commonsense gun safety measures in the Senate, and she'll continue to work to prevent future tragedies like this one. But she can't do this without your support.

**[_Will you add your name now to a petition calling on Congress to pass commonsense gun safety reform in the wake of this horrible tragedy? name: Brian Mast (R-FL)
subject: Victory!

Peter, This is Brian Mast here reaching out on behalf of Navy Special Operations vet Hung Cao, who has just emerged **VICTORIOUS** in last Saturday’s Primary Election! In a 11-way primary, this American hero who knows what it means to fight for our country has come out on top. And this tremendous victory was only possible thanks to a team of patriots like YOU rallying by his side! _But Peter, our work isn’t done yet..._ Because now that Hung is the nominee, his next test is defeating a radical Democrat incumbent who is sure to have the full backing of Nancy Pelosi and the liberal fundraising machine. As someone who lost his legs fighting for America, trust me when I say that we need Hung’s battle-tested leadership in Congress! If we help him over the finish line in this ultra-competitive district, it’s going to be one of the keys to taking back the House! **Hung Cao has personally lived the American Dream and fought for Democracy all over the globe.** [**Will you help build on the momentum of his Primary victory and ensure this veteran comes out on top in November?**](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=4973ee9fa04847e1ab053571a7ea4bc5&_e=OQVDcko4gwOhhzjJeCzTW77NqfXDkbGoW6al6-1xngckAJJpl_rfg8OR4_vb3rEpk-Q0VuxZGIgbnkRRo0miE4mHsMpkBmjUS1vpZTRlQ0BotwFMeRuKZuRoFXNYvcdkgVjq-oaE7_WDqiGHOQAusCLmLddBl8TqjYAfYNs1dDQ9v422PybbcdnQWM-x0XgEibWIwG6Nk9QT6n-gY0RchIJJdIGwkEaL2oEnJ1XotXZWvKKhNvwPfmja-mIDS8SunBi62T470dc9v8X6XKKk-QC40SE56OOsYxQpazIN8hJ5UZcdjwa67qw3TsQPj4qaQDPs-1ga_Yem7WjZfD3lYOBYWMHyv2i8ROr8m4zUgFb3PFApThDcte7RmoFw7QV3eLvofukY2Hdz66f59HpCJsVqbRGMD7SCrdHlrVGR5tYNp40QmfXyVJhkMId5T9Ac)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: A Texas elementary school...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741417/347276442/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODhmMzA3MC04MGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJd7UQ_Pv9LlCmnMjuhkO-_yyC89eonmRoebnIVuk90=)
Friends, Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and happy memories. They should not be places of horror and nightmares. Yesterday’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech and Sandy Hook. Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious. I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic. I know there are members of Congress who are afraid of what will happen if they cross the gun lobby and vote for any piece of gun safety legislation. But I also know that fear is nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets. Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kids school. Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate yesterday, “What are we doing?” Congress knows how to solve this problem. Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms. They know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis. They just need the courage to act. And if they do not act, then we must elect a Congress that will. Michael Bennet has been a leader in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence, and I am proud to stand with him in this fight. But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to get it done. **[Please split a contribution between my work at Giffords PAC to change our gun laws and Michael Bennet's re-election campaign for Senate where he will continue to lead on the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741418/347276443/-1043517305?refcode2=488f3070-80dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODhmMzA3MC04MGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJd7UQ_Pv9LlCmnMjuhkO-_yyC89eonmRoebnIVuk90=)** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation between Michael Bennet and Giffords PAC will go through immediately:_** ****** ** | | | ******[Split $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741419/347276444/-1043517305?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220525_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODhmMzA3MC04MGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJd7UQ_Pv9LlCmnMjuhkO-_yyC89eonmRoebnIVuk90=)******

I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe.
Thank you for standing with me and Michael in this struggle.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

clean_body: Today’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history | = Friends, Our nation’s schools should be the safest places in our communities, full of learning, fun and happy memories. They should not be places of horror and nightmares. Yesterday’s school shooting in Texas is now the third deadliest school shooting in modern U.S. history, behind only Virginia Tech and Sandy Hook. Speaking is still physically difficult for me, but my feelings are crystal clear: I am furious. I am furious with those who have the power to act and save lives but are afraid to do anything to end this uniquely American epidemic. I know there are members of Congress who are afraid of what will happen if they cross the gun lobby and vote for any piece of gun safety legislation. But I also know that fear is nothing like the fear those children in Texas felt as their lives and the lives of their classmates ended in a hail of bullets. Or the fear the parents must have felt when they were alerted that there was an active shooter situation happening at their kids school. Senator Chris Murphy said it best to his colleagues in the Senate yesterday, “What are we doing?” Congress knows how to solve this problem. Congress knows the steps we can take to protect our kids in their classrooms. They know because this is the only country in the developed world where this kind of slaughter happens on a routine basis. They just need the courage to act. And if they do not act, then we must elect a Congress that will. Michael Bennet has been a leader in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence, and I am proud to stand with him in this fight. But we cannot do this alone. We need your help to get it done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation between Michael Bennet and Giffords PAC will go through immediately: **** | | | ****=** | **=** ** | | ****=** | **=** ** | | ****=** | **=** I will not rest until we have righted the wrong our elected officials in Congress have done, and until we have changed our laws so we can finally look our parents in the face and say: we are doing everything we can to keep your children safe. Thank you for standing with me and Michael in this struggle. With courage, Gabby Giffords Giffords PAC works to reduce gun violence and save lives by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. name: Kirsten Engel
subject: A call no parent wants to receive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741438/347276494/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNWI2NjI4OC04MGRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UceQHxBYkbzE5XDG9-XNp34lhml8UTduHcSYv-NDX2U=&emci=b01f17ba-4edc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=25b66288-80dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=12898431)
---

It's a call no parent should ever receive. But I've received it, and countless other parents have as well.
That terrified call from your child whispering on the other end of the phone crouching under her desk in lockdown because a suspected gunman has approached the school.
Thank God in my situation no harm ensued. The same cannot be said for the families of the children and adults murdered yesterday by an armed 18-year old in Texas or the families of the Sandy Hook child-victims, or those of the dozens upon dozens of senseless tragic shootings that make up the epidemic of gun violence in our nation.
_Because it is an epidemic._
And we can take action against an epidemic. Congress MUST pass common sense gun safety laws that a large majority of Americans support, whether they are Democrats or Republicans, or gun-owners or not. These include universal background checks, closing loopholes such as those allowing weapons to be purchased at gun shows without a background check, and an assault weapons ban.
Victims of gun violence don't need more thoughts and prayers. They need action and resolve.
Sincerely,
Kirsten
---

Tucson, AZ 85717

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: This isn’t freedom, this is terror.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter, it's Abby. The horrific news out of Texas left my heart broken.
Right now, there should be 19 kids in Texas sitting down to dinner, just a few days away from summer vacation. Instead, they were shot and killed in an elementary school in the United States of America. So yes, I am heartbroken, but I am also furious.
We have a problem in America that no other country is battling. This horrific act of violence comes just days after 10 people in a grocery store were shot and killed because of the color of their skin. **This should not be happening. This doesn't have to happen.**
I was in elementary school when Columbine happened. Nearly two decades later, I voted for commonsense gun legislation – known as H.R. 8 – while representing Iowans in the U.S. House. The bill would have helped protect our children. But it was blocked when it got to the Senate by senators like Chuck Grassley.

Sen. Grassley has sat on his hands in Washington for 47 years while our children are being murdered in a place that they should feel safe: their schools. He's had nearly FIVE DECADES to take action to end this horrible, unnecessary violence. But he kept on sitting there, along with nearly every single one of his GOP colleagues, refusing to take real action to stop it. He has changed nothing. He has failed every single one of us.
**This tragedy is on every spineless politician who has refused to put commonsense gun laws into place.** Tragedy after tragedy, we end up here again. It’s horrific. This isn’t freedom – this is terror.
To win real change, to elect leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby, we all have a part to play. I will _always_ fight to keep our kids and our communities safe and do everything within my power to win the legislative change our country desperately needs. Today I am heartbroken; I am furious; I am resolved.
I hope that you will join me in this fight, and that you hug your loved ones a little tighter today.
– Abby

clean_body: | | | Peter, it's Abby. The horrific news out of Texas left my heart broken. Right now, there should be 19 kids in Texas sitting down to dinner, just a few days away from summer vacation. Instead, they were shot and killed in an elementary school in the United States of America. So yes, I am heartbroken, but I am also furious. We have a problem in America that no other country is battling. This horrific act of violence comes just days after 10 people in a grocery store were shot and killed because of the color of their skin. This should not be happening. This doesn't have to happen. I was in elementary school when Columbine happened. Nearly two decades later, I voted for commonsense gun legislation – known as H.R. 8 – while representing Iowans in the U.S. House. The bill would have helped protect our children. But it was blocked when it got to the Senate by senators like Chuck Grassley. Sen. Grassley has sat on his hands in Washington for 47 years while our children are being murdered in a place that they should feel safe: their schools. He's had nearly FIVE DECADES to take action to end this horrible, unnecessary violence. But he kept on sitting there, along with nearly every single one of his GOP colleagues, refusing to take real action to stop it. He has changed nothing. He has failed every single one of us. This tragedy is on every spineless politician who has refused to put commonsense gun laws into place. Tragedy after tragedy, we end up here again. It’s horrific. This isn’t freedom – this is terror. To win real change, to elect leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby, we all have a part to play. I will always fight to keep our kids and our communities safe and do everything within my power to win the legislative change our country desperately needs. Today I am heartbroken; I am furious; I am resolved. I hope that you will join me in this fight, and that you hug your loved ones a little tighter today. – Abby | | = | |

name: Alex Lasry
subject: We need action and we need it now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Today, I’m asking you to sign your name to my petition urging Congress to take action RIGHT NOW. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741461/347276664/462565898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjMzMjkzOS04MWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RT_4Qf33gIS8EXQ82WPuF2abAGXkJAWJKj9lu__bLs=&emci=736f8a2a-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=46332939-81dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659600)

Peter,

I write this with a heavy heart.

Once again, children are dead.

Once again, our country faced another mass shooting.

Once again, we mourn and pray.

But these children and families need more than thoughts and prayers.

**_We need action and we need it now._**

I support passing universal background checks, imposing waiting limits on the purchase of firearms, and banning assault weapons. These common-sense gun reform laws are supported by the majority of Americans. We must do everything we can to protect our children and loved ones, including abolishing the filibuster to pass common-sense gun reform laws.

**[Today, I’m asking you to sign your name to my petition urging Congress to take action RIGHT NOW. We can’t wait for another tragedy to occur.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741462/347276665/396450884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjMzMjkzOS04MWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RT_4Qf33gIS8EXQ82WPuF2abAGXkJAWJKj9lu__bLs=&emci=736f8a2a-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=46332939-81dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659600)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741463/347276666/396450884?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjMzMjkzOS04MWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6RT_4Qf33gIS8EXQ82WPuF2abAGXkJAWJKj9lu__bLs=&emci=736f8a2a-6ddc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=46332939-81dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=18659600)** Thank you,

name: Ron Wyden
subject: This is an epidemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741535/347277109/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZiOWVjYy04MmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5CUTv0SbAAzN2v0zYPCqXJC4UFKNCdXnp7kMiGCuVM=&emci=46af9df6-6edc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=18fb9ecc-82dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9818364)
---

| | This email was hard to write. It makes me sick to my stomach. Once again, this week, another community is forced to bury children who have died from senseless gun violence. This time it was in Texas. Enough is enough. **The Senate must vote on commonsense gun legislation**** _immediately_****.** This is beyond not normal. The next thing I'm going to say is very difficult, and very real. **We are forcing parents to drop off their children at school each morning, wondering if their community could be next. We are forcing our nation's future to sit through active shooter drills instead of playing and learning. So let me repeat: this is not normal.** Mass shooting after mass shooting, Senate Republicans offer empty thoughts and prayers for dead children while they continue to cash their checks from the NRA, profiting off of inaction. And the result is utter devastation, family after family destroyed. **Thoughts and prayers cannot save the next classroom, the next teacher, the next lives shattered in a flurry of automatic gunfire.** Our democracy, however, can take a big step to finally say: _no more_. **I'll be working as hard as I can to ensure commonsense gun safety legislation gets a vote on the floor of the Senate as soon as possible, and then every American can see which senators are prioritizing their campaign donations over the lives of children.** _Ron_ |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.
---|---
| This email was sent by **[Ron Wyden](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45741536/347277110/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGZiOWVjYy04MmRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j5CUTv0SbAAzN2v0zYPCqXJC4UFKNCdXnp7kMiGCuVM=&emci=46af9df6-6edc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=18fb9ecc-82dc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9818364)**

clean_body: | | | This email was hard to write. It makes me sick to my stomach. Once again, this week, another community is forced to bury children who have died from senseless gun violence. This time it was in Texas. Enough is enough. The Senate must vote on commonsense gun legislation immediately. This is beyond not normal. The next thing I'm going to say is very difficult, and very real. We are forcing parents to drop off their children at school each morning, wondering if their community could be next. We are forcing our nation's future to sit through active shooter drills instead of playing and learning. So let me repeat: this is not normal. Mass shooting after mass shooting, Senate Republicans offer empty thoughts and prayers for dead children while they continue to cash their checks from the NRA, profiting off of inaction. And the result is utter devastation, family after family destroyed. Thoughts and prayers cannot save the next classroom, the next teacher, the next lives shattered in a flurry of automatic gunfire. Our democracy, however, can take a big step to finally say: no more. I'll be working as hard as I can to ensure commonsense gun safety legislation gets a vote on the floor of the Senate as soon as possible, and then every American can see which senators are prioritizing their campaign donations over the lives of children. Ron | ---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Fellow Conservative

Though we posted strong numbers in our primary election on May 3rd, **we did not reach our goal of picking up the 20,000 endorsements we set out to collect ahead of the vote**.

Some say that our district should be safe for Republicans in November, but with almost half the district as “new territory”, we are not taking any chances. **The way people lose is to forget who they are, where they come from and who they represent.** I’ve seen former colleagues make this mistake before; I made a vow to myself to never become complacent.

So, here we are once again, **six months until Election Day,** and if we learned anything from the Supreme Court leak last week, the entire political landscape can be changed by a single event.

I’m gearing up for the election to safe this country, and **[I would truly appreciate seeing your name on the list of supporters who have personally endorsed me for reelection.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=b5c6b565e8c043edad01e13a3d15c91b&_e=wmBDUmPcLrtFQZHlH5pD2N7rjGbQd84oxdBDLegVCOrKFQGJSzo4sa-8E1sCBcS_m2jMuXmdjt72JU-G4SAnUWpR4ZqQUndtCnD0mMqsaos-DFM-wh_ad6IBRFic43bD-hUhzAgqr4OyjSHVCF0xKAFB_O1isDxbhgRMfZQxWGEMsBWcS3kNF3likYpV7xwzrlYBvBiuZ0BDhzyRATPpQvHtXHoQOK_qzOWFemx1HT_hAVmcbMioKaGG1KsQHipD3os9tGLPJUk96R2ru3zESp0BMePMe5jvo1PzESNLx25e7znloCU1dx-MAs6MGWBwlVw3nRyNOC3zTZegc-Gc2s06hZAvOf32kxTpKncUqdDQyobRGc3eiUla60NhHCl_jzmEs58MM_jo5roMGL3X4CGx6owchhWLoeJR9szVA4dZAYg4bYBh7dq1L3vw2dbwzyOcHHWIFznwcfM_acl3Thce6e1RrEYiTC0Vve9SKNI4QIstrELBv7mirKhkGzQJmqEgYTOC82keFOR8Jx9WKQ%3D%3D)** I’m asking if you have the time, please consider doing so today.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: American horror
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Republicans cower behind their fake talking points about being “pro-life,” but stand in the way of stopping this carnage.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=282%2E5257348%2EQ8dQE9)
I’m so tired, Derek. I know you are too.
Tired of the moments of silence.
Tired of the BS about “thoughts and prayers” after each mass shooting from legislators who won’t do anything about it.
Just tired. And I know millions upon millions of other Americans are tired too. Just like you.
_It shouldn’t be this way. It doesn’t have to be this way._
Republicans cower behind their fake talking points about being “pro-life,” but stand in the way of stopping this carnage.
Enough. _Enough._
The shooting at Robb Elementary in Uvalde, Texas is a tragedy we have seen over and over and over again. Gunshots ring like echoes down long hallways, from one side of the country to another.
From our children’s schools in Uvalde, to Santa Fe, Parkland, Newtown, and Columbine.
Our houses of worship in Laguna Woods, Pittsburgh, Poway, and Sutherland Springs.
To stores in Buffalo, El Paso, and Boulder.
Places of entertainment in Las Vegas, Orlando, and Aurora.
My heart aches for the families devastated by this tragedy and the Uvalde community. For each family and community that has experienced these horrors firsthand. But more than that, I want to _do something_ about it. I want Congress to stop talking about it, and _do something._
Our children are dying. _Our children are dying because they are being shot in school. Our children for God’s sake._
**The _Washington Post_ recently reported _300,000 of our children have been exposed to gun violence at school since Columbine._ We can do something about it — but the GOP won’t stand up to the gun lobby.**
Shameful doesn’t begin to cover it. Spineless doesn’t begin to cover it.
Republican cowards will complain that enough time hasn’t passed since the massacre of children in Uvalde.
But the Sandy Hook kids started high school this year.
The Columbine kids are raising their own families today.
And the NRA convention in Houston starts on Friday.
We’ve had enough time. It’s time to act.
And be ready to take on hell or high water to protect our kids,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=282%2E5257348%2EQ8dQE9) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=282%2E5257348%2EQ8dQE9)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuxCAM_ZpkS0TIQdIhw0lVtquqqlJHBMbk0AWIgLTq35f02qlDJS_2e35-fnrSoGUHtZ0ooZQwyroHxhlpRz6eKKJSoAjhhlcnIleMuY247Wq1IH2W6WZCBGwhuPo6kRGIGTlnSnEwRpq-H6Tq1ND1bDCM1W8XcZF2tX55kg6nmI2ISXgpJNgGddrjO34K1tBSVHT1Ol1z3lLVnys6lwrGYExt2Y3HfQjRlz4Hj22ISyGg3kFmG7y4ax1r_bxnJ1LYi9Gqf9xiSBtCLiYqyg_Ioba7KxC6Yu5nCNJt0i7-GP8RvTOCz-hzITyfm5fXufkNsI6T3j7sutrEhxLbcsh-R5T_ffkLkESHQw) [[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuxCAM_ZpkS0TIQdIhw0lVtquqqlJHBMbk0AWIgLTq35f02qlDJS_2e35-fnrSoGUHtZ0ooZQwyroHxhlpRz6eKKJSoAjhhlcnIleMuY247Wq1IH2W6WZCBGwhuPo6kRGIGTlnSnEwRpq-H6Tq1ND1bDCM1W8XcZF2tX55kg6nmI2ISXgpJNgGddrjO34K1tBSVHT1Ol1z3lLVnys6lwrGYExt2Y3HfQjRlz4Hj22ISyGg3kFmG7y4ax1r_bxnJ1LYi9Gqf9xiSBtCLiYqyg_Ioba7KxC6Yu5nCNJt0i7-GP8RvTOCz-hzITyfm5fXufkNsI6T3j7sutrEhxLbcsh-R5T_ffkLkESHQw)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuxCAM_ZpkS0TIQdIhw0lVtquqqlJHBMbk0AWIgLTq35f02qlDJS_2e35-fnrSoGUHtZ0ooZQwyroHxhlpRz6eKKJSoAjhhlcnIleMuY247Wq1IH2W6WZCBGwhuPo6kRGIGTlnSnEwRpq-H6Tq1ND1bDCM1W8XcZF2tX55kg6nmI2ISXgpJNgGddrjO34K1tBSVHT1Ol1z3lLVnys6lwrGYExt2Y3HfQjRlz4Hj22ISyGg3kFmG7y4ax1r_bxnJ1LYi9Gqf9xiSBtCLiYqyg_Ioba7KxC6Yu5nCNJt0i7-GP8RvTOCz-hzITyfm5fXufkNsI6T3j7sutrEhxLbcsh-R5T_ffkLkESHQw) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFULFuxCAM_ZpkS0TIQdIhw0lVtquqqlJHBMbk0AWIgLTq35f02qlDJS_2e35-fnrSoGUHtZ0ooZQwyroHxhlpRz6eKKJSoAjhhlcnIleMuY247Wq1IH2W6WZCBGwhuPo6kRGIGTlnSnEwRpq-H6Tq1ND1bDCM1W8XcZF2tX55kg6nmI2ISXgpJNgGddrjO34K1tBSVHT1Ol1z3lLVnys6lwrGYExt2Y3HfQjRlz4Hj22ISyGg3kFmG7y4ax1r_bxnJ1LYi9Gqf9xiSBtCLiYqyg_Ioba7KxC6Yu5nCNJt0i7-GP8RvTOCz-hzITyfm5fXufkNsI6T3j7sutrEhxLbcsh-R5T_ffkLkESHQw) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: Action Needed
subject: re: gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Our nation is reeling today as we pick up the pieces after yet another devastating and senseless act of gun violence. Two communities across our country were ripped apart after 10 people were killed in an attack targeting Black Americans in Buffalo, New York, less than two weeks ago -- and yesterday, at least 21 were killed in an attack targeting children in Uvalde, Texas.

Today is the 145th day of the year. And there have now been at least 198 mass shootings _this year alone_. There have been more mass killings due to gun violence than there have been days in 2022. Let that sink in for a moment.

We all agree that something needs to be done, but for years, Mitch McConnell has blocked commonsense gun safety measures despite their overwhelming bipartisan support from regular Americans across our country.

But Democrats CANNOT be silent right now. We need to stand up and show Mitch McConnell that we -- the American people -- are more powerful than the gun lobby. We need to show McConnell that we will not sit idly by as he stonewalls progress yet again -- _refusing to save more communities from having to endure the horrific devastation Uvalde is now experiencing,_ while offering his hollow thoughts and prayers.

**This time must be different.**

Will you do your part to show Republicans that it's past time we did something to stop the epidemic of gun violence in America?

| **Do you agree that we need to take action RIGHT NOW to pass commonsense gun safety reforms?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/signup/email-dscc-rr-gun-safety-petition-2022-pros?t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220525-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220525-ActionNeeded-GunReformRF-Pros-sl1&akid=4471%2E9716520%2EAKoboe)

Team DSCC

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I am furious, and I am ashamed that this is what our country has been reduced to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It does not have to be this way.
#
Peter,
I am heartbroken by the news that at least 19 children and 2 teachers were shot and murdered at an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. This tragic mass shooting follows the deadly white supremacist mass shooting in Buffalo just 10 days ago and Sandy Hook nearly a decade earlier.
It is impossible to process these horrific murders and the scale of trauma for the surviving families. As a country, too, we are forced to grapple with the pain, anger, and grief as these horrible tragedies keep happening.
[**Right now, I ask that you join me and review The Washington Post’s guide to help the families in Uvalde right now. If you’re in a position to donate or help out in another way, please consider doing so.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13897?t=1&akid=1292%2E420207%2EKgV6wW)
I am furious, and I am ashamed that this is what our country has been reduced to. I am enraged by the hollowness of any condolences from those who offer prayers but do nothing to change the conditions that have allowed this and countless other shootings to be possible.
We cannot separate these shootings from the constant cries for more guns from Republicans in the U.S. Senate and House, Governor’s mansions, and state legislatures.
It does not have to be this way. Our children are dying because the U.S. Senate refuses to act, and because Republicans continue to push for more guns instead of taking guns off the streets. This isn’t inevitable. We have an obligation as public servants to interrupt this relentless march of violence. I will continue the fight to do so. Enough has to be enough.
Take care of yourself, and [**take a look at the guide for helping families in Uvalde if you have a chance.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/13897?t=2&akid=1292%2E420207%2EKgV6wW)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220525-1292-footer&t=3&refcode2=1292_420207_KgV6wW&akid=1292%2E420207%2EKgV6wW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=1292%2E420207%2EKgV6wW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1292%2E420207%2EKgV6wW)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Kina Collins
subject: The time to act is now.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
This gun violence epidemic is not going to wait for us to do something about it. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk6rIT4MKsdApLwSchBg2XPbIHezZcOJputz0hPDCOe6O2OEYmK6idnX6jnhMsxDjk0MafhTCjPPgqJy9BqbqE0iFFiNGLuckx13di3-OrEwET3Kl5ESZ6Wi5tRajoWaj0XTbvnR00xThSGV7OG3utHO_S6qPmVsFk7pIVZoCbe1ukcQbtrdtAxh-WfKjqkBWNU/3mc/zkGjCFe9QqOHE3G_EB7S7A/h0/yBPwX8vhSdGzj1-2IrGtArYg6pgsWnywbWsy56AhK0Y) Dear Team, Yesterday, at least 22 people were killed–including 19 children and 2 teachers in an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. The deadliest shooting at a school since the 2012 shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School. I am heartbroken and I am mad as hell. Nineteen children and two teachers had their lives stolen by a gun violence epidemic our leaders refuse to do anything about. This is a policy choice. Ten years after the devastating attack on Sandy Hook Elementary, kids in this country are still not safe in their own schools. Enough empty statements and hollow promises, we need immediate action from our leaders to pass gun safety legislation now and hold the NRA and gun lobby accountable for emboldening this epidemic. We must ban assault rifles, pass universal background check legislation, close dangerous loopholes, and end legislation that protects the gun lobby and their corporate donors. But we also must combat gun violence at its root cause, like what we see every day in Chicago: poverty. We need to invest in our communities and our schools - to provide children with the necessary wraparound services, care, and support they need to prevent tragic attacks like these in the first place. With a Democratic majority in Congress and a Democratic President, we cannot allow the GOP to control our policy priorities. It has been only days since the white supremacist attack in Buffalo that left ten Black people dead. This gun violence epidemic is not going to wait for us to do something about it. **The time to act is now.
** In Solidarity, Kina Collins

clean_body: This gun violence epidemic is not going to wait for us to do something about it. | | | Dear Team, Yesterday, at least 22 people were killed–including 19 children and 2 teachers in an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas. The deadliest shooting at a school since the 2012 shooting at Sandy Hook Elementary School. I am heartbroken and I am mad as hell. Nineteen children and two teachers had their lives stolen by a gun violence epidemic our leaders refuse to do anything about. This is a policy choice. Ten years after the devastating attack on Sandy Hook Elementary, kids in this country are still not safe in their own schools. Enough empty statements and hollow promises, we need immediate action from our leaders to pass gun safety legislation now and hold the NRA and gun lobby accountable for emboldening this epidemic. We must ban assault rifles, pass universal background check legislation, close dangerous loopholes, and end legislation that protects the gun lobby and their corporate donors. But we also must combat gun violence at its root cause, like what we see every day in Chicago: poverty. We need to invest in our communities and our schools - to provide children with the necessary wraparound services, care, and support they need to prevent tragic attacks like these in the first place. With a Democratic majority in Congress and a Democratic President, we cannot allow the GOP to control our policy priorities. It has been only days since the white supremacist attack in Buffalo that left ten Black people dead. This gun violence epidemic is not going to wait for us to do something about it. The time to act is now. In Solidarity, Kina Collins | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: | | Sent via . name: Doug Gansler
subject: enough
body:
We must end this nation’s scourge of gun violence. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0qGlKJ-BNmgKxyo41yGvl2RaXxzlPk9THCfQ0PaVB9rO8yD6YFxk6OjYQOYEmXeoDbUFBJOGgB_8avH8ERDqJntxyCmqEhcnaxbhl_brzn8fAoT1yj2YJ8F_9KyMn3CZxybcvmjZeSHLB3K_bhN_F6r0Cmz1RgkWH5ai3ubEa2dKr70wQhPfFYbEFCV_bHUsTX1UF0FOX8irUHqN1Vocbe0/3mc/0zjhxKPkTgeVaB5RSR1Sow/h0/8plZwehatAnK-ylWPiXj4WFiGDnxX3Weki_sk-L2Oc4)
---
Nineteen elementary students. Two adults. All murdered. School shootings, no matter how frequent, never become less devastating. All parents know what it feels like to drop our children off at school while trying to suppress that fear in the back of our minds that they might not come home. Whether a random school shooting or targeted gang violence, that fear should never become a reality for any family no matter where they live. We must end this nation's scourge of gun violence. That means:
* taking guns out of the hands of violent offenders,
* ensuring every school has at least one mental health professional for every 250 students,
* placing armed and well-trained School Resource Officers in our schools to be the first line of defense in the event of a school shooting.

We can and will do this. Doug
---

body:
We have our work cut out for us in our fight to Save America from this radical agenda. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9ba7c97e2a64565b271aa7750ea713a&_e=NfklY-1ZhHs3bHw6WR462sKMbUnwyFOJXSOeKQx31g44cboaebsl9lbFZHxntdlK3NrjdXKZXSWadeyxFkX_wFZLDaJ-lEv_9Nb38OM5705JFAnhv_dBIXr_PPz9w3HScdMf7W4qaMq9MyppF8E9T4KG0Os89jqKkccmueawq-RxHdDCb3-CYqSCQOANEAX53iuFsqNuMSn3Lk1osq24SMupiwJT0iFlsF950YYMGD7mjsBHuxxdMXFZihrHFV7so4FKsCMX4HfggmBhJSXszQR9KGydh2Q3n94N2539Z9gKg16gSZ0B8IY-Ma73eXfModQBV9jF_rBNkwWU8bKuzOa9Af_pR2HhGzn1Dtdq1cDQGtoL75OCPTILHk85H-oWt_tw30JEKhIx2cXtsAO47xOkSNh7ij1QIQkCsSzgWMDoQpQuCVw66GoxMlr32aGe)

Peter,

When I ran for Governor of California, the Left and the media unleashed on me some of the most **blatant racism** I have ever experienced.

**They called me the “black face of white supremacy”** – and all the people that sit around waiting for an opportunity to shame and cancel conservative voices ignored this and **looked the other way. Why?** Because I was a... Republican!

The radical Left is even taking their hypocritical racism into our schools. Their **Critical Race Theory** doesn’t fix racism, **it makes it worse** by teaching little black kids that they’re victims and little white kids that they’re adversaries.

I launched Elder for America this year to fight back against this and to expose the radical Left and their hypocritical woke agenda. [**Support from patriots like you is what I need to amplify my voice, even as Big Tech and the liberal media are trying to silence me.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a9ba7c97e2a64565b271aa7750ea713a&_e=NfklY-1ZhHs3bHw6WR462sKMbUnwyFOJXSOeKQx31g44cboaebsl9lbFZHxntdlK3NrjdXKZXSWadeyxFkX_wFZLDaJ-lEv_9Nb38OM5705JFAnhv_dBIXr_PPz9w3HScdMf7W4qaMq9MyppF8E9T4KG0Os89jqKkccmueawq-RxHdDCb3-CYqSCQOANEAX53iuFsqNuMSn3Lk1osq24SMupiwJT0iFlsF950YYMGD62aiPmo-J8UvjaiOt5ggyUffLOGqzyZwMfiZbbXZfXG8nDsPb-f9W64CbPC7jJNIa2h0m_Naxdca9X48ki4gfQQzRHAC69ukRp_I5yl2lU3QCG1ausZpqMcO4HT4_jimBcr3hzz8LCcwfqWK0HRhtaVwsOI6z-u9u6TyMBYZvTrLkzhHVJYXExh55c14IYcIqEascw_xItj_1DbAwyzHV-)

name: Crystal Cavalier for Congress
subject: Final Email!
body:
How to stay in touch + June 5 Cookout

| [ ](http://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/?e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email&n=1)
---
Friend -- It’s been just over a week since the Primary Election and our team has been both reflecting on our experiences and visioning paths forward. **We have an invitation for you:**
### [_Join us Sunday, June 5th at 2pm for a Campaign Celebration!_](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWYT5GAAYfCKfPrDVDaMJ8vQLcP25udDwpEdVj2LT1I_wDjUvYOfy3icHmkbOkkXDA1WWzRrzzGbqRt3YoFk-jXuaFEAzQgu0QPVgXnXIf7yW&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email&n=2)
_We’re excited to come together at the Pleasant Grove Rec Center to connect with our supporters, share our insights and what’s next. We’ll have the grill fired up and our favorite tunes playing. Bring your lawn chairs and picnic blankets._ _At 4pm, we’ll put on our[7 Directions of Service](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=2MXKF4ARM_wfs5I3vsQyYLtYeZM9t7HzghZyxWd_lYIp4Hmusk45gQGiZJ__FHod&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email&n=3) hats for the rest of the evening for more community building through a Needs and Offers Workshop (4pm-5pm) and an Outdoor Movie Screening of The Inhabitants (5pm-7pm). We hope you’ll stick around. All ages are welcome._ [_RSVP HERE!_](https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=uuUyPGiVHWR_V3cUbcvCWYT5GAAYfCKfPrDVDaMJ8vQLcP25udDwpEdVj2LT1I_wDjUvYOfy3icHmkbOkkXDA1WWzRrzzGbqRt3YoFk-jXuaFEAzQgu0QPVgXnXIf7yW&e=48a1fa12922bf6601cd5922bccf65622&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email&n=4)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: For Eva, Irma, Uziyah, Xavier, Amerie, Alithia, Jose, Annabell, Eliahana, Ellie, Rojelio, Jacklyn, Jailah, Jayce, Lexi & the unnamed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.everytown.org/ [https://www.everytown.org/]
Another senseless tragedy has taken place, this time in a Texas elementary school. I’m heartbroken for the Uvalde community. Each and every time this happens, I hug my kids a little longer and a little tighter.
It’s senseless that these repeated mass shootings continue to go unaddressed. So I’ll say it again: We must pass common-sense gun safety legislation.
If you’re wondering how to help, you can donate to verified Texas elementary school shooting fundraisers. GoFundMe has established an online hub of verified fundraisers supporting victims and loved ones affected by the shooting. [https://www.gofundme.com/c/act/donate-to-texas-elementary-school-shooting-relief] Their link includes a fundraiser organized by VictimsFirst that provides victims' family members with no-strings-attached cash payments. Additionally, The City of Uvalde is seeking donations for medical expenses [https://www.facebook.com/uvaldepd/posts/376362624524496] , and the Uvalde community is seeking volunteer legal services. Reach out to volunteer at UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org [UvaldeResponse@sa-lsa.org?subject=Uvalde%20Support] .
We continue to mourn the senseless loss of lives due to gun violence in this country. But we must simultaneously act and protect our children and our future. You can count on me to do everything in my power to move legislation that protects our communities.
My heart goes out to Uvalde. We can and must do more.
– Wiley Nickel

name: Dr. Asif Mahmood
subject: It’s time for action. Our kids’ lives are on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Asif Mahmood For Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45742190/347289728/1493062117?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI4ODdjOC04YWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-s6-FlQu-FzH1Jgr48CgR1PbAsXr6YcnnISgrOfd3s=)
Friend,

I am devastated to learn about the shooting that took place yesterday in Uvalde, Texas. This is unspeakable and horrendous violence, and it never should have happened.

The mass shooting at Robb Elementary is the deadliest since the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting, and as of yesterday one of at least 213 mass shootings to have occurred in the United States this year. That’s more mass shootings than there have been days in 2022 so far.

**These numbers support my belief that the gun violence epidemic must be recognized for what it is: a public health crisis.** For years, the gun lobby has prevented valuable research to be done in this area which could have helped form evidence-based policy to prevent this tragedy.

We need comprehensive and common sense gun discipline laws. But in order to do that, we need to hold our politicians accountable -- especially those like my opponent Young Kim who have been bought by the gun lobby. Our kids' lives are literally on the line.

I refuse to believe this is our new normal or allow ourselves to be desensitized. **[Add your name and demand the Senate to vote on gun control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45742191/347289729/962084051?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjkyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmI4ODdjOC04YWRjLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A-s6-FlQu-FzH1Jgr48CgR1PbAsXr6YcnnISgrOfd3s=&emci=56b887c8-8adc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5fb887c8-8adc-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=7344083)**

Enough is enough.

Solemnly,

Dr. Asif Mahmood

---

clean_body: | = Friend, I am devastated to learn about the shooting that took place yesterday in Uvalde, Texas. This is unspeakable and horrendous violence, and it never should have happened. The mass shooting at Robb Elementary is the deadliest since the 2012 Sandy Hook shooting, and as of yesterday one of at least 213 mass shootings to have occurred in the United States this year. That’s more mass shootings than there have been days in 2022 so far. These numbers support my belief that the gun violence epidemic must be recognized for what it is: a public health crisis. For years, the gun lobby has prevented valuable research to be done in this area which could have helped form evidence-based policy to prevent this tragedy. We need comprehensive and common sense gun discipline laws. But in order to do that, we need to hold our politicians accountable -- especially those like my opponent Young Kim who have been bought by the gun lobby. Our kids' lives are literally on the line. I refuse to believe this is our new normal or allow ourselves to be desensitized. Enough is enough. Solemnly, Dr. Asif Mahmood | Dr. Asif Mahmood is the Democratic candidate for Congress in California’s 40th District. A Pakistani-American immigrant, Asif moved to America to practice medicine. He's running for Congress because CA-40 needs leaders who wake up every day to solve problems. To support Asif's campaign, = To learn more, visit his website We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Dr. Asif Mahmood for Congress. | | ,

While we did not get the outcome we had hoped for, I’m very proud of my
team and the campaign we ran. I want to thank my team and my family for
standing by me, but most importantly, I want to thank every single Texan
who voted for our campaign to restore integrity to public service in our state.

I launched this campaign because too many of our public officials today think
they’re above the law, causing many of our fellow Texans to lose faith in our
democracy. I’m glad that we were able to talk about the importance of
integrity in public office and that ‘no one–absolutely no one–is above the
law.’

Finally, I’d like to congratulate Rochelle Garza. I ask every Texan to join
me in helping make her the next Attorney General of Texas.

Joe Jaworski
---

Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. Please make a today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: Charles Booker
subject: Heartbroken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Content Warning: The following email includes descriptions of gun
violence, death, and the loss of a loved one that may be disturbing to
some. Please take care of yourself first and skip this email if need be.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Peter,

Earlier today, I dropped my daughter off at school.

Before she gets out of the car, we always pray and say “I love you” to
each other. As she walks in, she always turns to blow me a kiss.

Watching her walk into school was both crushing and infuriating.

As a father of three young girls, I am absolutely heartbroken for the
families at Robb Elementary.

We can’t keep accepting inaction. We are not powerless, and thoughts and
prayers aren’t enough.

Words can not express the anger and frustration I have that our leaders
failed once again to protect our children.

For too long, Senators like Rand Paul and Mitch McConnell have made
passing common sense gun reform in the Senate impossible because of their
loyalty to the gun lobby donors that fund their obstruction in D.C.

Rand Paul himself has taken more money from the big gun lobby than any
other Senate candidate this year.

Things must change, and I will do all I can to make that happen. Together,
we will make sure there are real consequences to Rand selling us out.

Stay safe,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220525-1970-footer&t=1001&refcode2=1970_346206_aNg-gy&akid=1970%2E346206%2EaNg-gy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1970%2E346206%2EaNg-gy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

clean_body: Our community isn’t done fighting | | | Peter, breaking news: The returns are still coming in from our runoff election against Henry Cuellar but the race is too close to call. In fact, the margin is so close that we might be heading to a recount. We’re still very much in this race, and it’s an amazing accomplishment that we’re so close to beating a 17-year, corporate-backed opponent. The bad news is that recounts are long and expensive. We’re assembling a team of experts to help us out, but we need your help, too. We know that Cuellar’s corporate backers are going to spend as much money as they can on legal challenges, trying to muddy the waters and get as many of our votes thrown out as they can. And remember, Henry Cuellar is backed by the NRA, Big Oil, and the private prison industry. We need to be ready to counter those challenges and make sure that every vote is counted and everyone’s voice is heard. Thank you, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Gender Quota for Corporate Boards
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court has found California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional.

# [Judicial Watch Victory: Court Declares Unconstitutional California’s Gender Quota for Corporate Boards](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58973&L=27378&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZGVjbGFyZXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLWdlbmRlci1xdW90YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
"The Court eviscerated California’s unconstitutional gender quota mandate. This is the second California court decision finding that quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left’s unprecedented attacks on anti-discrimination law has suffered another stinging defeat,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58973&L=27378&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291cnQtZGVjbGFyZXMtdW5jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLWdlbmRlci1xdW90YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that a California court has found California’s gender quota law for corporate boards unconstitutional. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | May 25, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == "The Court eviscerated California’s unconstitutional gender quota mandate. This is the second California court decision finding that quotas for corporate boards are unconstitutional. The radical Left’s unprecedented attacks on anti-discrimination law has suffered another stinging defeat,” stated Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. == | | | == The Daily Caller Duffy-Lewis’ decision comes in response to a challenge to the mandate from conservative activist group Judicial Watch, which was representing three California residents, according to The Wall Street Journal. Judicial Watch president Tom Fitton stated that the law was “brazenly unconstitutional.” == = The Daily Caller The lawsuit, which was filed by Judicial Watch in the United States District Court for the Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division, alleged that Lightfoot’s denial violated Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment as well as his and TheDCNF’s First Amendment rights. = The New York Post Special Counsel John Durham’s three-year probe into the FBI and Robert Mueller’s investigations of former President Donald Trump’s 2016 presidential campaign will reach a critical moment with Monday’s trial of former Hillary Clinton campaign lawyer Michael Sussmann. | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

Hello,
As a retired three star Admiral, I know the capabilities of weapons of war.
It’s infuriating that we still have elected officials, like my Republican opponent Chuck Grassley, who block gun legislation without a care of the consequences.

clean_body: We’ve got less than 12 hours to turn things around, and I’m counting on your immediate action to get us over the top! | Peter, We have a huge deadline... Today is our campaign's last fundraising deadline before our Republican Primary in June. We'll have to publicly file everything we've raised since the end of March and we need to show the grassroots energy behind this commonsense, conservative campaign, but I have some bad news. We're coming up short. | Your support will ensure we have the funds we need to get our winning message to the voters over these last critical weeks before Primary Election Day on June 14th , and lay the groundwork we need to move on and face the Democrats in the general election. Peter, Democrats are trying to push their disastrous Biden-Pelosi-Schumer Democrats leftist agenda from DC to right here in South Carolina. The need for commonsense leadership at home in our states has never been more important. We must have experienced, capable, and truly conservative leadership to resist their failed policies. I'm ready to continue doing just that, With your help, we'll meet this critical challenge, make a strong statement in the Primary, and roll forward with a new burst of momentum to win in November and keep South Carolina RED! Remember , time runs out at midnight, Yours very truly, Henry McMaster Governor of South Carolina | | PAID FOR BY MCMASTER-EVETTE '22 PO BOX 2459 MT. PLEASANT SC 29465 Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

subject: Like you, we’re heartbroken

body:
Please speak up with us.
| [ ](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/117?t=1&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f)
---
Friend, there's not much we can say - yesterday's school shooting that killed 21 people weighs heavy in our hearts.

This is barely one week after the terrible Buffalo shooting that took the lives of 10 Black Americans.

_**At the very least, we must do everything we can to pressure the cowardly GOP leaders to stop trading innocent lives for NRA checks.**_

But Ron DeSantis has PROMISED to enact "open carry" pro-NRA gun laws for Florida - allowing anyone to carry dangerous firearms without a permit, _all but guaranteeing an increase in fatal gun violence._

**Look, today we have a different type of request.** [**Will you take a few moments to contact Gov. DeSantis ' office and tell him NOT to pass open carry? We need to flood his office with calls so he knows how furious we are! Click here for his office's phone number and email »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8824?t=7&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f) | [LET’S TAKE ACTION: CLICK HERE TO GIVE GOV. RON DESANTIS A CALL TO DEMAND REAL GUN CONTROL ACTION »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8825?t=8&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f)
---
Thank you,

Team Ron Be Gone

P.S. [**Everytown**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8826?t=9&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f), [**Moms Demand Action**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8827?t=10&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f), and [**Brady**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8828?t=11&akid=1119%2E564421%2Eb3UH2f) are just a few of the organizations doing critical gun violence prevention advocacy. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Tuesday’s Victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m humbled and honored to be your Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia! |
[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=3cbbd6913ed44750ab35f78292184987&_e=9wueNPFEOIIfM2R2dFRfrTze2P46TtKl7ZOmR-WHkDjTNy4OSPN3wpPUD_Y1GifBMjP8yGvBqXfrdykyCp6-RfMCAWubdyvNZu4PuF5jWSuFVSSr5BGrzf7eqeEEJjQAfC41cyEjmmBeRLmFrzz7v6P4aX-MI8Fx0aoKsHh8JtAWk0nn3QS3FASvQlMDnMv4Bdh3HQnby8-vQ-82Pk3TnUQ9ZBbdstlVzzsPux1ykW2A_VE1GDGnJ9f4SjVPJOpEmqAwqisJPTtOAXGsdeHs3bmJPJwxShqxWgQS1VGeaiKruZsJdlGmKmP8DL8G47vYTlD4tXrwNJPV8J-rXZAru8jVU_E0s75UgQCiCxIxWOvK5JfV9u8cvocNAyWhLQ3aL2HcPOG9koulG92tnxE34-PFPDhYuTdpa0CUzJlJPWAnxzNttJcB7d3cLxrDUtqfwEVLI7OphZ3w2Jex6AY1pa_dAKnkjYqhq4YUufkKSj8%3D)

---
Fellow American - thank you!

**Because of your support and the support of conservatives like you, Team Herschel won our primary election.**

_**I'm humbled and honored to be the Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia!**_

We're only at halftime, so there's still a lot of work left to do.

Fellow American, you know I'm not a politician. I don't look, sound, or dress like a politician.

But I LIKE _not being_ a politician! After all, politicians are making a mess of this country - _**but I'm here to help fix it!**_

Through my life experiences - winning a national championship with the University of Georgia, playing football in the NFL, and running successful businesses - I've learned that nothing worth doing is ever easy. I know this Senate race will be no different, but I am excited about the hard work that lies ahead.

There's so much at stake this year. As I've traveled around Georgia on the campaign trail, I've had the opportunity to speak with folks from all walks of life. Many are hurting and scared.

They can't afford food.
They can't pay for gas.
They're sick about what's happening in the schools.
They don't feel safe.
The America they know and love is slipping away. I am ready to be their voice and fight for them. **_They_ are the reason I entered this race. **

But we have an uphill climb, Fellow American.

Democrats and their Hollywood donors have poured tens of millions of dollars into Senator Raphael Warnock's campaign so they can continue their destruction.

In return, my opponent rubber stamps Joe Biden's policies and votes in lockstep with New York Senator Chuck Schumer!

Senator Warnock said in his tv ad that he can't fix Washington in one year. Well, he's not even trying. **His votes are destroying our economy and tearing our communities apart.**

**[Fellow American, have you had enough?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=3cbbd6913ed44750ab35f78292184987&_e=9wueNPFEOIIfM2R2dFRfrTze2P46TtKl7ZOmR-WHkDjTNy4OSPN3wpPUD_Y1GifBMjP8yGvBqXfrdykyCp6-RfMCAWubdyvNZu4PuF5jWSuFVSSr5BGrzf7eqeEEJjQAfC41cyEjmmBeRLmFrzz7v6P4aX-MI8Fx0aoKsHh8JtAWk0nn3QS3FASvQlMDnMv4Bdh3HQnby8-vQ-82Pk3TnUQ9ZBbdstlVzzsPux1ykW2A_VE1GDGnJ9f4SjVPJOpEmqAwqisJPTtOAXGsdeHs3UDeNZXrBH8asO-dPHlHxLYcgum3hAQE-gWJSLtVLdZMvkd4QJi2YKd7Qj-kH4N4ZWoqBLJ7rAu3M6g1nxJRL20pC9cA1pGHsk1IG3WQROsXaTnUZRm7sYACljx98d4McvMnlhBuUDbrg6r6AB9Vs2fv1W4GPCY3BM-N4FRp2l_4zxJguxHy68FlmzGJR3xmnk4bEKa31atWNqflImxZSKU%3D)** The cost of doing "more of the same" is too high, so we must win back the Senate majority if we want to put America back on the right track.

If are you ready to take back this Senate seat, I need to know you're with me. **[Can we count on you to send $5, $10, or even $34 right now?](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=3cbbd6913ed44750ab35f78292184987&_e=9wueNPFEOIIfM2R2dFRfrTze2P46TtKl7ZOmR-WHkDjTNy4OSPN3wpPUD_Y1GifBMjP8yGvBqXfrdykyCp6-RfMCAWubdyvNZu4PuF5jWSuFVSSr5BGrzf7eqeEEJjQAfC41cyEjmmBeRLmFrzz7v6P4aX-MI8Fx0aoKsHh8JtAWk0nn3QS3FASvQlMDnMv4Bdh3HQnby8-vQ-82Pk3TnUQ9ZBbdstlVzzsPux1ykW2A_VE1GDGnJ9f4SjVPJOpEmqAwqisJPTtOAXGsdeHs3a8StJiIX3lNa2uqnL0Yqil3cD7ZchcfCAJmsGprj9-Dozj8bCs4qR7wEBOpBp7y57YbittggcoywjO3dovWjhlU-Q-SKTVtS9dDQrY_yBxxJJNG3crnS0X0zfZDIDJatwxRySKoOL1sGd25IgIy4O24uETbEuiPBregERKOUaPSpdMOKUcNY4RgX7o17auFEUVWkAnH62CQ8mNLA5Oizf0%3D)**

We've got a tremendous amount of work to do. The future of this great country rests on our shoulders because the road to defeating the Biden agenda and winning back the Senate majority runs right through Georgia. **[In order to stop Biden, we have to defeat Warnock. Plain and simple.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=3cbbd6913ed44750ab35f78292184987&_e=9wueNPFEOIIfM2R2dFRfrTze2P46TtKl7ZOmR-WHkDjTNy4OSPN3wpPUD_Y1GifBMjP8yGvBqXfrdykyCp6-RfMCAWubdyvNZu4PuF5jWSuFVSSr5BGrzf7eqeEEJjQAfC41cyEjmmBeRLmFrzz7v6P4aX-MI8Fx0aoKsHh8JtAWk0nn3QS3FASvQlMDnMv4Bdh3HQnby8-vQ-82Pk3TnUQ9ZBbdstlVzzsPux1ykW2A_VE1GDGnJ9f4SjVPJOpEmqAwqisJPTtOAXGsdeHs3QBql-Paw9niRqSzcbYgUgC6MxA4_vR1dB_eRN5lSICW_ua70F5ot6DmhgxwiyV2gKzm_LzL2GlqRGqHDcHyOEI4VJS0VUL9i7iHAcGZQ2z5yuQSlPDTqoFcQcMIywddb4W0hx5imxG2HBPF2OSA-chz_h-MMeDaqTu-NSQrA5MmmIM8cJpJ3kGtxGhRSaQ9cbttITA4xTakNxvqUE1PqMU%3D)**

Fellow American, let's do this!

On to Victory,

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=3cbbd6913ed44750ab35f78292184987&_e=9wueNPFEOIIfM2R2dFRfrTze2P46TtKl7ZOmR-WHkDjTNy4OSPN3wpPUD_Y1GifBMjP8yGvBqXfrdykyCp6-RfMCAWubdyvNZu4PuF5jWSuFVSSr5BGrzf7eqeEEJjQAfC41cyEjmmBeRLmFrzz7v6P4aX-MI8Fx0aoKsHh8JtAWk0nn3QS3FASvQlMDnMv4Bdh3HQnby8-vQ-82Pk3TnUQ9ZBbdstlVzzsPux1ykW2A_VE1GDGnJ9f4SjVPJOpEmqAwqisJPTtOAXGsdeHs3bfEFIKe3I366_fQtcSpZ6S_7xT8rd1GVh_qHI-UW9K4ryu81Ipt58h1VHzcy9qhdsReTGkiYUaGxJZYYq-ZJh-NU9nfNyHqppbpNBAN5LMOa27tPjzaW5hFIz1FWh8nW-eFrHSTjMw1uCYZ5oepnHBPqheCp9PHZMq4x3_PdI-xca2qrENX7bSBFeL888unbrs5RH7RmgDjuGqASyhQQcs%3D)

Herschel Walker

clean_body: I’m humbled and honored to be your Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia! | Fellow American - thank you! Because of your support and the support of conservatives like you, Team Herschel won our primary election. I'm humbled and honored to be the Republican nominee for the United States Senate from Georgia! We're only at halftime, so there's still a lot of work left to do. Fellow American, you know I'm not a politician. I don't look, sound, or dress like a politician. But I LIKE not being a politician! After all, politicians are making a mess of this country - but I'm here to help fix it! Through my life experiences - winning a national championship with the University of Georgia, playing football in the NFL, and running successful businesses - I've learned that nothing worth doing is ever easy. I know this Senate race will be no different, but I am excited about the hard work that lies ahead. There's so much at stake this year. As I've traveled around Georgia on the campaign trail, I've had the opportunity to speak with folks from all walks of life. Many are hurting and scared. They can't afford food. They can't pay for gas. They're sick about what's happening in the schools. They don't feel safe. The America they know and love is slipping away. I am ready to be their voice and fight for them. They are the reason I entered this race. But we have an uphill climb, Fellow American. Democrats and their Hollywood donors have poured tens of millions of dollars into Senator Raphael Warnock's campaign so they can continue their destruction. In return, my opponent rubber stamps Joe Biden's policies and votes in lockstep with New York Senator Chuck Schumer! Senator Warnock said in his tv ad that he can't fix Washington in one year. Well, he's not even trying. His votes are destroying our economy and tearing our communities apart. The cost of doing "more of the same" is too high, so we must win back the Senate majority if we want to put America back on the right track. If are you ready to take back this Senate seat, I need to know you're with me. We've got a tremendous amount of work to do. The future of this great country rests on our shoulders because the road to defeating the Biden agenda and winning back the Senate majority runs right through Georgia. Fellow American, let's do this! On to Victory, Herschel Walker Republican Nominee for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Patty Murray
subject: Enough
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Like I’m sure so many of you, I am heartbroken for the families and loved ones of the nineteen children and two teachers who were killed in Texas yesterday.
#
Peter,

Like I’m sure so many of you, I am heartbroken for the families and loved ones of the nineteen children and two teachers who were killed in Texas yesterday.

These were children. Kids who were excited about summer vacation and playdates with friends who were murdered by weapons of war.

We’ve gotten to the point in our country where school shootings are no longer “unthinkable” – in fact it’s something so many parents in Washington state and across the country think about all the time.

What is unacceptable is that after each one of these tragedies, nothing changes.

Each time, Republicans refuse to get their head out of the sand and do what a majority of Americans have been begging for for years: pass gun safety laws. And to make it worse – they block even debating legislation that could save lives.

Instead, they offer ideas and excuses like arming teachers. None of them get to the root cause of this issue. Guns.

I wanted to reach out today to make clear where I stand on this: I will work with anyone in the Senate to make meaningful progress to end the gun violence crisis. I want Congress to pass universal background checks, a ban on assault weapons, red flag laws, and other meaningful legislation to end gun violence.

And my promise to everyone in Washington state – our teachers, parents, students, and families – is that despite the silence and obstruction from Republicans, I will continue to speak out and push for real federal action that will keep guns out of the wrong hands.

Thank you,

Patty Murray

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
