Fellow American,

You may or may not watch “**The View** ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples:

“ _**If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets?**_ ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration

“ _**It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman.**_ ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party

Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ _**Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves.**_ ”

Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ _**doesn’t understand black Republicans,**_ ” and that a black Republican is “ _**an oxymoron**_.”

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUr3b-qSPKf4b3mp8gY8PwJY_ZNIKtuWgO6UODbUNdN0-hsXKPOkUkIOtvvhdeKt8Ey_vjVlewftsSwtNUDG9RzIMVxLDUyVI4z8RjRaOrMQmuqDvwud_LktKt1jkxSHHGW8F1LSX_5mQsxviWh11aCFne2vtyw8K7NVQKMeDbjSNLGURoCFbU0h15Es7tes_lEFdhhgrMuu_KWmitZ3s41ug%3D%3D)
[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrZpdm15nSmzJThQHdtofeFOblJanxpz7fXYZ2BgLS31wLdxAXWi9n3GV4p5glzns8N8lNiuviiTV-hxRxvH2UcOa_pg2QrArbqp96-pRWdko_CApQXSnjOK82WQz2hoP5kaLXnMRObVnI2W4zCL_Vb6mdeN3MRCVn3w84T7tmkHOCVWE7Rtpc5oNHD7qgefu4YR1Z8lE9wqjCJbs8Vjx1bA%3D%3D)

Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and **proud Black Republican**. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. **I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support** – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans.

Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. **[That’s exactly why I’m running for Congress for a House seat representing Florida](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrVAh4BbZy-eYmdE0u5bP9bjr7EZJwI-yLOGb-IwE0SzF2IvHdHfPSo76_iOmVsxQSQXUw6VP-srt-PkDj6H2JO9TiJJGJo_B5uzk8Onawqqs2H6jbOxUufsRc-ojv5bE5h6hLjpYvRVAkO03yxsEndRy0JioXkUTKKfvrC1WNtAWIB0NhCawF6xKbN98MGoj5w4YBhKHBzLc1hW5bCSDoGw%3D%3D)**. I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d **[help me send a message to the ladies of “The View”](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUr0OmJpdlGl-EmVHIwqSqM64b_Fi3c5hBivnjUOdzuBItU7nMWzBonTtUGPedYZdp1e_-PnjUhF6HhxROWT6_ZYo_vByAcICvRk4ffqw8K4vjCMtOwL8WYfZ_8M6CXbLcTK0l85cOTZev_RnmIDbLkIIkKPDRm0BTJBhGGqenMzTb3xaEMhLq9E30Cz-M5tpgS7rxFPkWKPiHRmzcf_vJ7Zw%3D%3D)** that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron.

[** HELP ME SEND A MESSAGE
TO THE LADIES OF THE VIEW>>**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrVyBBueUemOkk6HZBOL7DoE_mR0Hrd1yiRTWsacslq-EIPr6knqsD9zG43IzpJT9adDWc1pjXcsPRH3TNYShNws4qS6BlNzMolSM4GkEej6APVdizusBBZ0zyE-2H_byG6Jk6L9BqC94lPHblY4b-zvQJoP7IY1BBb-p7SIKwc3KyWn0JN9LVQuyiUdxmfj-gYrL9vNG3IrtrzTSBcYNWmA%3D%3D)
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUr3OguhvktvKWtjpFxghFbDJ4_ZpaZ80SdX0xQRqTdcf44p4JAodjuKBFvKb8zoP8a6TeyrdA8eE6BJi1XLrRMD0moby6djc8ZCcN71yPzTnJReHGSs8d6jUJGR67vobvOvWrOHzs4vnyfm4P3kzqmZ_oc4BOs_6R8KTyNd9CwOI7D3h3HJQis3x6X_sI0CU0MTkkB0mHwmTD2SwMlxIByYA%3D%3D)
I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today.**[If you could find it in your budget to send $2 ](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrMPRIQRlFd6gNLCTxlVr1VXeg1Pa4yUmtSQ1Qlydb_7RIgPu0HvZJyZEW5S8JyQoZ-Z_sCM_69WM906KbE2ISL4ADcvtJb8SZ1CinGACMbenxC9yXwTNybEk7gjV-qpSkZDVG3R8vXHUZd0tLg6pM-s5uW5XxUCjjrNNn1cSzd9U-d9tcxJ3N3U0-NzjGMsRkQ_LlDZslTvXLVBRS5r857A%3D%3D)** to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party.

Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration.

For Country,

Rod Dorilas

[** CHIP IN $2 >> **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrlJR3pFcUk1ReeLIjOzWwwqG2mzyl8G4Bc7rsppU3PzblpYHuT61Fm7bWCe6sdkTtPhyVztd84U7gLrjs_mjqza4JXHnGt5XMnu1e5XKrRW4d07Moc_jIBLVoW7ASdk2wBRcPUzzltIThYVPhV5ncLHaPg200xMdRSedXBNSGSubO3bhYA9lXGi-TN9MbIfvjarBf89CZpM1MiIgc919lKg%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=d1dffc94e15b49a0a47d47089b3eafb0&_e=hd8YjDCeOqpHsbQnPnj1fuYDIuv1SAXQXtfnRPf8vAFnGyTB5qwUoKhLUCvltr3mTiSqrgX0WCf9CZO5euQBE2W1pxGhWpeL106kh8fbP7SOaCMhzzUUpw-wOU0MCs_oEhpF82OsJyZAN2Z7ULcQ_qCBlaG0jCRkE06DAaKRGlXmPkq66ON8BwvmZefd9yszhhqS3ecvd90dzD4lYx-DY7YuyNSnJNs4GiK8KLht1aWVW4iITSJ6HQfN_eNPmEUrgT304IA_v5UscRecF1H1G53ddfeNrwukNMP7r_FZBzFWdRNPzxYfHHU9IsMc_E_uUxOsL4-2ikQ7YUpy6k1aVxiozml-VQXdDE5gJwNxySIUNrWyJ-5WrXWpKurMiuK74unu8ebltDqQa3iRRV3j0Tz8gQSuSp5DlxoZ0bs9GU1NC7mkpOC8_YDO-Ao2f3v_X4IpEoqCqww2fm7xr5_M_A%3D%3D)

Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “doesn’t und | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, You may or may not watch “The View ,” but undoubtedly, you’ve heard of the daytime talk show owing to the many outrageous things their hosts have said throughout the years. Let me remind you of a few examples: “ If you kick out all of the Latinos who’s going to clean your toilets? ” – Kelly Osbourn on illegal immigration “ It was a Halloween party. I went as a beautiful African woman. ” – Joy Behar on wearing blackface to a Halloween party Or when Whoopie Goldberg last year had this to say when talking about the Holocaust: “ Well, this is white people doing it to white people. So, this is y’all go fight amongst yourselves. ” Well, now things have gotten political once again. Recently co-host Sunny Hostin said on air that she “ doesn’t understand black Republicans, ” and that a black Republican is “ an oxymoron.” Fellow American, my name is Rod Dorilás and I’m not an oxymoron. I’m a trained lawyer, military veteran, 1st generation American and proud Black Republican. I’m a free thinker and advocate for smaller government, a robust judicial system and free and fair elections. I believe that everyone should have the opportunity to hear the arguments both sides make to win over votes and that no one’s support – regardless of race – should be assumed by Democrats or Republicans. Fellow American, it’s impossible to deny that there isn’t enough African American representation in the modern Republican Party. . I know money is tight for a lot of folks right now, but today I’m writing to see if you’d that there are a lot of Black Republicans in the U.S. – and we’re not an oxymoron. I believe that if voters are able to be reached equally by Democrat and Republican campaigns, Republicans would win every time. I won’t deny that my opponent is much more well-funded than I, which is why I’m making this special ask of you today. to my campaign today, I’m certain I can flip this South Florida House seat on behalf of our party. Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. I sincerely appreciate your consideration. For Country, Rod Dorilas | ABOUT ROD Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

You don’t have to climb a mountain to experience the woes of elevation. Plenty of favorite travel spots perch on high, such as Cusco, Peru, at 11,152 feet, and Leh, India, at 11,550 feet. At altitude, there’s less oxygen in the air, which can leave you gasping for breath just trying to walk up a street. (Discover nine mountains to summit in a lifetime.) What exactly is happening to the body? “First it increases breathing, which can feel like a shortness of breath,” says Peter Hackett, director of the Institute for Altitude Medicine in Colorado. “Second the blood vessels in the brain expand, so that there’s more blood and therefore more oxygen. That gives the sensation of a headache.” Symptoms of acute mountain sickness, or AMS as it’s known, include trouble sleeping, nausea, loss of appetite, and fatigue. If you keep going higher and ignore signals from your body, you could develop HAPE, high altitude pulmonary edema, or HACE, high altitude cerebral edema, both of which are very serious. All that said, some of the best views on Earth are seen from up high. The key to your success? Go up slowly. body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

Our broken hearts are with Uvalde after 19 children and two adults were
killed in a senseless shooting at Robb Elementary School.

21 families are going through the worst pain imaginable today. Parents who
took their kids to school yesterday and participated in an honors
ceremony, looking forward to spending a summer break together. Families
mourning the loss of their loved one who lost their life protecting their
students.

This trauma will live on with the Uvalde community, just as it has within
the El Paso community, Santa Fe, Sandy Hook, and too many more to count.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56082?t=1001&akid=190954%2E444211%2EOjEN5y ]If you are looking for a way to help, please consider making a donation
to a verified relief fund for those affected by the shooting in Robb
Elementary School yesterday.

Contribute

In this moment, we must take care of our neighbors, friends, and family.
And then, when we are ready, we must ensure Greg Abbott answers for this.

With every failure to support safe storage laws, champion red flag laws,
ban AR-15s and AK-47s, and appropriately fund mental health care, Greg
Abbott chose to let this happen. Again and again.

We have the power to change this and we will.

Thank you,

Beto for Texas

Friend,

I’ve introduced legislation in the New Jersey State Senate to protect minors whose parents are killed by a drunk driver. My bill would require financial support for these children until they are 18 or 21 if they have a mental or physical disability.

I wanted to take a quick moment to hear your thoughts. Do you support this new legislation?

---
[YES ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=4909c75ac3&e=ae0ea222da)

---
[NO ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=834e193e8d&e=ae0ea222da)

---
| A child that loses a parent or guardian to a drunk driver experiences an incredible amount of emotional and likely financial distress. The moment they lose their parents is a life-changing moment – drunk drivers should be held responsible for their actions.

With this, I hope to continue to discourage drunk drivers from getting behind the wheel.

Don’t forget to share your thoughts by answering the one-question poll above, and please share this email with your family and friends.

Be safe,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=7206fac6e3&e=ae0ea222da)
Ed Durr
New Jersey State Senator

Peter Willis,

The loss of 21 innocent lives yesterday in Uvalde is yet another horrific
example of a uniquely American problem — mass shootings.

Until we take serious action and pass strong gun violence prevention
policies — like universal background checks, an assault weapons ban and
regulations on the sale and transfer of guns — more and more Americans
will find themselves in the shoes of the families and friends of the
victims in Uvalde.

The Republican party has made clear that they will not vote to pass any
kind of legislation to enact gun reform — no matter the consequences.

Peter Willis, our only hope for passing gun reform in this country is
to abolish the filibuster, but Republicans and corporate “Democrats” like
Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema, refuse to defy their corporate donors, for
whom no body count is worth ending the filibuster.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/sign/petition-pass-gun-reform/?refcode=OR_EM_PT_45SP_20220525_1_1&t=1009&akid=2960%2E5885482%2EimB0mJ ]Peter Willis, enough is enough. Republicans and corporate
“Democrats” alike are standing in the way of progress and protection of
lives across the country. Stand with us to demand Congress pass gun reform
immediately.

In Solidarity,

Our Revolution

body:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Jessica has poured every dollar into defeating Cuellar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

This fight is not over,
Peter. No major outlet has
declared a winner in Jessica Cisneros’ TX-28 runoff because it’s still too
close to call. The only person that has declared victory in TX-28 is Henry
Cuellar, and we’re going to make sure that every single vote is counted.

Jessica’s race is not over, and a recount is looking more and more likely.

There are still outstanding ballots that need to be counted, and we’ll
make sure that every voter in TX-28 is heard. But Jessica has poured every
dollar she had into the runoff and needs your help to support our efforts
to count every vote.

While Trump’s favorite Democrat is calling on election officials to “stop
the count” Justice Democrats is standing with Jessica in the fight to see
this election to the finish. Are you with us? [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109824?refcode=em20220525-23546&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]Split a
$3 contribution between Justice Democrats and Jessica
Cisneros today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109824?refcode=em20220525-23546&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]Contribute

The special interest and corporate Democratic donors backing Cuellar can
raise seemingly unlimited funds to defeat Jessica. They spent millions to
defeat her in the runoff, and with the margin of victory so small in
TX-28, they’ll do anything to ensure Cuellar is successful in a recount.

177 votes is what separates Jessica Cisneros and Henry Cuellar right now.
But in a district as large as TX-28, a recount will be costly. If 1 out of
every 10 grassroots supporters reading this email gave $28 today towards
our efforts, we would be well on our way. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109824?refcode=em20220525-23546&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]Can you split a $28
contribution right now to Jessica and Justice Democrats?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/109824?refcode=em20220525-23546&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]Give $28 for TX-28

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220525-23546-footer&t=1026&refcode2=23546_1203867_npiD2X&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=23546%2E1203867%2EnpiD2X

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Our economy is evolving rapidly, and the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act will help us better prepare workers to fill good-paying jobs. |

| | Friend, it's Troy.

Our economy is evolving rapidly, and the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act will help us better prepare workers to fill good-paying jobs. However, some of my colleagues in the Senate do not seem to agree and I wanted to get your thoughts on it.

Can you answer this quick question for me?

name: Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel
subject: Despicable behavior by President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate.
Peter,

The President recently canceled a 1-million-plus acre oil lease in Alaska. That is tragic considering that gas prices are the highest they’ve ever been. **In 2022, there is absolutely no reason the United States should not be energy independent.**

We’re home to the most technologically innovative companies in the world and we can extract oil without harming the surrounding environment. President Biden owns these exorbitant gas prices - and no one else.

**While canceling an oil lease is unfortunate** , what’s shameful is that while he’s declaring U.S. energy off limits, he’s making a deal in Venezuela to import more than 1 million barrels of oil PER DAY.

Yep - you read that right **In March, President Biden sent members of his administration to Caracas Venezuela to make a deal with dictator Nicolas Maduro for oil that we don’t need.**

This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate.

Yet despite the crazy chaotic way Democrats in Washington are running our country, their donors continue to help them outraise Republicans at every turn. clean_body: This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate. Peter, The President recently canceled a 1-million-plus acre oil lease in Alaska. That is tragic considering that gas prices are the highest they’ve ever been. In 2022, there is absolutely no reason the United States should not be energy independent. We’re home to the most technologically innovative companies in the world and we can extract oil without harming the surrounding environment. President Biden owns these exorbitant gas prices - and no one else. While canceling an oil lease is unfortunate , what’s shameful is that while he’s declaring U.S. energy off limits, he’s making a deal in Venezuela to import more than 1 million barrels of oil PER DAY. Yep - you read that right In March, President Biden sent members of his administration to Caracas Venezuela to make a deal with dictator Nicolas Maduro for oil that we don’t need. This is just another reason why this administration must be held accountable by a Republican House and Senate. Yet despite the crazy chaotic way Democrats in Washington are running our country, their donors continue to help them outraise Republicans at every turn. This is an urgent request. | Thank you, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman, Republican National Committee | | Paid for by the Republican National Committee. clean_body: Make it count! | Hey friends, It’s Ted Budd here, and I’m reaching out about a crucial deadline. This is our very first fundraising deadline after we won our Primary election, and we can’t let the momentum slow down. T he Primary was just the first lap – we have to keep our foot on the gas until November! | We can’t let up. The race is ON, and all eyes are on us! If we don’t win, we can count on Radical Leftist Cheri Beasley to get in line with Joe Biden and the Squad on absolutely every single issue. She would radicalize NC and turn this state blue. It’s time to fight to secure our Southern border, our communities, and our children’s futures. We MUST fight for our country and defend it from the threat of Socialism. | ---|--- | | | In liberty, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | **$5,888 Raised At This Point!!!**

With our max donor's matching contribution this puts us currently at $11,776 in funds raised since 10am this morning!!

Our max donor, who is matching any and all funds, up to $10,000 we raise by 10am tomorrow morning has informed me that his friend will offer the same exact deal, this weekend, _ONLY_ if we meet our current goal of $10,000 raised ($20,000 after our current max donor matches) by 10am tomorrow morning.

Thank you for all that you have contributed thus far.

We can do this!! It's so close!!

**1) Please forward this email to any and all of your friends and family who you believe may financially contribute.

2) Please "copy and paste" this email into a text message (or call) to communicate our fundraising goals to family and friends who don't check their email frequently but may desire to contribute financially

3) Please donate by clicking the website link below or by clicking the donate buttons below. **

Every dollar is incredibly appreciated!

We got this!!!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Baugh?=
subject: I urgently need your help before tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d01a9656de&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,
**This is it – early voting starts in our race to defeat Progressive Caucus leader Katie Porter TOMORROW!**

I am so thankful to have you on my team to flip this critical House seat. It is one of five that Republicans absolutely must win if we are going to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House.

**With that being said, we are still perilously behind funding our[ Get Out The Vote efforts](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=49b19aa3a1&e=8a657725d1). After starting out needing to raise $25,000, we are still more than $18,000 short. **

_If we don’t raise at least another $3,000 before tomorrow, I am going to have to cut our budget. With voters voting, that would be a complete disaster. _

So, please, will you help?
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=9bbfb18840&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, I know I don’t need to tell you what a disaster Katie Porter has been in Congress. _She even recently said that the solution to Joe Biden’s inflation crisis was abortion. _

We absolutely must win this seat, which means budget cuts are not an option. Please - will you help me make sure it doesn’t come to that?
---
| [DONATE BEFORE VOTING STARTS TOMORROW](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=6b90fd1117&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE BEFORE VOTING STARTS TOMORROW")
---
| Thank you,
Scott Baugh
